item.description: Chapter 1437 Evil God’s Atrocities 1437 Evil God’s Atrocities After Tian Xian finished slaughtering Mo Ru’s entire family before his very eyes, Tian Xian took a seat on top of the pile of corpses and calmly gazed at Mo Ru, who had an inhuman expression on his face. “T-the Heavens— they will not forgive you for your heinous crimes today!” Mo Ru cried as he stared back at Tian Xian.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1438 Unique Quest 1438 Unique Quest After cleaning up the building to the best of his abilities, Yuan left the place and returned to the dark and ominous world outside. He turned to look at Invincible Heaven for a moment and said, “The City of Xian has been split into many pieces, but we can use it to determine our location within the Shadow Realm. The Invincible Heaven was built in the city’s center, but it was pushed further east when we expanded the city, so we’re near the eastern side of the Shadow Realm.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1439 A Familiar Notification 1439 A Familiar Notification Somewhere in the Primordial Realm, a dignified middle-aged man of imposing presence sat poised upon the surface of a large pond while emanating an ancient aura, seemingly asleep. Suddenly, a ripple appeared on the tranquil surface of the pond, followed by a calm yet excited voice, “Father, the Blood Jade has finally activated.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "I ended up staying at the Dragon Pavilion for longer than I'd intended… I hope I don't get scolded for suddenly disappearing after signing up for the challenge…" Yuan mumbled to himself as he power-walked back to the Carp Leaping Over the Dragon's Gate Tower after leaving the Dragon Pavilion, silently hoping that Min Li was still inside the tower. "What the heck?" When Yuan returned to the tower, he was shocked by the progress Min Li had made during the 3 hours that he'd disappeared, and to his surprise, Min Li was only on the 43rd floor! 'It took her over three hours to progress a little over 10 floors?! Just long will this challenge take?' Yuan cried inwardly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1440 The Great One’s Proposal 1440 The Great One’s Proposal <The Great One’s Trial has begun!> <You have a new challenge!>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1441 A Little Early 1441 A Little Early Yuan stared at the Great One’s overbearing eyes and spoke after a moment of silence, “You’re actually serious about recruiting me as your disciple?” “Of course. I wouldn’t joke about something like this. What makes you think I am joking?” The Great One asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1442 Ji Ran 1442 Ji Ran “We know that you have two Soul Weapons, but to be completely honest with you, we’re not confident that you have enough soul strength to house both of our souls at your current level, so you cannot blame us for wanting to go first.” Ji Ran said in a sighing voice. “He’s right, Yuan. You also can’t blame us for being skeptical of your capabilities.” Yu Ning agreed with Ji Ran, and she continued, “If you don’t have enough soul strength, it would be incredibly dangerous for us to occupy your Soul Weapon, so it’s not as if we have no risk. Normally, we wouldn’t trust a Spirit King to be capable enough to help even a single one of us, much less both of us at once, but we’re just that desperate to get out of this hellhole.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1443 Yu Ning 1443 Yu Ning The moment Ji Ran entered the Starry Abyss, Yuan received a notification. <An unknown entity has invaded your Soul Weapon>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1444 Holy Sword Saint 1444 Holy Sword Saint “Y-you possess three Soul Weapons…? No… that’s impossible!” Jin Geming quickly expressed his doubt. After all, even the most talented cultivators during the Primordial Era had 2 Soul Weapons at the most. Three was simply unheard of—even unimaginable. “Why would I lie to you? Especially when this sort of lie can easily be exposed?” Yuan shook his head.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1445 Replenishing the Lord’s Cultivation 1445 Replenishing the Lord’s Cultivation After receiving Yuan’s reassurance that the Empyrean Overlord was unoccupied, Yu Ning took a deep breath before entering the sword. “Wow… they weren’t exaggerating when they said it was spacious inside a Soul Weapon… You can probably fit one or two major cities in here and still have room to spare.” Yu Ning’s surprised voice resounded a moment later.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1446 A New Era on Earth 1446 A New Era on Earth Upon returning to his living quarters, Yuan encountered Meifeng waiting at the front door. “Are you waiting for someone?” Yuan asked her.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1447 A Surprise Visit 1447 A Surprise Visit After flying for almost an entire day without rest, Yuan arrived at the Eternal Lotuses’ headquarters. The guards at the front gate were startled when he suddenly descended from the sky and landed before them.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1448 The Plan to Protect Earth 1448 The Plan to Protect Earth After successfully controlling her emotions for two seconds, Yu Rou stopped caring and jumped at Yuan with her arms wide open, embracing him tightly. “I’ve missed you, Brother! You should visit me more often!” she complained.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1449 Possessing Yuan’s Body 1449 Possessing Yuan’s Body “Wait a second, Yuan. While we can restrict everyone’s cultivation bases, what about their weapons? Are there formations that can prevent people from using treasures that are too powerful?” Bai Lianhua asked. “Powerful treasures will require more spiritual energy to use. If we limit the cultivation base enough, it would automatically restrict their weapon usage, as well.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Another hour after Min Li reached the 75th floor, a golden light emitted from the 77th floor, indicating that she had passed that floor as well. "Wow! 77 floors on her first try! As expected of Fairy Min!" "She has taken first place in the rankings! Fairy Min is currently the highest climber out of all Outer Court disciples!" "I find it crazy how she'd decided to challenge the Carp Leaping Over Dragon's Gate Tower only two days after she'd become a disciple! Only someone from one of the Seven Legacy Families would dare to be so bold and confident in their abilities!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1450 Godlike Body 1450 Godlike Body “Wow, it’s so… beautiful.” Yu Rou muttered in a dazed voice as she was quickly mesmerized by the golden Array Symbols filling up the room. Bai Lianhua, on the other hand, was shocked at the speed at which Yu Ning was forming the Array Symbols. She had seen Array Masters at work several times in Cultivation Online, but none of them were even a small fraction of Yu Ning’s speed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1451 Simply Curious 1451 Simply Curious After spending nearly the entire day touring the city without any disturbance, their peace was finally broken when someone on the street recognized them. “H-hey! Look over there! Isn’t that Player Yuan?!” Someone there suddenly blurted out loud in the busy street.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1452 Unlimited Money 1452 Unlimited Money “Since it’s already late, we will leave for now and give you another night to think through it, Bai Lianhua! If you do not give us a response by tomorrow evening, we will put in an official request with the Cultivators’ Association! If you don’t respond or show up to our challenge, your faction’s rank will drop by another ten ranks! How many ranks have your faction already dropped these past few months? 30? 40? Hahaha!” The robust young man laughed out loud as he pointed at the Bai Lianhua and the others. “Both choices will require us to participate in the ranking match, you shameless bastard!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1453 Faction War 1453 Faction War ‘Although I don’t want to admit it, he’s right. Because of my stubbornness, our faction has been declining for the past several months, and our overall morale has dipped. The others say that everything is fine, but they’re probably doubting my ability to continue leading Eternal Lotuses effectively…’ Bai Lianhua sighed inwardly as she pondered her own faults. ‘I have already managed to bring my faction to the top 10 of the world through my own efforts. I wanted to reach first place, but there’s only so much a single person to do, especially considering the current world’s circumstances…’

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1454 Participating in a Faction War 1454 Participating in a Faction War “Really? Are you really going to start participating in Faction Wars, Brother Yuan?!” Yu Rou exclaimed excitedly. He nodded, “Yes, it seems fun.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1455 Fiery Locust Swarm 1455 Fiery Locust Swarm “Surely, they are not going to give up the chance to defeat the famous Demon Sealing Faction, right? After all, we’re only twelve people.” Yuan chuckled through the phone, leaving Chairman Lee utterly speechless. “Are you seriously going to challenge the Fiery Locust Swarm to a Faction War? You might have to go against hundreds if not thousands of them with just twelve of you.” Chairman Lee asked, his voice filled with disbelief.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1456 Demon Sealing Faction’s Challenge Request ?1456 Demon Sealing Faction’s Challenge Request When Chairman Lee heard Yuan planned on donating some techniques to the Cultivators’ Association, he immediately jumped up and down in excitement. After all, anything that came from Player Yuan was definitely very precious and significant. “Also, if you don’t mind, can you spread the news about the Demon Sealing Faction challenging the Fiery Locust Swarm? If everyone is aware of it, it might be harder for them to reject our challenge,” Yuan suddenly suggested.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1457 Fiery Locust Swarm’s Response ?1457 Fiery Locust Swarm’s Response “M-Miss Walker! There’s been an emergency!” A servant urgently knocked on Fiery Queen’s bedroom door. The door opened a few moments later, and Fiery Queen stepped out of the room in her pajamas.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1458 In Three Days 1458 In Three Days Although Chairman Lee could’ve scheduled the Demon Sealing Faction’s Faction War the next day, he wanted to give everyone a chance to prepare, so he scheduled the match to begin in three days. After pushing back a month’s worth of scheduled Faction Wars, Chairman Lee confirmed the match schedule and called Yuan to notify him of the news.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1459 Training With Eternal Lotuses 1459 Training With Eternal Lotuses After the announcement, members of the Eternal Lotuses started going onto the stage to spar with Yuan. “You are free to use any martial technique you want, and don’t hold back,” Yuan said to the short young lady standing a few meters in front of him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: «You have passed the 1st floor. Please ascend to the next floor within 10 seconds or you will automatically fail the trial.» "What? That was easy…" Yuan mumbled to himself in a surprised tone when he defeated the monster with such ease. "Well, this is the first floor, after all…" A few seconds later, Yuan ascended to the next floor by walking up the staircase not far away from him. However, he didn't immediately reach the 2nd floor and entered the resting area that was between the first and second floor instead.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1460 Sparring With Bai Lianhua 1460 Sparring With Bai Lianhua “Whenever you are ready,” Yuan said as he casually stood on the stage with a calm smile on his face. Bai Lianhua readied her sword and took a deep breath before dashing at Yuan at full speed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1461 The Great Battlefield 1461 The Great Battlefield “Don’t look down on her because she cannot fight one-on- one, Brother Yuan! She’s an excellent supporter and an even better fighter when it comes to fighting in groups!” Yu Rou suddenly said. “Her buffs are amazing, and her zither arts allow her to fight multiple people at once! She’s the perfect supporter!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1462 Fewer Than Anticipated 1462 Fewer Than Anticipated After leaving the airport, Yuan and the others ventured to the food court, a bustling hub housing over a hundred restaurants offering diverse cuisines from around the world. However, before they left the airport, Yuan handed everyone there an appearance-altering pill to hide their identity, as Yuan had learned his lesson several days ago and didn’t want to be recognized.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1463 Faction War Rules 1463 Faction War Rules As Yuan and the others approached Arena One, they were met with the sight of a sea of people clamoring to enter the arena. “Heavens, there are a lot more people today than usual. There are probably millions of people in line,” Yu Rou muttered in a dazed voice when she saw the crowded scene.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1464 A Reliable Method 1464 A Reliable Method “Performance-enhancing drugs, huh? Do you think the Fiery Locust Swarm would stoop that low during our match when they already significantly outnumber us?” Wang Bingbing asked. “I wouldn’t put it past them since they are heavily connected with Fiery Queen, who loves to play dirty.” Bai Lianhua shrugged.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1465 Technique Evaluation 1465 Technique Evaluation “Okay, the formation is completed and activated,” Yuan announced after regaining control over his body. Chairman Lee and everyone else in the room started looking around, but they were unable to sense anything different in the room.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1466 Technique Evaluation(2) 1466 Technique Evaluation(2) Once Wang Bingbing entered the training room, the door closed behind her. The interior of the room was extremely simple and empty. Other than a metallic human-shaped dummy standing in the middle of the room, there was nothing else.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1467 Entering the Battlefield 1467 Entering the Battlefield Outside the evaluation room, Wu Zao asked the others, “How did your evaluations go?” “How? It was much simpler than I’d anticipated. As for whether it’s reliable or not… I don’t know.” Wang Bingbing shrugged.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1468 Outnumbered 10,000 to 1 1468 Outnumbered 10,000 to 1 “The enemy has exactly 41,982 players… 41,983 if you count their ruler. This means they outnumber us 10,000 to 1,” Yuan said to the others. “Nearly forty-two thousand, huh? This is going to be rough even for us.” Shi Lang wiped the invisible sweat off his forehead.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1469 Exposing the Cheaters 1469 Exposing the Cheaters The moment Yuan activated the formation, several people on the battlefield suddenly started lighting up like a Christmas tree, their bodies glowing bright red. “W-what the fuck is happening to me?!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After reaching the 21st floor, the difficulty adjusted once again. «Congratulations on reaching a total of 20 floors. The difficulty has been adjusted.» «Magical Beasts will now have 'Weak Physical Damage Resistance'» «Magical Beasts will have their power, speed, and defenses increased slightly»

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1470 Demon Sealing Faction’s Prowess 1470 Demon Sealing Faction’s Prowess “Amazing! With swift movements, Player Shi Lang has managed to defeat a hundred players all by himself without getting hit once!” Yan Xiaoxiao exclaimed in excitement. Di! Di! Di!

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1471 Demon Sealing Faction’s Prowess(2) 1471 Demon Sealing Faction’s Prowess(2) “Embraced by Heaven’s Breath!” With a casual wave of his sleeves and fan, Wu Zao conjured a gust of wind infused with spiritual energy, which he directed towards the group of players charging towards him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1472 An Endless Battle 1472 An Endless Battle “Oh my! It looks like the Fiery Locust Swarm has had enough and decided to end this once and for all! Although the Demon Sealing Faction has done an excellent job repelling their enemy so far, how are they going to react to the Fiery Locust Swarm’s full aggression?!” Yan Xiaoxiao’s voice trembled from excitement. “Hahaha! It’s over for the Demon Sealing Faction! There’s no way they can defend against this with just four people!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1473 A Single Move 1473 A Single Move After Yuan spoke with Wang Bingbing and the others through divine sense, he pulled his finger across the zither on his lap, creating a powerful ripple that swept throughout the entire battlefield. The ripple traversed at the speed of sound, reaching Wang Bingbing and the others in just a few seconds.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1474 Unparalleled Dominance 1474 Unparalleled Dominance After witnessing Yuan’s overwhelming prowess, the Fiery Locust Swarm players subconsciously started taking steps backward, almost as though they were unwilling to confront him. Seeing this, Xu Boqin angrily roared at them, “What the fuck are you guys doing?! He must’ve consumed most, if not all, of his energy with that one attack just now! There is nothing to fear! We still overwhelmingly outnumber him!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1475 End of the Faction War 1475 End of the Faction War Seeing how nobody dared to approach him, Yuan approached them himself. “T-that fucking monster! How does he still have the energy to do that kind of stuff?!” the players who were swatted like flies all spat out some blood after spending a few moments on the ground groaning in pain.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1476 Post-match Speech 1476 Post-match Speech “L-looks like we have a winner! Against all odds, the Demon Sealing Faction has managed to defeat the Fiery Locust Swarm and emerged victorious in this Faction War!” Yan Xiaoxiao announced in excitement. “Let’s all give a round of applause to the Demon Sealing Faction for their outstanding performance and the Fiery Locust Swarm for their effort!!” However, instead of celebrating, the majority of the audience was crying and cursing out loud, as they had bet a lot of money on the Fiery Locust Swarm’s victory.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1477 Fiery Garden of Hell 1477 Fiery Garden of Hell “Did I hear him correctly? He wants to challenge the Fiery Garden of Hell next? They are ranked 5th in the world with over 500,000 members!” “He can’t be serious, right? Even if he’s a little excited about defeating the Fiery Locust Swarm, this is a little too much…”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1478 Heaven’s Protection Grand Array 1478 Heaven’s Protection Grand Array “This formation is officially known as the Heaven’s Protection Grand Array. It’s a level 6 formation that prevents any death and serious injuries as long as one remains within the formation and someone doesn’t significantly exceed the strength of its creator.” Yuan explained to the people in the room. “For example, I can slice your throat with a sword or stab your eyes with a dagger, and you’ll be perfectly fine as long as you stay within the formation. However, you’d still experience the sensation of pain as if the injury were genuine. Of course, if you’re worried about that, I can also create a formation that can alter the amount of pain you experience.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1479 Alliance With Eternal Lotuses 1479 Alliance With Eternal Lotuses “Chairman Lee, who was that person? I doubt that was his real appearance.” One of the people in the room suddenly inquired when he returned. “Are you really asking me about his identity when he clearly wants to keep it hidden for whatever reason?” Chairman Lee’s piercing gaze met the person who had just spoken, his displeasure etched on his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Once all of the disciples left the scene with the sect elders remaining, Long Yijun turned to look at the low-ranking sect elders and shouted, "This includes the sect elders! Or are you trying to tell me that you're not disciples?!" The sect elders there immediately began sweating and ran away in a hurry, silently wondering to themselves why they couldn't be there as well. "What the heck? We're sect elders, right? Why can't we be there as well?" One of them asked after they were all very far away from the Carp Leaping Over Dragon's Gate Tower. "Why are you asking us? Do we look like the Sect Master to you?" Another one said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1480 Nine Divine Supremes ﻿1480 Nine Divine Supremes When they returned to the Dragon Spiral Mountain, Yuan went to see the Lord’s condition while everyone else went back to the mansion. Upon seeing the Lord, Yuan was relieved to notice a significant improvement in his condition. The Lord’s eyes shone with renewed clarity, his red fur now vibrant with life.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1481 Tantrum 1481 Tantrum 'Immortal Monarch? Who is that?' Yu Ning raised her eyebrows in a puzzled manner, as she'd never heard of this individual before. Since the Immortal Monarch came into existence way after the Heavenly War of Immortals and Gods, there was simply no way for those within the Shadow Realm to know of him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1482 Powerful Presences 1482 Powerful Presences Upon returning home, Yuan was greeted by Meifeng at the door, who said, "The others have come out of Cultivation Online and are waiting for you in the dining room." "Okay."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1483 Flashbacks 1483 Flashbacks “Then I’ll activate the formation now.” Yuan closed his eyes and took a deep breath.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1484 Jin Xi’s Influence 1484 Jin Xi’s Influence Shortly after Yuan and Li Jinxi began sparring with each other in the training grounds, Yan Xiaoxiao arrived at the Dragon Spiral Mountain’s entrance gate. She approached the gate with an excited smile on her face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1485 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview 1485 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview Sometime after Yuan ended his sparring session with Li Jinxi, he approached Yan Xiaoxiao, who was trembling from excitement. “It’s an honor to meet you finally, Player Yuan!” Yan Xiaoxiao loudly declared.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1486 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview(2) 1486 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview(2) “Miss Meifeng, what do you typically do on a daily basis?” Yan Xiaoxiao asked as Meifeng cleaned the dishes. “I have two primary roles in the Demon Sealing Faction. First and foremost, I am a maid, so I deal with all the chores first. My second role is being the manager of the faction, so I am responsible for any requests or inquiries sent to the faction.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Follow current novels on freewe(b)novel.c(o)m Chapter 1487 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview(3) 1487 Yan Xiaoxiao’s Interview(3) “I heard from Shi Lang that your reason for joining the Demon Sealing Faction was because Yuan needed 10 members to create the faction, but what is keeping you here?” Yan Xiaoxiao asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: The most uptodate noves are published on fr(e)webnov(e)l.com Chapter 1488 Sudden Visit ?1488 Sudden Visit After her interview with Wang Ming, Yan Xiaoxiao took a break and ate lunch with the Demon Sealing Faction.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1489 Chu Family’s Downfall 1489 Chu Family’s Downfall “I doubt this is a coincidence,” Yuan said after seeing Sebastian waiting by the gate. “Oh, I called him right before leaving so they know we’re visiting,” Chu Liuxiang quickly explained. “Should I not have done that?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Look! Disciple Yuan has passed the 99th stage! He's going to challenge the final floor now!" Bai Ling pointed at the tower and shouted in excitement despite the other people there already realizing this because they have been watching the tower this entire time. "What kind of challenge do you think exists on the final floor?" Elder Shan asked out loud. "Who knows, I have only reached the 83rd floor myself…" Xin Ming shrugged. "The Sect Master also only reached the 92nd floor."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1490 Chu Shijian 1490 Chu Shijian Seeing Chu Shijian’s state, Chu Liuxiang subconsciously turned to look at Yuan with a weird expression that seemed to ask if destroying his Dantian had caused this. Chu Shijian saw right through Chu Liuxiang’s worry and said, “This has nothing to do with him destroying my Dantian. I was living healthy until recently—around the time Cultivation Online had its system update.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1491 Basilisk’s Tear 1491 Basilisk’s Tear Seeing Chu Shijian’s doubtful face, Yuan nodded, “Yes, it’s possible. There are spiritual medicines and elixirs that can heal destroyed Dantians. They’re a little rare, but they definitely exist.” “If you can restore my cultivation, I will forever be grateful! I am ready to take responsibility and pay for the treasure!” Chu Shijian hastily said, his voice filled with a newfound determination.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1492 Spirit Healing Academy ?1492 Spirit Healing Academy Once the room and device were prepared, Wang Xiuying lay on the bed with Yuan sitting beside her. “I will watch over you until you return,” he said with a calm smile.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1493 Antidote 1493 Antidote “Here are the ingredients you have requested, Healer Wang.” The worker placed the ingredients on the table before them.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1494 Curing Chu Shijian 1494 Curing Chu Shijian Wang Xiuying handed the antidote to Chu Liuxiang and said, “I’ll give you the honor.” “Thank you…”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1495 There’s Still Hope 1495 There’s Still Hope ‘Yuan has a lover? This is huge news—probably the biggest one in this entire interview!’ Yan Xiaoxiao cried inwardly, and she couldn’t help but feel pity for the countless maidens who had fallen in love with Yuan. “H-how long have you been together for?” Yan Xiaoxiao continued to inquire.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1496 The Culprit 1496 The Culprit Hearing Chu Shijian’s question, Wang Xiuying pondered for a minute before responding, “There are several ways to apply Basilisk’s Tear. The easiest method is to mix it with liquid and feed it to someone, but since it has a distinct bitter taste, the best approach is to mix it with something sweet. It can also be injected into solid food.” “Something sweet…?” Chu Shijian began trying to recall the last time he had something sweet.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1497 Chu Wuyang 1497 Chu Wuyang ‘Fuck! Fuck! Fuck! Why is this happening?! What went wrong?! I did everything perfectly!’ Chu Wuyang cried inwardly after realizing that his plan to assassinate Chu Shijian had failed. He shifted his gaze from Chu Shijian to Chu Liuxiang before stopping at Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1498 Magic Talisman 1498 Magic Talisman “Shut up… SHUT THE FUCK UP!” Chu Wuyang roared, his Spirit Lord aura exploding around him. However, due to the formation, he could only exert the strength of a peak Spirit Grandmaster. 𝚏rewe𝚘vel.𝚌𝚘m “What do you think you’re trying to do?!” Chu Shijian shouted.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1499 Businesses in Cultivation Online 1499 Businesses in Cultivation Online “Our business in Cultivation Online? It’s nothing special—just your typical operation with the usual groups.” Chu Shijian said. He continued, “As you probably already know, Cultivation Online is heavily incorporated into our economy now. Nowadays, it’s fine even if you have no money in the real world. As long as you have money in Cultivation Online, you’re essentially successful even in the real world.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "That building over there is the cafeteria for Outer Court disciples like me. The Inner Court disciples eat at a separate building." Mo Zhou explained as he guided Yuan around the Flying Sword Sect. "Un. Un." Yuan nodded his head in excitement. "Do you see that open area over there? That is where disciples go for lectures from Sect Elders once a week." "That tall building is where disciples train to sharpen their sword techniques," said Mo Zhou as he pointed to the pagoda that was in the distance.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "24 hours of rest time and unlimited time to defeat 100,000 magical beasts…" Yuan pondered with a frown on his face. Since he can pause the challenge whenever he wants, it wouldn't affect his time in the real world unlike the Tablet of Comprehension. However, it will still take a very long time for him to kill 100,000 magical beasts, perhaps even days. "What do I get for completing this challenge? Since you changed the original trial, I should get something in return, right?" Yuan asked the Great One. "If you manage to pass this trial of mine, I shall grant you the key to the treasure room in the Dragon Temple. Since you have the Seal of Approval, I'm sure you intend on going to the Dragon Temple anyway in the future to try and obtain my Legacy. Inside the treasure room, you'll find a few things that I'd left behind before I ascended from this world and traveled to the upper heavens, and while there may not be much inside, each treasure will surely assist you in your cultivation path i

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1500 Yuan’s Interview 1500 Yuan’s Interview “What is your cultivation currently at in Cultivation Online?”Yan Xiaoxiao asked Yuan as they walked through the hallways. “Ninth level Spirit King,” he calmly responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1501 Yuan’s Room 1501 Yuan’s Room 𝐟r𝚠eno𝘃𝐥.c𝗼m When Wu Zao noticed the weird expression on Yan Xiaoxiao’s face, he smiled and said, “Even though we know we won’t ever win, we still benefit a lot from our losses because he doesn’t just spar with us. He trains us at the same time. You should give it a try later.” “You want me to spar with Yuan?” Yan Xiaoxiao wore a look of disbelief on her pretty face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1502 End of the Interview 1502 End of the Interview “I’m done,” Yuan called out to Yan Xiaoxiao, startling her, who was absorbed with her new collection. “Eh?! Ah! Right!” Yan Xiaoxiao hastily stowed away her personal camera and retrieved the one used for the interview.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1503 Xiu Mei ?1503 Xiu Mei Seeing Meixiu’s beautiful face lying right next to him, Yuan pondered if he should tell her about her incarnation as Xiu Mei —that they’d been together in their previous lives.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1504 Leaving the Shadow Realm 1504 Leaving the Shadow Realm After returning to the Shadow Realm, Yuan summoned his Soul Weapons and asked the immortals, “Do you know the way out of here? Last time, I was teleported out of here by the Great One. I doubt he’d be willing to do it again since I refused to be his disciple.” “Huh? The Great One wanted you to be his disciple?” Yu Ning’s voice was filled with a profound, almost incredulous, shock.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1505 Sword Spirit 1505 Sword Spirit After leaving the Shadow Realm, Yuan didn’t stop to see where he’d exited and continued speeding forward. He wasn’t sure if the sword spirit could leave the Giant’s Sword or how far he had to travel before her attacks could no longer reach him, so he could only pray for the best. The moment he returned to the Vanishing Valley, he could immediately sense the sword spirit’s gaze on him, sending chills throughout his entire being.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1506 Three Major Paths 1506 Three Major Paths “Have you heard? The Sword Saint, Ju Mingye, met his demise when his weapon shattered mid-battle against the Spear Devil, Lei Zhen.” Yuan could hear the people around him mumbling as he casually enjoyed his food in a noodle shop.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1507 Tian Qiyuan 1507 Tian Qiyuan In an auction house somewhere in Eighth Heaven, a tall figure wearing a fiery red mask approached one of the workers there and said, “I have a weapon that I would like to sell here.” Without turning his head, the worker glanced at this figure and gave him a quick assessment. The figure, shrouded in a ragged cloak that seemed to have been scorched by fire, stood there with an air of mystery. His cultivation, a mere Golden Immortal, didn’t seem to match the unique aura that emanated from him, leaving the worker perplexed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1508 Violet Dream 1508 Violet Dream “Look over there! That’s the Heaven and Earth Blacksmith!” “The Eternal Blacksmith is here, as well!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1509 Sword Goddess 1509 Sword Goddess “Who won the auction?” Tian Qiyuan asked after storing away the money. “That would be the Sword Goddess of the Unrivaled Nine Swords Sect,” said Qing Ling’er.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After slaying over 50,000 magical beasts with the Empyrean Overlord, Yuan received an unexpected notification. «Congratulations! Your Soul Weapon Empyrean Overlord has absorbed enough lifeforce and leveled up!» «Your Empyrean Overlord has unlocked a new unique ability!» «Empyrean Overlord»

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1510 A Dangerous Obsession 1510 A Dangerous Obsession Since Tian Qiyuan has never been to the Supreme Heaven, Zi Xuan arranged for their meeting somewhere in the Eighth Heaven. Upon arriving at their designated meeting spot, Tian Qiyuan looked around with his divine sense but couldn’t see any buildings or Zi Xuan’s presence in a thousand-mile radius. Even weirder, he was in the middle of nowhere.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1511 Zi Xuan 1511 Zi Xuan Upon Tian Qiyuan’s request to learn more about her, Zi Xuan did not hesitate to reveal everything about herself to him, including personal information that one usually wouldn’t reveal even to their loved ones. “I enjoy reading scriptures every now and then, and my hobby is collecting swords. I haven’t eaten anything in the last hundred years, but if I were to eat something right now, it would be a spicy dish.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1512 Unrivaled Sword Art 1512 Unrivaled Sword Art “You weren’t certain I was the real deal? What if I had been an imposter?” Tian Qiyuan asked her out of curiosity. Hearing this question, Zi Xuan’s expression darkened, looking incredibly grim, and she responded in a chilling voice, “If you had dared to impersonate the Exalted Blacksmith, then I would’ve tortured you until the end of time.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1513 Exalted Blacksmith’s Store 1513 Exalted Blacksmith’s Store “You… what the hell are you?” Zi Xuan stared at Tian Qiyuan with her eyes as wide as saucers. It’d taken her thousands of years to master the Unrivaled Sword Arts. Yet, it only took a glance for Tian Qiyuan to master the sword technique completely. She has never heard of anything like this before, much less witnessing it with her own eyes. “Are you secretly a disciple of our Unrivaled Nine Swords Sect?” she asked with a suspicious look on her face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1514 The Pinnacle of Swords 1514 The Pinnacle of Swords Before people arrived at his store, Tian Qiyuan created a large sign that read, “Those who have my desired materials may enter the store immediately. Those who do not have priority must wait outside until their number is called.” “There are jade slips with numbers on it beside this sign. Take the number in the front and wait for your turn. I will have at most 10 customers at a time, excluding those with priority and with my desired materials.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1515 Tian Qiyuan’s World 1515 Tian Qiyuan’s World As a sword enthusiast, the mere mention of Tian Qiyuan’s plan to craft the pinnacle of swords sent a thrill through Zi Xuan, igniting a spark of excitement in her. The fact that she was essentially giving him the resources to craft the weapon made it seem like she contributed to the creation of the sword.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1516 Vulgar Presence 1516 Vulgar Presence “You’re… much more handsome than I expected,” Zi Xuan muttered in a dazed voice as she stared at Tian Qiyuan’s handsome face. She had braced herself in case Tian Qiyuan had an ugly face because he always wore a mask. Even though he claimed that it was because he didn’t want to be recognized in public, there was no way to really tell if he was being truthful. However, after seeing his handsome facial features, Zi Xuan no longer doubted his claims of wanting to remain anonymous.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1517 Feng Feng 1517 Feng Feng ‘Not only did you disturb my slumber, you even dared to dirty his room with your filthy bodily fluid! I should turn you into roasted meat!’ The phoenix continued, even threatening to kill her. Zi Xuan eventually snapped out of her daze and gritted her teeth before responding, ‘As if a beast would understand human love! Once we become lovers, I will dirty his room with my bodily fluid every day!’

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1518 Exalted Blacksmith Fanatic 1518 Exalted Blacksmith Fanatic After Zi Xuan left Tian Qiyuan’s world, she returned to her sect with her new sword, which she named Heaven’s Intoxication due to how every sword crafted by Tian Qiyuan inevitably makes her feel heated and dazed, almost as though she was intoxicated. The first thing she did when she returned to the Unrivaled Nine Swords Sect was to test the sword on someone, so she challenged another Unrivaled Sword to a match.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1519 Divine Blacksmith 1519 Divine Blacksmith “E-Exalted Blacksmith Fanatic? Are you suggesting a connection between me and that enigmatic figure? What led you to such a conclusion?” Zi Xuan swiftly retorted, her innocence a well-crafted facade. “So you’re not the Exalted Blacksmith Fanatic? How did you acquire that material, then? I can remember and identify any material I’ve seen once, and that piece of Cold Stellar Iron was stolen from Gu Guming a few years ago.” Tian Qiyuan spoke in a calm voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "The zither, huh?" Yu Rou mumbled after hearing about this instrument from Yuan, and she said a moment later, "People used to play those instruments in the ancient times if I remember correctly, but it's rarely played today." "What? Why did people stop playing them? It's such a wonderful instrument that can invoke one's inner feelings with a single note!" Yuan asked in a surprised voice, as he couldn't understand why people suddenly stopped playing the zither. "I'm not too sure either, but I can look it up online if you want." Yu Rou said to him. "Okay."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1520 Advancing Grades 1520 Advancing Grades After the auction ended, Tian Qiyuan had a quick meeting with the ancestor of the Holy Sword Monastery, a powerhouse that rivals the Unrivaled Nine Sword Sect and may even surpass it slightly. The ancestor was a handsome young man with cultivation at the 8th level of the God Ascension Realm. Despite his young appearance, his eyes were filled with ancient wisdom acquired over hundreds of thousands of years.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1521 Success Rate 1521 Success Rate “So… when do you think you’ll start crafting Celestial-grade treasures?” Zi Xuan asked Tian Qiyuan shortly after putting away her sword. “You’re asking me that when I just achieved Empyrean-grade not long ago? It’ll probably take me thousands of years before I can achieve Celestial-grade.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1522 Void Meteoroid Core 1522 Void Meteoroid Core The Void Meteoroid Core is an extremely rare and sought- after material that Tian Qiyuan planned to use as one of the cores for his masterpiece. As its name implies, it originates from the Void Meteoroid, an indestructible rock that traverses the starry sky. Since it is indestructible, the only way to access the core, its most valuable part, is to wait for it to break down naturally until only its core remains.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1523 Hidden Strength 1523 Hidden Strength After the warning, Tian Qiyuan began counting down from ten. “Ten!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1524 Smithing Competition 1524 Smithing Competition “I’m glad you both agree. Let’s do something that won’t take too long and is fair across the board.” Tian Qiyuan said. He continued, “Before I give my suggestion, let me hear yours first.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1525 Uncle Chen’s Weapon Store 1525 Uncle Chen’s Weapon Store Heaven and Earth Blacksmith stepped forward and began introducing himself once Eternal Blacksmith ended his introduction. Not wanting to fall behind Eternal Blacksmith, Heaven and Earth Blacksmith also talked about his personal achievements that were never made public. He also spoke of his childhood, where he trained to become the blacksmith he is today and many more. In the end, his introduction lasted three full hours.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1526 Divine Blacksmith Competition 1526 Divine Blacksmith Competition “Let the competition for the Void Meteoroid Core begin!” Zi Xuan declared shortly after the three Divine Blacksmiths arrived at their workstations. When the competition began, the three Divine Blacksmiths used their divine sense to check the materials. Each of them brought their own material, and none of them knew what the other would bring until the day of the competition. This made it so they couldn’t spend half a year preparing for the competition.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1527 Half the Materials 1527 Half the Materials As Eternal Blacksmith and Heaven and Earth Blacksmith neared the completion of their Mystic-grade treasure several weeks later, Tian Qiyuan opened his eyes and emerged from his meditation once again. He quickly gathered the materials and started creating his Mystic-grade treasure. Once he refined the materials and began forming its shape, it was clear that he intended to create a sword.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1528 A Special Sword 1528 A Special Sword “I admit defeat. I never even considered crafting two Empyrean-grade treasures.” Eternal Blacksmith declared shortly after he stopped working. “It’s also my defeat. Congratulations, Exalted Blacksmith. You’re the winner of this competition.” Heaven and Earth Blacksmith said afterward.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1529 Divine Blacksmith Gathering 1529 Divine Blacksmith Gathering After spending several days in each other’s arms, Zi Xuan, her voice filled with curiosity, asked him while she rested on the bed, “How close are you to crafting your first Celestial-grade treasure?” “I think I can start working on my first one in a few years,” he confidently responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Perfect concealment, huh? Let's try it." Yuan then activated Perfect Concealment for the Starry Abyss, and just like the unique ability's description, the Starry Abyss suddenly became invisible with its presence and aura completely concealed. However, in Yuan's eyes, the Starry Abyss was not completely invisible, as he could still sense his own spiritual energy around the Starry Abyss. With that being said, for the magical beasts and even the Great One, it felt like the Starry Abyss had suddenly disappeared from this world, almost like it ceased to exist.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1530 God of Creation Ceremony 1530 God of Creation Ceremony “Exalted Blacksmith, huh? You’re all that I’ve been hearing about lately. It’s nice to meet you finally.” Star Forging Blacksmith stood up and extended his arms to bow respectfully. “There’s no need to call us Seniors when you’re already above us in terms of skills.” Relentless Blacksmith said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1531 God of Creation’s Ceremony(2) 1531 God of Creation’s Ceremony(2) In order to complete the God of Creation Ceremony and become the next God of Creation, one must not only successfully 25 Celestial-grade treasures within 100 attempts but also craft 5 different types of weapons, so Heaven and Earth Blacksmith could not just craft his specialties. For his first treasure, Heaven and Earth Blacksmith went for gauntlets, which he succeeded after spending almost two years on it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1532 The New God of Creation 1532 The New God of Creation “What do you think of Eternal Blacksmith’s declaration?” Zi Xuan asked Tian Qiyuan out of curiosity. “It would be amazing if he actually achieves such a feat,” he calmly responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1533 Ancient Anvil Association 1533 Ancient Anvil Association “Have you heard? Exalted Blacksmith has returned and announced that he would be doing the God of Creation Ceremony!” “No way! The one who disappeared from the world after Eternal Blacksmith became the God of Creation nine thousand years ago?! When is he going to do the God of Creation Ceremony!?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1534 Exalted Blacksmith’s Ceremony 1534 Exalted Blacksmith’s Ceremony “Disagreement? What kind?” Zi Xuan asked, her curiosity piqued. “I’m glad you asked.” Tian Qiyuan said, seemingly eager to expose the Ancient Anvil Association.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1535 Fraud 1535 Fraud A full year had passed since Tian Qiyuan began his God of Creation Ceremony, and he had crafted 10 Celestial-grade treasures within 10 attempts, meaning he hadn’t failed once since he started. More and more people became skeptical and doubted his legitimacy. Yet, no one could figure out his methods, and continued to watch in amazement as Tian Qiyuan showcased his unfathomable prowess.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1536 Crafting the Masterpiece 1536 Crafting the Masterpiece “Hold onto your anvils, folks! I’ve got a shocking revelation for you! The Exalted Blacksmith has been unmasked as a fraud! Don’t miss this breaking news!” A streetwise informant bellowed, drawing a throng of curious onlookers. “What? Exalted Blacksmith is a fraud? How is that possible?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1537 Gone Rogue 1537 Gone Rogue “How are you not aware of her situation? It caused quite the scene around the world when it happened. Are you really her friend?” The disciple doubted Tian Qiyuan being Zi Xuan’s friend. “I was in seclusion for a long time and only recently emerged, so I am still unaware of many things. If you enlighten me, I’ll make it worth your time.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1538 Pinnacle of Treasures 1538 Pinnacle of Treasures “A mysterious man carrying around a sword of unfathomable quality that is described as the pinnacle of treasures by those who witnessed it, huh?” God of Creation muttered to himself after hearing the recent rumors. As a blacksmith, he was more interested in the sword than the individual with it. Eventually, he could no longer contain his curiosity and began a journey to find the mysterious man with the so-called pinnacle of treasures.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1539 Exalted Blacksmith’s Return 1539 Exalted Blacksmith’s Return “Excuse me, can you tell us your name?” One of the blacksmiths surrounding Tian Qiyuan, like a group of hungry pigeons, suddenly asked him. Tian Qiyuan looked at the man who just spoke and calmly responded, “Tian Qiyuan.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Inside the tower, Yuan was bombarded with notifications after completing the challenge by defeating 100,000 magical beasts. «Congratulations! You have passed the 100th floor of 'Carp Leaping Over Dragon's Gate' in Dragon difficulty, clearing the trial!» «Congratulations! You have completed the hidden quest 'Dragon Trial'!» «You have obtained the title 'Dragon Warrior'»

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1540 Unparalleled Speed 1540 Unparalleled Speed News of Tian Qiyuan’s return and his upcoming match with the God of Creation spread through the Nine Heavens like wildfire, igniting curiosity and excitement among cultivators and blacksmiths alike. “What? The Exalted Blacksmith has returned? What happened to him being a fraud?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1541 Defeating the God of Creation 1541 Defeating the God of Creation “Y-you’re done with the ceremony…? That’s impossible! It’s only been several days since we started!” God of Creation didn’t even have to look at Tian Qiyuan’s workstation to know that he was farting. Tian Qiyuan’s expression remained calm as he spoke, “You really don’t learn, do you? If you don’t believe me, take a look for yourself.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1542 Empyrean Overlord’s True Name 1542 Empyrean Overlord’s True Name “What’s your plan now?” Tian Qiyuan asked Zi Xuan sometime later. “I don’t know yet, but I’ll let you know once I think of something. In the meantime, let me see your sword. I’ve been dying to take a look at it ever since I heard about it.” Zi Xuan said, her voice filled with enthusiasm.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1543 Number One Under Heaven 1543 Number One Under Heaven “So you’ve remembered everything, huh?” Zi Xuan pointed her finger at him in a threatening manner. “Not literally everything as Tian Qiyuan, but I remember how we met, about the God of Creation Ceremony, about being slandered and clearing my name, and how you became the spirit of Number One Under Heaven.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1544 Zi Xuan’s Stash 1544 Zi Xuan’s Stash “Now then… Zi Xuan, let’s talk about your situation. Why are you staying in the Vanishing Valley, possessing that Giant’s Sword?” Yuan turned his focus to Zi Xuan now that Yu Ning’s issue was resolved. “Good question. Unfortunately, I do not know. Or, more precisely, I don’t remember. When I woke up, I found myself already inside the Vanishing Valley, and not wanting my soul to degrade, I had to possess a treasure, and this Giant’s Sword happened to be nearby.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1545 Leaving Vanishing Valley 1545 Leaving Vanishing Valley Ding! <You have achieved an impossible feat by defeating a Magical Beast that was at least nine realms above you!>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1546 Returning to the Third Heaven 1546 Returning to the Third Heaven After leaving Vanishing Valley, Zi Xuan asked him, “What do you plan on doing now?” “I’m going to descend to the Third Heaven for a while.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1547 Tian Yingzhe 1547 Tian Yingzhe “I understand your immense talent and prowess, and I’ve witnessed the full force of your attacks. But, my dear little friend, these Immortals are not like anything you’ve encountered. They are a force beyond your wildest imagination, and they won’t simply stand there to be defeated. I implore you to reconsider your decision.” Senior Bai’s words carried a weight of urgency, hoping to sway Yuan’s determination. “Don’t worry, Senior Bai. I’ve grown a lot stronger since my visit to the Vanishing Valley. I am also not as reckless as you think. If I deem the opponent too dangerous, I’ll run away.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1548 Messing With the Qin Family 1548 Messing With the Qin Family After acquiring the techniques, they left the Myriad of Techniques. However, even after successfully leaving the store with the techniques, Bai Lianhua couldn’t believe that she’d managed to acquire so many powerful techniques for free. Even if she had her family’s full backing, it would still be difficult for them to purchase this many rare and valuable techniques without severely damaging their finances. Yet, she was able to acquire them for free because of Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1549 Messing With the Qin Family(2) 1549 Messing With the Qin Family(2) Several hours have passed since Yuan started messing with the Qin Family’s strongest hunting group. They figured he would eventually run out of energy and mess up, but Yuan continued stealing their kills with seemingly no effort at all. “Fuck! I’ve had enough! Get out here and face us like a man, you fucking coward!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Once Yuan took a seat, Elder Xuan continued to speak, "Because of your performance at the Carp Leaping Over Dragon's Gate Tower, it has caught the attention of many, and experts from the other elite sects are currently approaching the Dragon Essence Sect even as we speak." "Is that so…" Yuan mumbled in a calm voice, clearly still unable to grasp the situation at hand. Elder Xuan shook his head and sighed, "I know you probably don't understand the dangerous situation you're in right now, so I'll explain it to you again." "Do you remember what we told you about remaining lowkey until the Mystic Realm? If you're too talented, people will become jealous, and they will do everything in their power to destroy you so that you won't become a threat in the future. However, at the Mystic Realm, if you can attract the attention of the people managing the event, they will be able to protect you, and you might even be able to ascend to the next realm— Spirit Heavens!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1550 Messing With the Qin Family(3) 1550 Messing With the Qin Family(3) “So the Chu Family is involved in this, huh? But how did they acquire information on all of our monster-hunting teams?” Qin Mulan pondered out loud. “I’d wager one of our own teams betrayed us, providing the Chu Family with the information they needed. But for them to resort to hiring a Spirit King, they must be quite desperate.” Qin Long said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1551 Qin Long 1551 Qin Long After he met with his father, Qin Long immediately went to his family’s medicine store to wait for Yuan. “Welcome, Young Master Qin. Are you looking for some medicine today?” The workers there greeted Qin Long.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1552 Vengeful Slaughtering Formation 1552 Vengeful Slaughtering Formation After Yuan killed him for the third time, Qin Long had to wait 24 hours before respawning. When an avatar is killed, it requires time to be reconstructed. While in this state, the player’s consciousness will be transported to a black room with a countdown.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1553 Purple Sea 1553 Purple Sea After his death, Qin Long immediately logged off Cultivation Online and tried to cultivate. He sighed in relief after realizing that he could still cultivate properly. Even though the chances of becoming a cripple were only one percent, it was enough to stress any player out, much less someone like Qin Long.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1554 Pavilion of Knowledge 1554 Pavilion of Knowledge “How did that young man do that? Divine sense shouldn’t work in the Purple Sea…” The fishermen were shocked by what Yuan had done. The Purple Sea had a special property that blocked all divine sense from peeking underneath the water’s surface, hence why nobody there could repeat what Yuan did despite being cultivators themselves.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1555 Pavilion of Knowledge(2) 1555 Pavilion of Knowledge(2) “Young Master, on behalf of the Xuan Family, thank you for helping the Xi Family.” Xuan Kun respectfully lowered his head at Yuan. “Don’t even mention it. I only did what was natural.” Yuan smiled.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1556 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch 1556 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch “This is the room where we keep all of the Immortal Monarch’s information. We call this room the ‘Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch,'” Xuan Kun said as they approached a metal door crafted from a black metallic material adorned with the image of a human figure surrounded by nine beastly entities. “You will be the first guests to visit this room. Welcome to the Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1557 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(2) 1557 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(2) “Sworn enemies with the Great One? Now that’s an achievement one can brag about.” Xi Meili chuckled at this information. The Great One was a supreme entity that stood at the pinnacle of the world. To be noticed by him was an honor beyond measure, and to be considered a sworn enemy was a mark of unparalleled distinction. Of course, whether that was a good thing or not was debatable.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1558 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(3) 1558 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(3) Although there were still thousands of scrolls left to be read, there were only a few scrolls left that focused on the Immortal Monarch’s journey. The other scrolls were dedicated to miscellaneous information on the Immortal Monarch and his companions. “After spending thousands of years convincing the beast clans that humans could coexist with them, the Immortal Monarch helped some of the beast clans settle around human settlements, allowing them to experience it firsthand.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1559 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(4) 1559 Chronicles of the Immortal Monarch(4) “Well, that’s all for the Immortal Monarch’s journey. item.description: Chapter 1613 Shadow Dweller As they ventured deeper into Snowy Fox Mountain, a fierce blizzard raged around them. The harsh conditions didn’t affect Yuan, but he could sense the relentless blizzard gradually chipping away Yingzi’s energy that protected them from the blizzard. Fortunately, Yingzi was able to replenish her energy faster than it was being depleted, averting what could have been a perilous situation. “Yingzi, if you don’t mind me asking, what kind of Predator are Shadow Dwellers?” Yuan suddenly asked this question that had been on his mind since it was revealed to him that she was one. This content is taken from freёwebnovel.com.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1614 Mystic Valley Foll𝑜w current novls on ƒrēewebnoѵёl.cσm. Shortly after their arrival, Yuan and Yingzi started looking around the Mystic Valley, using their eyes and divine sense to search for the Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy. “I want five meat skewers now.” Yingzi extended her hand and said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1615 Luminous Aquatic Lily With a pondering face, Yuan stared at the Luminous Aquatic Lily, also known as the Sacred Ocean Lily in the Nine Heavens. Despite Yu Ning’s confirmation that it was poisonous, he had Supreme Poison Resistance, and he managed to consume the Primal Bane without any resistance. ‘I cannot rely on Yingzi forever since I only had a limited amount of skewers left to use on her. Moreover, I don’t feel any sense of dread from it…’ He considered whether to consume the Luminous Aquatic Lily immediately or wait until he had obtained the Saint Dew to safely neutralize its poisonous effects.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1616 Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy A month has passed since Yuan consumed the Luminous Aquatic Lily. During this time, he’d consumed numerous treasures while searching for the Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy. His progress with the Chaotic Heart had reached fifty percent, but his cultivation hadn’t increased even slightly due to the Chaotic Heart absorbing all of the Chaotic Essence. Most of the treasures were acquired by Yingzi, and in exchange for them, Yuan had to give her several hundred meat skewers.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1617 Primal Monarch “You’re right. I am not from this world originally. I came to the Primal Expanse by accident, and I am trying to look for a way back to my own world.” Yuan said to the Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy after she correctly guessed his identity. “And you think I know this method? What made you come here, anyway?” The Divine Fox asked. “That’s what the Supreme Ox said. Don’t tell me you don’t…” Yuan swallowed nervously.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1618 Starfire Dragon “So, who is this Primal that you want to get rid of?” Yuan asked. “Not a Primal. He’s a Predator.” The Divine Fox corrected him. “He has a dragon bloodline—a real one.” “Dragon bloodline, huh? Is that why you cannot attack him?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1619 Starfire Dragon(2) “M-my apologies, Your Highness! It wasn’t my intention! I was wrong!” Starfire Dragon quickly lowered his head. “If you know you’re wrong, why are you still hovering above me and looking down on me like you’re above me? Get on your knees! Or are you waiting for me to help you with my authority!? A lowly dragon like you?!” Yuan shouted, increasing the intensity of Dragon’s Gaze. ‘This fucker is really too overbearing! But there’s nothing I can do!’ The Starfire Dragon cried inwardly before reluctantly descending to the ground and kneeling before Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After taking a moment to admire the outside view of the Mission Hall, Yuan entered the building through the wide entrance that could fit even 10 adults if they stood side-by-side. "Wow…" Yuan was immediately baffled by the atmosphere in the Mission Hall, as it looked like some sort of unorganized office with papers pinned all over the walls. In fact, one wouldn't be able to avoid seeing these papers no matter which direction they looked. After entering the building, Yuan approached the pinned papers on the walls and began reading a couple of them.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1620 Starfire Dragon(3) Long before the Starfire Dragon’s fiery attack even reached him, Yuan could feel his skin being scorched by the intense heat radiating from the massive ball of flames. Despite the dangerous situation, he refused to move away, seeming intent on blocking the attack with his bare body. “H-he can’t be serious… right?” The Starfire Dragon muttered in a dazed voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1621 Ranked Territories “It feels like I am forgetting something…” Yuan muttered to himself shortly after the Starfire Dragon left the scene. “Whatever. It’s too late to worry about that now.” Sometime later, Yingzi brought Yuan with her back to the Mystic Valley.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1622 Feng Yuxiang’s Spatial Ring In order for a territory to be ranked, it must first have a community with at least a hundred Predators. Once that requirement was fulfilled, the overall prowess of that territory determined the rank of the territory. The Phoenix territory that Yuan planned on going to was a rank-two territory, with over ten Chaotic Immortals, each as strong as a Bronze Immortal, at the very least. Even though the Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy warned him of the dangers and the Phoenixes’ hatred toward Dragons, Yuan had to go there not just to find the Primal Monarch but also for Feng Yuxiang.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1623 Phoenix Ascendancy Plateau “Fuck, that was fucking painful!” Yuan cursed out loud after taking off the Ancient Phoenix Robes. He’d worn it out of curiosity and expected some pain, but he never anticipated it to be that painful. ‘Even though it increased my fire resistance by an entire stage after wearing it for a few seconds, I don’t want to experience that level of pain again… It’s not worth it…’ Yuan quickly put the Ancient Phoenix Robes back into Feng Yuxiang’s spatial ring before retrieving another treasure. ‘I need to mask my dragon scent first and foremost since I cannot undo my transformation, or everyone will know that I am a human.’

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1624 Phoenix Ascendancy Plateau(2) “Leader, we have a situation.” The Phoenix that met with Yuan bowed before a handsome young man. This young man’s hair blazed red with strands of bright orange, mirroring the fiery aura he carried about him. Clad in a robe of red and gold, the colors of flame and royalty, he exuded the powerful presence of a Golden Immortal, attracting attention and awe from those around him. “Is this about the guest you brought back?” The young man asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1625 True Ember ‘This power… Phoenix’s Influence?! Impossible! He should be a fake! Why does he wield such power?!’ The young man exclaimed inwardly as his entire being was forced to obey Yuan’s commands. ‘He was a genuine Ancient Phoenix?! We’re screwed! Our entire territory is screwed!’ The young lady cried inwardly. Due to her lower cultivation, the Immortal Monarch’s Dominion was even more potent on her.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1626 Ancient Canyon After putting away the True Ember, Yuan quickly made his way toward the exit, unwilling to remain in the Phoenixes’ territory any longer. Neither the young man nor the young lady tried to stop him. In fact, they also wanted him to leave as soon as possible. Once they left, Yuan and Yingzi began flying back to the Mystic Valley.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1627 A Different Person After disembarking from the jet, Qi Man led Yuan and Liya to the sealed demon, where a dozen members of the Qi Family were stationed to keep watch over it. “Yuan?” Qi Fang, one of the people stationed there, was a little surprised to see Yuan. “Hey, it’s been a while.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1628 Second Sealed Demon “Damn livestock! You will regret mocking me!” The Demon General suddenly grew in size until it was three times its original height, its muscles bulging as if they were on the brink of bursting, and two bat-like wings sprouted from its back. “So you grew a little bigger and a lot uglier. I don’t see how that will save you.” Yuan commented on the demon’s transformation.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1629 The Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy’s Divination The second the Abomination broke out of its seal, Yuan activated Swords of Eternal Torment. Once the Abomination’s massive body was covered in swords, immobilizing it, Yuan instantly transformed. His hair and eyes turned a majestic gold, and his aura erupted like a volcano, radiating immense power. “T-that’s?!” Liya’s eyes widened with shock after seeing Yuan’s dragon transformation for the first time. ‘Not only does he know Dragon’s Gaze, but he can even transform?!’ she stared at Yuan’s handsome face with a dazed expression.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Here, take this, you'll need it to enter the Inner Court since you're still an Outer Court disciple. You can also locate Core Disciple Fei's living quarters with this." The sect elder handed Yuan a token after writing a few things down in his book. "Thank you," Yuan accepted the token and turned to walk out of the Mission Hall shortly after. After leaving the Mission Hall, Yuan followed the map in the token to Fairy Fei's living quarters. An hour later, Yuan reached the end of the Outer Court that was also a border between the Outer Court and Inner Court.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1630 Primal Monarch “What did you say? The Primal Monarch is located somewhere in the Mystic Valley? Are you sure you divined properly?” Yuan looked at the Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy. “Y-you! Are you mocking me?! I have never failed a divination! I am sure of it! The Primal Monarch is in the Mystic Valley!” The Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy said as she frantically looked at her surroundings with a nervous and fearful expression. The Primal Monarch was an entity that stood at the very pinnacle of the Primal Expanse. If there were Primals and Predators within the Primal Expanse, the Primal Monarch would be the Apex Predator, existing in a league of its own.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1631 Retrieving Tian Yi’s Memories ‘W-what the hell is going on here? The Primal Monarch is that human’s adoptive father?’ The Divine Fox of Grand Prophecy was bewildered by this information. She had countless questions, but she didn’t dare to ask them. “Since you don’t remember me, I guess it’s safe to assume you don’t remember our promise. Did you wander to the Primal Expanse again by accident, too?” The Primal Monarch looked at Yuan. He nodded, “Yes, I came here by accident. I wanted to look for you because I was told you could take me out of this place. How long have you been watching me?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1632 Tempering in Blood “W-who are you?! Why do you look like me?!” Tian Yi was terrified when he realized that the face before him was actually his own face. “I like it, so I decided to use it.” “You decided to use it…? You’re not human, are you?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1633 Primal Monarch’s Bloodline After his body tempering period ended, Tian Yi began consuming an enormous amount of treasures provided by the Primal Monarch to cultivate a Chaotic Heart. He was akin to a pig, but instead of eating pig food, he was being fed priceless treasures. However, despite the vast number of treasures he consumed, there were no signs of his Chaotic Heart forming. Despite this, Tian Yi’s cultivation soared, reaching the level of Divine Ancestor in just four years solely by consuming treasures. He achieved this without needing to cultivate or learn any cultivation techniques, as the Primal Monarch assisted him in absorbing and containing all that energy.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1634 Tian Yi’s Growth After Tian Yi left home to gain experience in the Primal Expanse, the Primal Monarch secretly followed him, having nothing better to do. Of course, since this was Tian Yi’s first time exploring alone, he also felt a little worried for him. However, the Primal Monarch’s worries were quickly relieved once he saw how quickly Tian Yi adapted to the Primal Expanse. While his cultivation as a Bronze Immortal was respectable in the Primal Expanse, it was far from sufficient for him to be reckless and careless. Tian Yi didn’t have any big ambitions and wanted to complete his Chaotic Heart as soon as possible, which he set as his primary goal.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1635 Primal Monarch’s Blood Essence “Do I… do I really have to leave and return to the human world?” Tian Yi stared at the Primal Monarch with a dispirited expression. The Primal Monarch smiled and said, “The Primal Expanse isn’t your final stop. You are fated to achieve great things in the human world. I’ll give you a few years to prepare, but you must leave within ten years.” Tian Yi sighed, “Fine. If you so desperately want me to leave, I won’t argue any further. However, how do I even return to the human world? According to what I’ve heard, it’s impossible to leave the Primal Expanse.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1636 Awakening Immortal Monarch’s Bloodline Yuan stared at the Blood Essence in his grasp with a nervous gaze. Despite the Primal Monarch’s assurance that it was safe to consume at his cultivation level, he couldn’t help but feel uneasy. After all, the Blood Essence belonged to an entity likely far stronger than even the Dragon Ancestor, whose Blood Essence he also possessed and has yet to consume due to his lack of cultivation. “Are you really scared of a single drop of blood? When did you become such a coward?” The Primal Monarch casually mocked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1637 Forbidden Technique “I’m ready to visit the Eternal Phoenix Domain,” Yuan said to the Primal Monarch after chasing away the Primals. The Primal Monarch nodded and said, “Don’t expect me to protect you if you get in trouble there.” He smiled, “I’ll be fine. Thanks for worrying.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1638 One Condition “Hey, you with the weird scent!” A voice suddenly called out to Yuan. Yuan turned toward the source of the voice, spotting a young lady with long crimson hair, amber-colored eyes, and fierce facial features.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1639 Primordial Phoenix’s Outburst “If I heal her and let her continue traveling with you, she will undoubtedly be hurt again, perhaps even face death,” the Primordial Phoenix explained the reason behind her condition, her tone resolute. “In that case, I would rather she stay here with us, where she will be close to her own bloodline and, more importantly, where she’ll be safe.” Hearing this, Yuan calmly replied, “You’re right. It is dangerous to be with me, and there’s a high chance she’ll get hurt again in the future. However, it’s her decision whether she wants to continue traveling with me. Neither you nor I have the right to decide her path for her.” “Moreover, she doesn’t even belong in this world. It’s unreasonable to ask her to stay.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Y-You are! What are you doing here?!" Fairy Fei pointed at Yuan with trembling fingers and a shocked look on her face, dumbfounding the Inner Court disciples there. "S-Senior Sister Fei? Are you okay? Do you know this Outer Court disciple?" Disciple Ying decided to ask her. "I… I…" Fairy Fei was speechless. How is she supposed to answer such a question? Tell them that she was defeated by this Outer Court disciple in her own field of expertise? "T-This Outer Court disciple… is my assistant!" Fairy Fei spurted out without thinking.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1640 A Vicious Curse “Since you’re her mother, this changes everything. However, that doesn’t mean I’m willing to let you take her away from me.” Yuan said to the Primordial Phoenix after a moment of silence. He continued, “How about this? Why don’t you help your daughter recover first, then we can discuss her future together? I promise that I won’t leave before the two of you have a conversation. I really don’t want to fight you.” “Hmph! You don’t want to fight me? You aren’t even capable of doing so!” The Primordial Phoenix sneered.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1641 Human From Back Then “I’ll do whatever it takes to acquire the treasure. Just don’t do anything reckless and foolish before I return.” Yuan shook his head at the Primordial Phoenix’s eagerness to go to war with the dragons. “Who the hell are you to tell me what to do?” The Primordial Phoenix sneered. She continued, “Ten years. If you haven’t returned with the treasure by then, we will go there and get it ourselves.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1642 The Connection Between Two Worlds “Shameless? I am just trying to ensure my son’s safety. That’s all. I have no interest in you or your world.” The Primal Monarch shrugged. “Hah! Do you think I am the type to go back on my words? I am nowhere as shameless as you, Primal Monarch!” “Anyway, you had plenty of chances to explain to him before, so why didn’t you do so?” “Hmm… good question…”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1643 Six in Total “What is the Monarch’s bloodline, huh?” The Primal Monarch looked at Yuan with a profound smile on his face. After a moment of silence, he responded with a casual shrug, “No clue.” “Huh?” Yuan’s face became dumbfounded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1644 Nine Levels of Hell “Where exactly are we?” Yuan inquired as they stood at the peak of a massive volcano. He thought they were going to feed him treasures to complete his Chaotic Heart. “We’re at the Nine Levels of Hell Peak.” “What a terrifying name. Why did you bring me here? The Primordial Phoenix said you’d help me complete my Chaotic Heart.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1645 Fire Immunity “What the hell are you talking about? The eldest came back in such a state?” Feng Mu almost couldn’t believe what he was hearing. “Unfortunately. I don’t know the situation, but Mother’s going to take care of it. In the meantime, I am tasked with helping him complete his Chaotic Heart.” Feng Yao pointed at Yuan. Feng Mu shifted his gaze to Yuan again and sneered, “What a waste of time and effort.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1646 Completed Chaotic Heart “That human! He’s achieved fire immunity!” Feng Yao exclaimed, her expression filled with astonishment. “I didn’t know humans could do that!” She had always believed that only beasts with unique bloodlines, like phoenixes, were capable of acquiring such immunity. The fact that a human had done it defied her expectations and understanding. Even in the Nine Heavens, achieving fire immunity was an exceptionally rare accomplishment. Those who managed it typically relied on special techniques, priceless treasures, and years of dedicated cultivation to reach that level. There were also those born with unique physiques that granted them fire immunity naturally, but that was a different story since they hadn’t earned it through effort but were simply born with the gift.

item.title: Cultivation Online
