item.description: Chapter 1647 Fifth Level of Hell The instant Yuan entered the fifth level of Nine Levels of Hell, his progress shot up from 70 percent to 80 percent. However, the pain he was experiencing was excruciating and would break the minds of even the toughest cultivators out there. The Nine Levels of Hell weren’t created for humans but for phoenixes, beasts with a natural affinity for fire. Even a newly born phoenix with the lowest bloodline would have supreme fire resistance, and it wouldn’t take long for them to achieve fire immunity.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1648 Impervious to Fire “Primal Monarch!” Feng Yao and Feng Liqiu lowered their head after snapping out of their daze. The Primal Monarch acknowledged them with a slight nod before looking at the Primordial Phoenix and asking, “So, why did you call for me?” The Primordial Phoenix looked at Yuan and spoke, “You know, I have secretly been to the human world before, and I’d even spent a few thousand years there.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1649 Harmonious Heaven Refining Immortal Physique “Turning the flames into his own strength… that is a realm above Fire Harmony…” Feng Liqiu muttered in a dazed voice. While the phoenixes remained stunned by Yuan’s remarkable achievements, he decided to push the boundaries of his newfound power. Without hesitation, he leaped straight into the eighth level, where the brilliant white flames roared fiercely. ‘Sure enough, I don’t feel any difference… no… this is even more comfortable than the black flames!’ Yuan thought, closing his eyes as the white flames enveloped him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: When the female disciples began demanding a second song, Yuan turned to look at Disciple Fei, who quickly nodded her head, giving him the approval to continue using her zither. Thus, Yuan placed his fingers on the zither strings once again and began playing another song. The atmosphere immediately changed again, and Yuan's zither music echoed throughout the area, allowing disciples far away from their location to enjoy the music as well. "Wow! This must be Fairy Fei's zither performance! I think she has improved yet again!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1650 Divine Dragon Sanctuary “Honestly, I don’t really understand.” Feng Liqiu shook her head, and she continued, “Most would be delighted, even honored, if I requested for their Chaotic Essence to conceive my child. Excluding dragons, I cannot imagine anyone refusing.” Feng Liqiu’s status as the daughter of the Primordial Phoenix alone granted her immense prestige in the Primal Expanse. Her lineage was revered, making her among the most respected in the realm, with many viewing her as nearly untouchable. Moreover, she was a powerhouse in her own right, standing as one of the strongest Predators in the Primal Expanse. In the entire Eternal Phoenix Domain, her strength was second only to her mother, the Primordial Phoenix. Countless powerful beings had willingly offered their Chaotic Essence to Feng Liqiu over the years without her even needing to ask them, but not a single one of them managed to receive her approval.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1651 Dragon God Festival “I am Yuan, and I traveled half the world just to come to the Divine Dragon Sanctuary.” Yuan introduced himself. The blue-haired man swallowed nervously. He could tell just from Yuan’s scent alone that he was in the presence of a true dragon with a powerful bloodline. “I cannot imagine the effort and time it took you to come here, but I would like to welcome you on behalf of the Divine Dragon Council.” The man said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1652 Dragon Princess Meihui The man glanced at Yingzi, only to be met with a fierce, piercing glare that sent chills through his entire body. Instinctively, he knew that if he dared to make a move for the meat skewers in her hands, it would lead to a swift and terrible demise. ‘Her lack of presence… is she a Shadow Dweller?’ The onlookers pondered Yingzi’s identity. After chewing and swallowing the meat in her mouth, Yingzi spoke out loud, “I’m willing to exchange my food.” “Really?” The man was pleasantly surprised, and his opinions of Shadow Dwellers slightly improved.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1653 Divine Dragon Council “Then I’ll be on my way now.” After Yuan had been given the token, Dragon Princess Meihui quickly left the scene. There were two major reasons why Dragon Princess Meihui gave Yuan the token, allowing him to skip the assessment entirely. The first reason was simple: she could tell by Yuan’s dragon scent that he was more than qualified to participate, making the assessment process unnecessary and a waste of time.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1654 Divine Dragon Council(2) “I don’t really have a reason to join the Divine Dragon Sanctuary.” Yingzi shook her head. Most people join the Divine Dragon Sanctuary for one of two reasons. Some sought access to the powerful training grounds available within the territory, hoping to grow stronger. Others join to use the Divine Dragon Sanctuary’s prestigious name as a shield, gaining protection and influence under its banner. “I do not care about their training grounds, and I don’t need their protection, so I don’t really benefit from joining them. However, if you were to remain in the Primal Expanse forever, I wouldn’t mind joining them with you.” Yuan smiled at her words and said, “Unfortunately, I must return to my home soon.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1655 Divine Dragon Council(3) ‘Huh? That’s it?’ Yuan thought, surprised by how easy the process had been. He had expected the assessment to be much more difficult and strict, but in reality, it had turned out to be far simpler than he had anticipated. “Then I’ll head to the second floor now.” Yuan gave the young man a slight bow before approaching the spiraling staircase by the wall. Several moments later, Yuan stepped onto the second floor. The layout and decorations were almost identical to those on the first floor. At the other end of the room, a middle-aged man was slumped over a desk, seemingly asleep. His posture was relaxed, and his soft, rhythmic breathing filled the otherwise quiet room.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1656 Long Yejun After appearing on the third floor, the handsome young man approached Yuan with a calm smile, “Hello. I hope you didn’t wait too long.” Yuan quickly stood up and said, “No, I didn’t.” The young man then introduced himself, “I am Long Yejun, and I will be your interviewer. Before we begin, can you tell me about yourself?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1657 Endless Arena Although Yuan appeared unscathed on the outside, he hadn’t emerged from the exchange completely uninjured. Beneath his calm exterior, the impact had taken a slight toll on his body, but his regenerative ability swiftly healed the damage, allowing him to recover almost instantly. ‘I cannot underestimate this man. Not only did he penetrate my defenses with his bare fists, but he’s even restricted his cultivation to my level.’ Yuan stared at Long Yejun with a sharp gaze. Unbeknownst to him, an excited smile crept onto his face, giving him a fierce and almost vicious appearance.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1658 Dragon God’s Descendant Yuan and Long Yejun silently stared at each other, seeming waiting for the other to act first. “If you’re not going to move first, then allow me to!” Long Yejun suddenly began transforming. His aura erupted like a volcano, and scales began appearing all over his body. Furthermore, a golden mask that was shaped like a dragon’s face materialized on Long Yejun’s face, giving him a fearsome presence.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1659 Chaotic Sword Aura “Oh, this is not bad—much better than I anticipated,” Yuan nodded in satisfaction, impressed by the result of fusing his Chaotic Essence with his Enhanced Sword Aura. “What is that power?” Long Yejun asked again. Yuan pondered for a moment before responding, “Chaotic Sword Aura.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Hearing Yuan's question, Disciple Fei said, "This zither competition is one of the largest competitions in the continent that occurs only once every three years, and as you may have expected, it gathers the best musicians from around the world. Despite my abilities that are widely praised by the entire sect, I'd only placed 7th in the last competition out of thousands of participants." "Seventh out of thousands? That's already very good…" Yuan said with slightly wide eyes. "Seventh place may be good but it isn't good enough! I want at least 3rd place, as that's when you get the real rewards!" Disciple Fei said. "What kind of rewards?" Yuan asked, his interest piqued.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1660 Ancient Azure Dragon Sometime after their fight ended, Long Yejun said to Yuan, “Although you have passed the assessment, it never mattered since you’re one of the Dragon God’s descendants, so you will automatically be ranked above the Divine Dragon Council.” “Oh…” Yuan wondered if he should follow the flow and pretend to be a Dragon God’s Descendant.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1661 Long Yejun’s Treasures After walking for several minutes, they finally arrived at the island. “Welcome to my humble home.” Long Yejun said to Yuan as he opened the door. “Though, this is just my secondary home that I only use when I am in my human form. My real home is the water outside.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1662 Two Treasures of His Choice Long Yejun noticed Yuan’s intrigued expression and smiled, “You seem interested. Do you want it?” He nodded, “A little, but I will decide after looking at the other treasures.” “Then let’s move on to the next one.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1663 Baneful Dragon’s Poisonous Swamp “I see…?” Despite Yuan explaining the situation to her, Yingzi only became more puzzled afterward. She couldn’t fathom how Yuan, who was obviously human, became the Dragon God’s Descendant. Moreover, he should have the Primal Monarch’s bloodline. However, she quickly stopped thinking about it, realizing it was pointless to overthink something she wasn’t meant to understand. “Your friend is a Shadow Dweller, huh? It’s been over a million years since I last encountered their race.” Long Yejun commented as he stared at Yingzi, as it was incredibly rare for a Shadow Dweller to be so far away from their natural habitat, the Hollowed Expanse. “Oh, let me introduce myself. I am the second Dragon God’s Descendant, Long Yejun.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1664 Hundred Thousand Poison Immunity “Wow, he’s doing much better than I expected…” Long Yejun muttered with a surprised look after seeing how far Yuan had progressed in the Baneful Dragon’s Poisonous Swamp. He turned to look at Yingzi, who was standing beside him, and asked, “How long have you been traveling with him?” “A little over two years.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1665 Heaven’s Bane Another two weeks have passed since Yuan attained Myriad Poison Immunity. <Your skill ‘Myriad Poison Immunity’ has developed into ‘True Poison Immunity’> [True Poison Immunity]

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1666 The Next Training Ground “I can’t believe you have managed to conquer the Baneful Dragon’s Poisonous Swamp in such a short time, and it’s even your first visit to this place.” Long Yejun praised Yuan when he returned. He said, “Are you a Baneful Dragon, too? Only a Baneful Dragon with Dragon God’s blood could possibly achieve this feat.” Yuan shook his head with a smile and said, “Sorry, you’re wrong. I am not a Baneful Dragon.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1667 Sky Splitting Dragon’s Tribulation <Harmonious Heaven Refining Immortal Physique has activated> <Your lightning resistance has increased slightly> <Your lightning resistance has increased slightly>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1668 Courting Death “How long has he been training here?” Long Meihui asked. “It’ll be two months tomorrow.” Long Yejun said. “Did he start from level two?” “No, he started from level one.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1669 Heavenly Physique <Your lightning resistance has increased significantly> After reaching the eighth level, Yuan didn’t pause and continued toward the ninth level. However, just as he was about to extend his arm into the ninth level, he suddenly stopped. His instincts had kicked in, warning him that he wouldn’t escape with just a destroyed arm if he underestimated the ninth level. ‘Let’s ignore the ninth level for now…’

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Sect Master, this is Elder Shan. I have something important to talk about regarding Disciple Yuan," Elder Shan knocked on Long Yijun's door and said from the outside. "Disciple Yuan? What did he do this time?" Long Yijun immediately sighed and stopped working. "Come inside!" Elder Shan opened the door a moment later and entered the room with Disciple Fei following behind her.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1670 Something Fun “Where did you go just now?” Long Yejun asked Yuan after he returned to the Primal Expanse a few minutes later. “That’s a secret,” Yuan said with a smile. It was common for powerful beings in the Primal Expanse to disappear and appear suddenly, so the others weren’t too baffled by Yuan’s sudden disappearance.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1671 Ready or Not “Do you have any suggestions?” Chu Liuxiang asked. Yuan pondered for a good moment before responding, “There is this place that I have always wanted to go to as a child but never got the chance to for obvious reasons. Nine Flags Amusement Park.” “An amusement park, huh? I have also never been to one before. Let’s go!” Chu Liuxiang immediately agreed, even appearing quite excited about it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1672 Amusement Park ƒrēewebnovel.com Yuan hastily retrieved his Abyssal Dagger to block Li Jinxi’s attack. “So you finally remembered your past life?” Yuan inquired as they clashed. “I won’t say anything until you beat me!” Li Jinxi repeated.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1673 Returning to the Primal Expanse At the end of the feast, Yu Rou said, “Brother, if you don’t have anything to do, why don’t you give us a concert? It’s been a while since I have listened to your music.” Yuan nodded, “Sure. How does tomorrow noon sound? I can do it in our training ground.” “Then it’s decided! I’ll let the rest of my faction know, so make sure you have enough seats!” she eagerly said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1674 Metal Dragon Monarch “Can you show me the workshop for now?” Yuan asked the bald man. “By the way, how should I address you?” The man lifted his head in a prideful manner and introduced himself, “I am the Metal Dragon Monarch, Refined Obsidian Dragon! I am also one of the few beings in the Primal Expanse capable of creating treasures! As a matter of fact, nobody dares to claim they are number one as long as I am still alive!” Creating treasures was unheard of in the Primal Expanse until a human skilled in treasure crafting appeared hundreds of millions of years ago. Since then, they have acquired the ability and knowledge to craft treasures.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1675 Crafting His First Treasure The Refined Obsidian Dragon returned to the workshop several hours later with a leather pouch filled with materials. He tossed the bag before Yuan and said, “If you can craft a treasure while using half of the materials in there, I’ll consider you worthy.” Yuan grabbed the bag and poured all of the materials out. There were twenty-one materials in total, and he didn’t recognize any of them. freēwebnovel.com

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1676 The Refined Obsidian Dragon’s Sincerity “I don’t mind forgiving you for your unruly behavior, but I will need you to prove your sincerity first,” Yuan said to the Refined Obsidian Dragon. “How can I show my sincerity? I will do anything!” The Refined Obsidian Dragon shouted. “Although I can make do with the materials I possess currently, it would be great if I had more. Do you understand what I mean?” Yuan spoke with a calm expression on his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1677 Robes of Destruction Yuan sat before the mountain of materials and proceeded to inspect each one for several days. After completing his inspection a week later, Yuan closed his eyes and began doing simulations inside his head. Several more days later, he stood up, picked the needed materials from the pile, and tossed them directly into the furnace.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1678 Starry Abyss Upgrade <Starry Abyss has evolved into Baneful Abyss> <Baneful Abyss has learned the ability ‘Mark of the Baneful’> [Mark of the Baneful]

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1679 Boots of Swift Destruction frёewebnoѵēl.com After returning to the Endless Arena, Yuan immediately started testing his new equipment and techniques. ‘First up, let’s try out my new equipment.’ Yuan looked at Long Yejun and said, “Throw some attacks my way.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After returning to her own place, Elder Shan asked Disciple Fei, "What are you going to do now?" "I am going to prepare myself for the competition and practice my zither arts with Disciple Yuan until then. If what he said is true— that he has never played the zither before until very recently, I believe that his skills will reach an unbelievably high level within a week before the tournament." "W-Wait a second… Did you just say Disciple Yuan has only recently started playing the zither?" Elder Shan looked at her with wide eyes. Disciple Fei nodded and said, "I know it's really hard to believe such words, but I don't see a reason for him to lie, and he doesn't seem to be the kind of person to lie about such things."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1680 Infinite Spiraling Abyss “With that said, it is clear that you still lack the cultivation to truly utilize its true power.” Long Yejun said as the wound on his arm quickly healed. “Yes, that feels like a fraction of its true potential. Unfortunately, that was the best I can do with my cultivation.” Yuan sighed, but he wasn’t discouraged. If anything, he was excited for the future when his cultivation was sufficient enough to call down the true Heaven’s Final Judgement.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1681 Gathering of the Seven Dragon Monarchs ‘Power of the void… what a profound and mysterious concept…’ Yuan pondered as he gazed into the Infinite Spiraling Abyss. ‘It’s like a branch that endlessly spreads out, extending into countless possibilities…’ The more Yuan tried to comprehend the power of the void, the more overwhelming it felt, almost as if he’d been tossed inside the void itself. Long Yejun and Yingzi silently watched him from a distance while ensuring that he didn’t accidentally fall into the Infinite Spiraling Abyss.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1682 Basic Void Understanding One month… two months… Three months passed in the blink of an eye. During this time, Yuan remained fixated on the Infinite Spiraling Abyss, his eyes staring into the darkness in a dazed manner. <Your understanding of Power of the Void has increased significantly>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1683 Leaving the Infinite Spiraling Abyss Although Yuan’s consciousness was awake, he was not fully aware or in control, akin to a state of sleep paralysis, where he was conscious of his surroundings but unable to move or react. As the void continuously damaged him, his body felt like it was slowly being chipped away by countless ants. It wasn’t too painful, but the gnarly sensation would drive most people mad if they had to endure it for an extended time. freeweɓnovel.cm Time felt incredibly slow inside the Infinite Spiraling Abyss—almost as if it were frozen. However, what felt like minutes to Yuan was actually days outside the void, and two full months had passed since he entered the Infinite Spiraling Abyss.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1684 Unrivaled Tyrant “My, what’s going on here? I have never had such a massive crowd to welcome me back before.” Long Wu Qing spoke with a slight smile on her face when she noticed the Seven Dragon Monarchs and the onlookers outside the Infinite Spiraling Abyss. “I-it’s the Unrivaled Tyrant! Run for your lives!” The onlookers began scrambling in fear, resembling a group of startled cats, their escape messy and swift. The only ones who didn’t attempt to escape were the Seven Dragon Monarchs, primarily because fleeing would make them appear weak, a vulnerability that would only invite further bullying and challenges to their authority.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1685 Sworn Brothers A deafening silence filled the area for a good moment after Yuan spoke, with the Seven Dragon Monarchs staring at him with wide eyes filled with disbelief. “I like your enthusiasm, Yuan, but I don’t want to injure you before the Dragon God Festival. After all, I don’t want to hear any excuses when you lose to me,” said Long Wu Qing. Her words shocked the others more than Yuan’s words.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1686 A Feast Before the Festival “Did you want me to save you sooner? I knew there was someone inside that was capable of saving you, so why would I waste my energy?” The Primal Monarch shrugged with a smile on his face after hearing Yuan’s words. “What if she didn’t save me?” he asked. “But that didn’t happen, so why dwell on it?” Yuan sighed and no longer tried to argue with him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1687 Seasoning When Yuan returned to the Primal Expanse, Yingzi was there to greet him with a teleport stone given to her by Long Yejun. Without uttering a word, Yingzi handed the teleport stone to him. After attaining Moderate Void Understanding, Yuan could see the more intricate details within the teleport stone, even able to tell the direction it would take him. He shattered the teleport stone the next moment and entered the rift created by it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1688 Dragon God Festival Details Long Yejun and the others looked at Long Wu Qing with nervous gazes, seemingly waiting for her reaction. Nobody has ever dared to ask her to suppress her presence since she killed the last one who did. In the Primal Expanse, displaying one’s presence was a way of flaunting their status and prowess. The more powerful the presence, the better. To be told to stop, even if it was a reasonable request, could be interpreted as disrespect. It was akin to telling a wealthy man to stop showing off their jewelry in public because they were reflecting the sunlight and bothering those around him. “…”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1689 Dragon God Festival Details(2) The Dragon God continued to speak, “The Blood Reservoir contains exactly ten drops of my blood, so you will need to absorb and refine at least nine drops to pass the trial.” “However, with that said, the blood you’ll be absorbing is no ordinary blood. Every single drop has been enhanced, and if you’re unable to absorb it, you’ll immediately die a violent and explosive death.” “For example, let’s say I only have the potential to absorb three drops of blood. If I try to absorb even a single drop more, it will spell the end for me. You may think it’ll be fine as long as you stop at your limit, and while that is true, only some of you will have the capability to tell your own limit. The majority of you will not know your limit and will essentially be walking on a thin rope in the void.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "I haven't been to this place ever since Brother Tian stopped participating in competitions…" Yu Rou sighed while surrounded by hundreds of golden trophies. "Then why did the Young Lady suddenly decide to return to this place?" Meixiu couldn't help but ask her out of curiosity. Hearing her words, Yu Rou turned around with a beautiful smile on her face, and she said, "Because he'll be participating in a competition soon!" "Participating… in a competition? The Young Master?" Meixiu looked at her with a dazed look on her face, unsure of how to think or feel about this.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1690 Yingzi “I…I don’t think I’ll participate in this year’s Dragon God Festival.” Long Yejun spoke after Long Meihui, surprising the others. “I can’t lie that the rewards aren’t enticing, but as mentioned, there’s a chance I might fight with my siblings or Brother Yuan. I don’t think I’ll be able to kill them if I matched against them.” Long Yejun could not bear fighting his sworn brother for real, much less kill him. However, since it was a rule in the Dragon God Festival, there was no way to avoid it if he really fought against Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1691 Yingzi(2) “Yingzi, how did you follow me?” Yuan asked her with a dumbfounded expression on his face. “I followed your shadow,” she calmly responded. “My shadow…?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1692 Yingzi(3) “Ah, those two? They’re my partners, Meixiu and Chu Liuxiang.” Yuan explained. “Partner… so you’re breeding them?” she spoke calmly. The weird phrasing and her calm tone sent shivers down Yuan’s spine. He cleared his throat and explained, “While some humans enter a relationship with the determination and intent of having children, not everyone wants children. We became partners because we love each other.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1693 Yingzi(4) After leaving the Dragon Spiral Mountain, Yuan brought Yingzi to the nearest city for their first destination. Before leaving, Yuan consumed an appearance-altering pill to change his face so they don’t attract unwanted attention. “We’re moving too slow. I’ll bring you with me like usual.” Yingzi complained halfway there.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1694 Yingzi(5) “Bastard, who the hell do you think you are?! We are just trying to speak with the Little Fairy of Gluttony!” One of the individuals who tried to force his way through and was sent flying returned shortly after to shout at Yuan. “Little Fairy of Gluttony?” Yuan couldn’t help but crack a chuckle after hearing her nickname. “Anyway, she’s a friend of mine, and we don’t need any distractions. I don’t mind if you watch from a distance, but stay away from my friend unless you want to die.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1695 The Dragon God Festival Begins! Seeing their surprised faces, Yuan explained the details of the Dragon God Festival and why he didn’t feel confident with them. “The Dragon God is a godlike entity with strength that rivals a Cultivation God. I cannot fathom someone at my level would be able to absorb it, much less refine it.” While he had a heaven-defying physique that allowed him to refine things one typically could not, even extending the limit of what those around his cultivation could absorb, it did not allow him to refine anything without limit. The training grounds were prime examples. It wasn’t as if he could walk straight into the highest difficulty without any preparation. His body could still be destroyed if its limit was exceeded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1696 Yuan’s Opponent After being teleported, Yuan found himself surrounded by darkness, almost as if he’d returned inside the Infinite Spiraling Abyss. However, oddly enough, he was able to see his opponent clearly. “Hahaha! What luck!” His opponent, a red-headed man, laughed hysterically.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1697 The Sibling’s Deathmatch After being teleported, Long Yejun found himself inside a secluded dimension that was created solely for the Dragon God Festival. He didn’t waste any time looking at the void and searched for his opponent. However, he instinctively knew who he had been matched against after sensing her tyrannical presence. “Elder sister.” Long Yejun muttered in a calm voice after confirming that his opponent was Long Wu Qing.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1698 Hellfire Dragon After returning to the Divine Dragon Sanctuary, Long Wu Qing ignored the nearby stares being tossed her way and looked for Yuan’s fight. Once she found it, she disappeared into thin air, appearing at the location it was being broadcasted a moment later. Her sudden appearance terrified those nearby, causing them to flee as if their lives depended on it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1699 End of the First Trial After hearing Ling Wu Qing’s confirmation that Long Yejun had matched up against her and lost, Yuan tightly clenched his fists. Long Wu Qing paid attention to every little detail and asked, “Are you angry at me for killing him?” Yuan closed his eyes for a moment and took a deep breath before responding calmly, “No, I am not.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: 'H-He should be fine, right? This is just his reaction as an NPC, right? His arm will regrow as if nothing happened after I leave, right?' Yuan tried to convince himself so that he'd feel less guilty for cutting the disciple's arm. "Y-You bastard! I will fucking kill you!" Ren Fuchen roared in anger, but he was secretly fearful of Yuan's tyrannical strength. Even now, his arms are shaking from Yuan's strike. "It's not my fault he jumped into our fight," Yuan directed the blame towards the disciple, which caused the disciple to cough up a mouthful of blood upon hearing his words. "AHHHH! HELP ME! I'M BLEEDING TO DEATH!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After hearing the door being knocked on, Yuan went to open the doors and greeted Disciple Fei. "Hello, Disciple Fei. Come inside." Yuan invited her inside with a nonchalant look on his face. Disciple Fei nodded and entered the building. Sometime later, once they were sitting in the living room, and Yuan asked her, "So? What are we going to do, Disciple Fei?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1700 Refining the Dragon God’s Blood “Congratulations to those of you who have survived the first trial.” The Dragon God’s voice rippled throughout the Divine Dragon Sanctuary. “You may choose to continue to the second trial or give up now. Those of you who will continue, keep the token in your grasp. Otherwise, crush it. You have an hour to decide.” Once the Dragon God’s voice faded, everyone began mumbling to each other.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1701 Dragon God’s Special Reward <Nine Dragon Symbols have reached level four!> <Due to the Nine Dragon Symbols, you have gained the ability to use ‘True Dragon Awakening’> [True Dragon Awakening]

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1702 The Final Trial Long before Long Wu Qing even refined her ninth drop of blood, every other participant had already been disqualified. Some tried to refine more blood than they could handle and perished, while others gave up after refining their first drop of blood. The vast majority of participants perished in the second trial, meaning tens of millions of participants were killed in just a few months. This level of casualty was unprecedented in the entire Primal Expanse and would definitely go down in history as the most deadly Dragon God Festival. Of those few thousand participants who survived, about 95 percent of them only refined a single drop of blood. The rest of them only managed to absorb two drops of blood at most, with Long Meihui beating everyone at five drops of blood.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1703 Consuming the Dragon God’s Blood Essence “Ten drops of blood? He refined all ten drops of blood…?” Long Wu Qing muttered to herself with a somewhat blank look on her face, looking like she was experiencing a mental breakdown. As unbelievable as it sounded, Long Wu Qing did not doubt Yuan’s claim. “How did you do it?” she asked. “That’s a secret,” Yuan replied with a smile.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1704 End of the Dragon God Festival Once the Dragon God’s Vengeance helped him absorb some of the Dragon God’s Blood Essence, Yuan no longer felt like he was expanding uncontrollably. However, he was still having trouble refining it. The Dragon God stared at the Dragon God’s Vengeance with a profound expression, his gaze sharp and intense, almost as if he were trying to stare a hole into it. Although he couldn’t see inside the Dragon God’s Vengeance, he was sure it contained a powerful soul, one strong enough to cancel out his divine sense.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1705 Dragon Goddess Yeyou’s Origin “You want to talk about the soul inside my spear…?” Yuan looked at the Dragon God’s serious expression and swallowed nervously. freeweɓnvel.com Noticing his nervous look, the Dragon God said, “Don’t worry, it’s not what you’re thinking. I just want to confirm something that has been weighing my mind for some time now.” Yuan nodded, “Alright.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1706 Their Relationship “You… what’s your relationship with my sister?” The Dragon God inquired as he stared at Yuan with raised eyebrows. “She’s my follower—” Yuan stopped mid-sentence as Dragon Goddess Yeyou shot him a dangerous glare, her eyes warning him not to continue. “Ahem!” Yuan quickly cleared his throat before correcting himself, “She’s my lover.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1707 Returning to the Eternal Phoenix Domain “Can you bring me back to the Eternal Phoenix Domain now?” Yuan looked at the Primal Monarch. “Eternal Phoenix Domain? How are you related to those annoying birds?” Dragon God inquired with a raised eyebrow. “My companion is waiting for me there,” he said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1708 Fighting Long Wu Qing “Hey, stop messing around and fight me seriously. You don’t have the leisure to hold back against me. Just come at me with your full strength.” Long Wu Qing said to him with a disappointed frown on her face. This was the first time she faced an opponent who didn’t immediately go all out against her. It was a weird feeling being on the receiving end since she would often be the one to hold back. “Sorry, it’s a bad habit of mine to slowly ramp things up as I get used to my opponent’s strength.” Yuan apologized.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1709 True Dragon Awakening “Honestly, even though I’ve suppressed my cultivation to match your cultivation, I still have a major advantage against you. Unlike others, I can only weaken my physique so much, not to mention the vast amount of chaotic essence within my body. Suppressing my cultivation doesn’t make my chaotic essence magically disappear, either.” Long Wu Qing said. However, Yuan smiled and said, “To be honest, I am still not going all out. It’s hard to get rid of habits, unfortunately.” As he finished his sentence, immense killing intent began oozing from Yuan’s body, forming two beautiful red and black wings on his back.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: 'T-This guy! Why is he so good with the zither?!' Fei Yuyan cried inwardly after their practice session ended. 'We played over a hundred songs and I'd made mistakes for a third of them, but alas, this guy! This guy managed to not only repeat my songs after hearing it once, but he'd even done so flawlessly without any mistakes! How the heck is that even possible?!' One normally wouldn't be able to pinpoint mistakes in something they're not familiar with, so it was only normal to assume that Yuan wouldn't be able to pick out her mistakes when he has never heard of the song before. However, that was not the case, and to Fei Yuyan's surprise, Yuan had managed to do just that! "It's been years since I've last played an instrument for such a long time without many breaks. It's really refreshing," Yuan said as he wiped the sweat from his forehead with a satisfied look on his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1710 Long Wu Qing’s Mark “No. The others aren’t capable of injuring me even if I matched their cultivation, and I am not the type to purposefully let someone beat me.” Long Wu Qing said, responding to his suggestion. “Come on, let’s fight for another week—even another day will be enough!” Yuan shook his head and said, “I have already lost all desire to fight. If you want to fight, we can do it another time.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1711 Feng Yuxiang's Return "Waaaah! Young Master!" Feng Yuxiang cried her eyes out as she embraced Yuan. "I thought I'd never see you again!" The moment her life flashed before her eyes during the heavenly tribulation was still fresh to her, almost as if it'd just happened. Yuan patted her head and said, "I've missed you."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1712 Sleepy Xiao Hua "Don't worry, nothing happened to Xi Meili. She endured her heavenly tribulation well." Yuan said. "So I was the only one who ended up in such a pathetic state, huh…" she sighed. "Don't put yourself down so much. Your case is special."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1713 Leaving the Primal Expanse "Now that you pointed it out… she really has two souls in one, and it's almost impossible to notice without looking into the depth of her soul. Even I missed it, after all." The Primordial Phoenix muttered in a slightly surprised voice, as she had never seen such a phenomenon before. Yuan recalled what Xiao Hua revealed to him and said, "She said there was another personality sealed within her. Can a soul be sealed inside another soul?" "I don't know too much about humans, so I cannot tell you with certainty." Primal Monarch said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1714 Rashara’s System(End of Primal Expanse Arc) "Where am I?" Yuan mumbled as he surveyed his surroundings. However, before he could really pay much attention to his surroundings, he noticed several announcements appearing in the sky almost simultaneously. <Congratulations! Player Yuan has become the first Player to learn a Celestial-rank technique!> <Congratulations! Player Yuan has become the first Player to craft an Empyrean-grade treasure!> <Congratulations! Player Yuan has become the first Player to become a Divine Blacksmith!>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1715 The Ning Family Although Yuan could no longer log off Cultivation Online, he quickly calmed himself down, as there were more important issues at hand. 'If the Celestial Emperor is aware of my presence, should I just remove his curse?' He was slightly worried that the Celestial Emperor could track him through the curse. However, he didn't immediately use the Sacred Chalice of Purification because there was an even higher chance the Celestial Emperor would realize he was still inside Cultivation Online if his curse was broken.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1716 Shura's System "Have you guys received any news from Yuan recently?" Kelan asked the Demon Sealing Faction afterward. Everyone there turned to look at Meixiu and Chu Liuxiang since they were usually the ones in contact with Yuan. "No, I haven't heard from him." Meixiu shook her head.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1717 Tournament of Rising Stars Emperor Ning stood up and began his speech shortly after their arrival. "My Ning Family welcomes you all to this year's Tournament of Rising Stars, where those below the age of 27 may participate, regardless of your background or affiliation!" "Before I reveal the reward, allow me to explain the rules for this tournament first."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1718 Tournament of Rising Stars(2) Once the tournament officially began, a hundred pairs of participants entered their individual platform. Since there were tens of thousands of participants, it'd take weeks if not months to finish the tournament if they did one match at a time. None of the Demon Sealing Faction members were chosen for the first session, so they merely stood in their area and waited for their turn. A few of them were staring at Yuan, trying to analyze him. Li Jinxi had the most intense gaze, but it was not because she recognized Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1719 Tournament of Rising Stars(3) "Spirit Enlightenment, huh? They're grown." Yuan muttered with a smile behind his mask. The Demon Sealing Faction had not only caught up to his cultivation but even surpassed him. Naturally, whether they could hold a candle against him in prowess was an entirely different story. Xi Murong's opponent swallowed nervously after realizing he was at Spirit Enlightenment.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After taking a moment to recall the sect rules, Yuan opened his eyes and spoke in a nervous voice, "According to the sect rules, male and female disciples are forbidden to share the same living quarters unless they are married or have a high-ranking sect elder's permission, and the punishment is at most 3 months of confinement in the Disciplinary Cave..." Fei Yuyan was speechless. Albeit subtly, did Yuan really just refuse her company in his house? What kind of man would refuse to let a beautiful girl stay in their house even if they might receive punishment? If it were any other men that were in Yuan's shoes right now, they would definitely let Fei Yuyan stay in their living quarters without hesitation even if they were to get kicked out of the sect the following day! Fei Yuyuan then spoke with a slight frown on her face, "That rulebook is outdated— it was created thousands of years ago and nobody except a few really even follows it anymore, especially the Inner Court disciples. Furth

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1720 Even More Monstrous Than Yuan "What's there to think about? I can tell you're someone who craves a good battle just as much as I do. Moreover, your physique…" Kelan's gaze lowered to look at Yuan's physique. 'His clothes and boots are both Celestial-grade treasures. Either his family or sect spoiled him, understandably so. This young man is not even 28 years old, and his aura is already this overwhelming. His cultivation is also deceptively low. There's no doubt he can fight someone several realms above his own. Yuan may be a monster, but this guy is on a whole different level!' Kelan compared Yuan to the mysterious monster before him. Although Yuan was wearing clothes that covered most of his skin, Kelan could still tell that he had a powerful physique.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1721 Divine Fist Manifestation "Heavens… a lot has happened since I went to sleep…" Feng Yuxiang couldn't believe how much had happened in such a short amount of time. 'Thank the heavens I woke up this soon. If I had slept any longer…' Feng Yuxiang swallowed nervously. She could imagine sleeping for a decade and waking up to Yuan already achieving immortality. Just the thought of missing Yuan's growth gave Feng Yuxiang a sense of dread. "So, when do you plan on letting them know your true identity?" Feng Yuxiang asked Yuan a few moments later.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1722 Peak of Spirit Enlightenment "What a fierce battle! It's like they're really trying to kill each other!" The spectators were shocked by how intensely Hong Xiuqian and Wang Bingbing were going at each other's throats, almost as if they were before their archenemies. As for the match itself, Hong Xiuqian was successfully blocking all of Wang Bingbing's sword strikes. Moreover, his fists were still in great condition, unlike their previous match, where his fists would be bruised by the end.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1723 The Top 20 "He'd kill everyone here over something like that? He sounds like a villain." Yuan said, joining the conversation. "Well… I'm not saying he'll definitely do it, but he is very much capable. That man is a crazed bastard who'd aim his sword at the heavens without any hesitation if needed." Kelan said, completely unaware that he was talking to Yuan. "Sounds like you're scared of him. Is he more powerful than you?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1724 Fire Harmony "That was your first strike," Yuan said to Xing Chen after tanking his attack without a single scratch on his neck. "N-no way…" Xing Chen hastily jumped back. 'There's no way he actually defended against such a powerful strike with his naked neck! He must've used an illusion or something to make it look like that!' Xing Chen refused to believe that a Spirit Grandmaster had managed to eat one of his most powerful strikes and come out unscathed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1725 Fighting Chu Liuxiang <Cold Resistance has improved> A simple notification appeared when Yuan took Chu Liuxiang's ice technique with his bare body. 'Oh? I can temper my body like this?' He smiled inwardly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1726 Cold Resistance "N-no… let's think about this properly… There's no way anyone could achieve resistance after just a few minutes from that level of attack. He must've already been on the verge of attaining cold resistance before fighting her. Yup. This has to be the explanation." Kelan suddenly convinced himself that this must be the explanation, as he found it impossible to believe that Yuan had started from nothing and attained cold resistance in just a few minutes. In other words, he was in denial, unable to accept the reality of Yuan's rapid progress. Meanwhile, on the stage, Chu Liuxiang was sweating buckets after exhausting all of her spiritual energy. Unbeknownst to her, her efforts ended up benefiting Yuan greatly. "Thank you for the training. It helped me a lot." Yuan said to her afterward.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1727 Fighting Xi Murong "Che!" Xi Murong sucked his teeth when Yuan could see through his movement technique, but he wasn't too surprised, considering his opponent was a genius from the upper heavens. Right as Yuan's spear reached him, Xi Murong's speed abruptly increased, and his figure disappeared again. A split second later, Xi Murong appeared behind Yuan with his dagger diving toward his neck.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1728 End of Tournament of Rising Stars "A heaven-defying talent that would make even the most talented individuals in the Nine Heavens look ordinary. I don't believe such a being exists, nor am I going to waste my time finding out," said a handsome man with long black hair tied into a ponytail. The second Celestial Overlord looked at Xu Jiaqi and said, "Why don't you go and check him out, Senior Sister Xu? It's been a while since you last recruited someone with significant talents in the faction." "…" Xu Jiaqi remained silent; as did Senior Bai.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1729 Three to Four Realms Since not just the arenas but the entire stadium was protected by formations, Li Jinxi and Yuan's fight would not be deadly—as long as they didn't go overboard. "Whenever you are ready." Yuan stood before Li Jinxi with a calm demeanor, almost as if she was no different than the others. "Before we fight, how about we make another rule? To allow the usage of treasures above Spirit-grade? I don't think we'll be able to have a proper fight with so many limitations."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Anyway, now that we have permission, I'll be staying here until the competition finishes." Fei Yuyan said to him in a slightly angry voice, clearly unhappy about the way Yuan had handled this situation. "By the way, I won't be here at night and will return in the morning." Yuan suddenly said to her as she went to look for an empty room. "What? Why not? Where are you going that requires you to stay outside all night?" Fei Yuyan asked him with raised eyebrows. "I'm not going anywhere— I just won't be available until the morning," Yuan said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1730 Reincarnators With his True Dragon Awakening, Yuan was able to withstand Li Jinxi's cultivation at the fourth level of Divine Grandmaster whilst only being a Spirit Grandmaster himself. His Chaotic Dragon Core also assisted him even though he didn't utilize any of his chaotic essence. Li Jinxi's swordsmanship was perfect, but in terms of combat experience, she was still far behind Yuan, even if her past experience was taken into account.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1731 Killing Li Jinx The entire stadium became dead silent after Yuan killed Li Jinxi, most of it due to the system's interference, as Li Jinxi was a player. <Sword God's Apex Sword Art learned> Despite the notification, Yuan didn't budge an inch, almost as if he'd become a stone statue. However, if one were to look underneath his clothes, one would see his entire body covered in sweat.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1732 Revealing His Identity Sometime later, Yuan and Kelan went over to Emperor Ning to say goodbye. "Before you leave, can you give this reward to that young lady who won the tournament?" Emperor Ning handed the Innate Miracle Pill to Kelan. Kelan brought the Demon Sealing Faction and Yuan to a nearby area afterward.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1733 Inevitable Involvement "So your destination is the Dragon Spiral Mountain in the Seventh Heaven, huh. Do you intend on going straight there?" Kelan asked after hearing his plans. "That… I am not sure yet. I am afraid that I might reveal my presence if I ascend normally," Yuan shook his head. When a player successfully ascends to the next realm, there will always be an announcement, and it paves the way for the other players, allowing everyone to ascend.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1734 Kelan's Plan "What's with you and sparring?" Yuan sighed. "How about this? Instead of sparring with a suppressed cultivation, we will have a real fight when I catch up to your cultivation. You'll also have more fun that way." "What? That'll take forever! I want to fight you right now!" Kelan said, sounding like a spoiled brat. Yuan rubbed his eyes and said in a defeated voice, "Fine, I'll spar with you, but it'll only be for a little."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1735 Growing Stronger Without Doing Anything "Sorry if I made you guys worry. As you can see, I am perfectly alive and healthy. Moreover, I've come back even stronger!" Feng Yuxiang spoke with a prideful manner, her nose pointed toward the sky. "Now that you mention it, your appearance and presence is different from before… How did you grow stronger while in such a state?" Xi Meili asked with raised eyebrows. While most beings experience exponential growth after near-death experiences, Feng Yuxiang's situation was different.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1736 Internal Strife "W-wait a second. Repeat that, and speak slower this time." Senior Bai said, doubting his hearing just now. Kelan cleared his throat and repeated in a slow and clear voice, "Yuan has returned from the Primal Expanse, and the mysterious monster surnamed Xiao I wanted you to recruit turned out to be Yuan in disguise… I just found this out…" "Yuan is back from the Primal Expanse…?" Xu Jiaqi muttered in a dazed voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1737 Fateful Reincarnation "Hm? Is that what I said?" Yuan casually shrugged it off and continued, "Anyway, I understand the situation, and I don't blame Miss Xu for her decision." "You can tell her that yourself when she arrives in a bit. Also, you have to tell her about your situation with the Celestial Emperor," said Kelan. Yuan nodded, "I will."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1738 Removed From the Celestial Overlords "And once you've become a True Immortal, I will help you regain your previous position in the Celestial Overlords." Xu Jiaqi said. Originally, she planned on uniting the Celestial Overlords by herself, but with Yuan's Fateful Reincarnation, she tossed all of her initial plans down the drain to help Yuan ascend the Celestial Overlords. She was confident that Yuan had reincarnated to help the Celestial Overlords. Sometime later, Xu Jiaqi retrieved Yuan's Celestial Overlords symbol and rank, essentially removing him from the faction.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1739 Celestial Overlord Qiang "Celestial Overlord Xu, I am going to bring his friends to my sect in the Seventh Heaven, and I am going to train them until Yuan makes his way there," Kelan said to Xu Jiaqi after Yuan's matter was settled. She nodded, "I understand. I will help you with the arrangements." Kelan bowed to her, "Thank you!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Who are you calling a dog?! I am Xuan Wuhan, a Core Disciple!" Xuan Wuhan responded to Fei Yuyan's words. "Disciple Xuan?" Fei Yuyan's eyes widened with surprise when she saw Xuan Wuhan's familiar face standing right in front of her, and she continued, "What are you doing here so late at night?" "Eh? Disciple Fei?" Xuan Wuhan's eyes also widened with shock when she saw a familiar face. She then looked at the building number to make sure that she was in the right place. However, she suddenly recalled that they were currently at the Outer Court. Even if this wasn't Yuan's building, what is a Core Disciple like Fei Yuyan doing here?

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1740 Qiang Qing Yun's Invitation "This is a little sudden. Why do you wish to recruit me when you don't even know anything about me?" Yuan asked. He didn't want to outright reject Qiang Qing Yun's invitation without having a conversation, as it would be incredibly rude and somewhat suspicious. Moreover, he wanted to befriend her if possible, as it would benefit Xu Jiaqi and the Celestial Overlords.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1741 The First Players to Ascend to the Seventh Heaven "I shall wait for your response here." Qiang Qing Yun said a moment later. "Alright." Yuan nodded. Their conversation ended there, and Qiang Qing Yun waved goodbye as Yuan walked out of the restaurant.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1742 Rejoining the Celestial Overlords "R-really?! You'll join the Celestial Overlords?!" Qiang Qing Yun immediately became ecstatic, feeling like she was floating in the heavens from bliss. She had prepared to fight tooth and nail for Yuan, and she'd even prepared some treasures just in case. However, the recruitment had gone unexpectedly smoothly and without any hiccups. "Um, before you celebrate, I have some conditions." Yuan suddenly said, halting her celebration.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1743 Nine Random Players "Anyway, now that your friends have ascended and your situation with Celestial Overlord Qiang is over, it's time for me to leave as well. Don't forget your promise." Kelan said as he stared at Yuan. "What promise?" Yuan teased. "Our fight! We'll fight once you reach the Seventh Heaven and travel to the Nine Heavens with your real body!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1744 Ascending to the Fifth Heaven Shortly before Yuan arrived at the Stairway to Heaven, he was stopped by Xi Meili. "Hey, do you think I can challenge the Stairway to Heaven by myself?" Xi Meili asked him. "Hm? If that's what you want, go ahead. I have no real reason to stop you." Yuan responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1745 The Location to Tian Qiyuan's Secret Vault Long before he was recognized as the God of Creation, Tian Qiyuan maintained a secret vault to store all his most precious materials and completed creations. Within this vault lay countless Celestial-grade treasures that he had never revealed to the public, along with priceless materials so rare they could easily spark a bloody war. During Tian Qiyuan's era, many speculated about the existence of such a treasure vault, though none could prove it. However, just before his mysterious disappearance, Tian Qiyuan shocked the world by announcing that he had hidden his vault somewhere in the Nine Heavens. He declared that whoever found it could claim every treasure within for themselves, sparking an uproar that rippled through the entire world, igniting a fevered hunt that continued to this very day. Countless blacksmiths and cultivators scoured every corner of the world in search of Tian Qiyuan's treasure vault, yet none succeeded in u

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1746 Arriving at the Fifth Heaven <You have started your last trial in the Stairway to Heaven> As the scenery shifted, Yuan found himself standing under a clear blue sky on a vast, empty, circular platform that resembled a stage. The area was expansive and open, with no obstacles in sight, as if it were designed specifically for a performance or a duel. <Survive for an hour>

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1747 Second Ancient Seal [I was carried to the Fifth Heaven by an NPC!] [We somehow reached the Fifth Heaven?!] [Nine players were carried to the Fifth Heaven by a mysterious NPC!]

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1748 Shadow Army Rank Structure "Yes, it is exactly that Dragon King." Dong Ye confirmed, almost as if he could read Yuan's mind. "In order to protect your identity from the Celestial Emperor, I had his memories, as well as everyone else involved with you, erased," he explained. Yuan's eyes widened.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1749 Visiting the Royal Dragon Family Again "I remember the man who entered the Fairy Paradise a little over three years ago. However, I don't think he's the person you're looking for." Fairy Empress shook her head. "What? Why do you say that?" Tan Songyun asked with a puzzled frown on her face. "The man you're looking for is a human, right?" Fairy Empress asked for confirmation.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Xuan Wuhan… What's her relationship with Disciple Yuan, really?" Fei Yuyan mumbled to herself as she entered her bed to sleep, but alas, it took her another hour to fall asleep again, mostly because she kept wondering about Xuan Wuhan and Yuan's relationship. As for Xuan Wuhan, she reluctantly left the area, but she did not return to her own house. Instead, she went to bother Elder Xuan, her grandfather. "Heavens… What did I just witness?" Min Li covered her mouth in shock after eavesdropping on Xuan Wuhan and Fei Yuyan's small argument. This is the first time she's ever heard of two Core Disciples arguing with each other over an Outer Court disciple. 'It's fine… Even though I may be at a disadvantage in terms of our disciple status, I will sooner or later become a Core Disciple, and I am also from one of the Seven Legacy Families! Furthermore, my appearance isn't worse than theirs— at least I don't think I am losing in that aspect!' Min Li thought to herself, trying to convince herse

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1750 Visiting the Royal Dragon Family Again(2) "What's going on? Why are the Ancient Seals an issue?" The Dragon King inquired. Xi Meili responded, "We have credible intel of a traitor amongst the Ancient Seal holders." "What? A traitor?" The Dragon King's eyes widened with shock and disbelief.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1751 Embroidery "You want to know about the Xi Family? It'll have to depend on your questions since some information cannot be disclosed." Xi Meili said. Shen Shi nodded and asked, "Then can you tell me what life is like in the Xi Family for you?" "Life is boring." Xi Meili sighed. "As a princess from a royal family yourself, you should know what I mean. We spend most of our time studying and cultivating long before we even learn to run, and there's always a certain level of expectations for our every action. There are a lot of things that I wish to do but cannot do solely because of my background. It's a little suffocating at times if I have to be honest." Shen Shi's eyes flickered with emotion after hearing her own experience and feelings from Xi Meili's mouth. "I understand!" she said, "And I'm sure it's a lot worse for you, who is from the Supreme Heaven! I cannot even begin to fathom your hardships…"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1752 Vengeful Fairies Shortly before Tan Songyun arrived at the Shen Family, as Shen Shi became more comfortable with the art of embroidery, she turned to Yuan and asked, "Your Majesty, may I ask about your hobbies?" "I enjoy playing music," he said. "The zither, especially." "Wow! Does that mean you also know the art of sound cultivation?" "Somewhat. I can play a song if you'd like," said Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1753 Tossed Aside Like Trash "Do you mind giving us some space?" Yuan asked the guards surrounding them. "B-but what if she attacks you?" "I'll be fine. She won't be able to hurt me," said Yuan, his voice filled with confidence.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1754 The Dragon King's Return As Tan Songyun's fingers touched the zither, the melodies that flowed captivated everyone who heard them, drawing them into a trance. When Yuan recognized the song Tan Songyun had specifically chosen, a slight smile appeared on his face. However, the song was traditionally accompanied by a voice, and since Tan Songyun played only the zither, it felt incomplete. A minute later, Tan Songyun stopped playing the zither to look at Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1755 A Fraud "I have already spoken and settled things with the Dragon Emperor, so why are you trying to start something you cannot end properly, Dragon King?" Tan Songyun removed her veil again, revealing her face to him. "Y-you are!" the Dragon King swiftly recognized her beautiful face, "You're the Zither Goddess—the one who was always beside the Fairy Empress! You left the Fairy Paradise and ascended to the Sixth Heaven just a few hundred years ago, and you've already managed to become an Immortal?!" Not only was Dragon King familiar with her, he'd seen her on multiple occasions with the Fairy Empress. Although they were not friends, they were somewhat acquaintances.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1756 Doubting Their Identities "Z-Zither Goddess, I am going to ask you a question, and you'll need to answer me as if your life depends on it." The Dragon King spoke with a grim expression shortly after Tan Songyun exposed the Dragon Emperor. Tan Songyun didn't wait for the question and responded, "That Dragon Emperor is a fake, and I am willing to stake my life on this claim."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1757 Dragon Blood Carp With Yuan's approval, the Dragon King said, "In that case, follow me." The Dragon King led Yuan to an area within the Shen Family's territory. At first glance, it appeared to be a serene garden, but scattered among the greenery were several unusual objects that seemed out of place in such a setting. One of these objects was a stone statue carved into the shape of a dragon's head, resting majestically atop a stone pedestal. This dragon's head had its mouth open and tongue slightly sticking out. "This statue can determine whether someone is a dragon or not by assessing their blood. Before we begin the real assessment, we need to make sure you are a real dragon," said the Dragon King.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1758 Dragon Blood Carp(2) The instant the Dragon Blood Carp sensed Yuan's blood entering the pond, it rushed over with the desperation of a starving creature. However, instead of consuming the blood immediately, it paused and stared at it intently, almost as if it couldn't believe it was being offered such precious blood. Naturally, the Dragon King wasn't aware of this, and in his eyes, the Dragon Blood Carp had refused Yuan's blood. "I knew it! Dragon Emperor, my ass! I knew you were a phony this entire time!" The Dragon King pointed at Yuan and started cursing out loud.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1759 Acquiring the Second Ancient Seal "Despite your earlier disrespectful behavior, I forgave you and allowed you to walk away," Yuan said to Tan Songyun, his tone cold and unyielding. "But you chose to persist in slandering me. While I am forgiving, my patience has its limits. This time, Lady Tan, you haven't just slandered me—you've also involved the Shen Family in your reckless actions." "I have no excuses," Tan Songyun said, her voice weak and apologetic. "My hatred and desire for revenge clouded my judgment. If you wish to take my life for offending you, I will not protest. However, I humbly plead with you to spare the Shen Family." "At least you can admit when you are wrong. Unfortunately, you are not in a position to make any request at this moment."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Once the guests were seated and he was prepared to play the zither, Yuan placed his fingers on the zither and began pulling the strings, causing them to tremble and send out musical notes that massaged one's brain and transported their mind to the heavens. Xuan Wuhan and Min Li's jaw simultaneously dropped to the ground when they heard Yuan playing the zither for the first time, looking like they'd just witnessed their ancestors crawling from their graves, and it'd only taken them a few seconds to recognize Yuan's talents. 'This guy…! He's not only talented in cultivation but he's also talented with instruments? Is there anything he's not talented in?' Xuan Wuhan cried inwardly. 'What amazing music that he's producing… Not even the expert musicians in my family can play the zither as well as he does…' Min Li thought to herself.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1760 Existential Crisis "Can you elaborate?" Yuan asked a moment later. Tan Songyun frowned and said, "I don't mean to be rude, but why are you so interested in my business, Dragon Emperor? I thought dragons couldn't care less about species that don't have dragon blood flowing through their veins." "Where did you hear that? I'm actually very interested in humans, especially those who are willing to offend a Dragon Emperor for their revenge."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1761 Tan Songyun's Decision Tan Songyun recalled every moment of the year she had spent with Tian Kai—the emotions that had consumed her, the warmth of his presence, and the touch of his fingers on her body. Then, she remembered the countless rumors she had heard about Tian Kai over tens of thousands of years, along with the hatred and anger that had festered within her. While the year she had spent with Tian Kai had been filled with joy, she couldn't simply cast aside the anguish and betrayal that had consumed her for thousands of years, as if it had never existed. Even if the rumors were untrue and Tian Kai was innocent, the anguish Tan Songyun had endured was undeniably real and couldn't simply be dismissed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1762 Five Breakthrough Towers Sometime after explaining the situation to Tan Songyun, Yuan made his way to the Stairway to Heaven. However, upon arriving at the Stairway to Heaven, Yuan noticed that there were only a few individuals present, and most of them weren't participants, but spectators gathered to see the participants off. Since Yuan had entered the Fifth Heaven alone, the rest of the player base was still stuck in the Fourth Heaven. As a result, it was essentially impossible for him to carry nine individuals through the Stairway to Heaven by himself.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1763 Metal Tower Yuan pointed to a tall tower-like building in the distance and asked, "Is that one of these Breakthrough Towers?" The woman nodded, "Yes, that would be the Metal Tower." "Where can I find the other towers?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1764 Metal Tower(2) To capture the Metal Tower's attention, most blacksmiths showcase their creations on the tower's first floor, which also serves as an open marketplace. However, despite the abundance of talented blacksmiths, only about ten individuals gain the Metal Tower's recognition every few hundred years. "I've been selling my creations here for about a hundred years now," the man said. "In all that time, I've only seen three people be recognized by the Metal Tower. But let me tell you, being recognized doesn't mean you'll be accepted—that's an entirely different matter." "I see. Thank you for the information," Yuan said to the man.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1765 Metal Tower(3) "What do you think? Did I pass the assessment?" Yuan asked the dumbfounded old man, who was staring at the finished treasure with wide eyes filled with disbelief. Although smithing had advanced significantly since Tian Qiyuan's era, with the emergence of many more Divine Blacksmiths, Tian Qiyuan's smithing skills remained unparalleled. "C-can I examine the treasure?" the old man asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1766 Metal Tower(4) Noticing the commotion between Yuan and the man, the nearby blacksmiths eventually approached them and asked, "What's going on here?" "This bastard here is mocking us, blacksmiths! Listen to this—" the man proceeded to explain the whole situation to the others. Naturally, he spoke from his point of view, labeling Yuan as the bad guy. "He most likely purchased those treasures from somewhere."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1767 A Chance of Redemption After putting away Number One Under Heaven, Yuan continued walking toward the exit. Seeing this, the handsome man snapped out of his daze and shouted, "Halt!" However, Yuan kept on walking, and he spoke as he walked, "Who do you think you are to stop me from leaving? You already said my treasures are not worth the Metal Tower's attention, so why would I continue wasting time here? Let's not waste each other's time."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1768 Martial Tower To improve a martial technique, one must first learn and master it. For Yuan, who had lived multiple lives as powerful immortals, each reigning supreme in their respective eras, this process came naturally. His vast experience with countless techniques made him exceptionally adept in this domain. After spending a few hours carefully studying the jade tablet with the Ancient-rank technique, Yuan fully grasped it. He then spent the rest of the day with his eyes closed, mentally practicing the martial technique as if he were crafting a treasure within his mind, refining every detail and perfecting it in his imagination. If it weren't for a disturbance, he would've spent some more time inside his mind.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1769 Martial Tower(2) "I see… so it only took you a day to improve an Ancient-rank technique. Your wisdom and talent is very impressive. How about joining our Martial Tower? Let us usher martial techniques into a new era together!" said Lord Zi. Yuan then said, "I can join the Martial Tower, but will I be allowed to visit the other Breakthrough Towers afterward?" Lord Zi nodded, "Of course. While we are very competitive with each other, we all have similar goals and ambitions. We won't bar you from joining other towers just because you are associated with another tower."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Anyway, since I've missed half of today's practice, let's do something different. I had planned on doing something similar to our practice yesterday, but alas…" Fei Yuyan sighed. And she continued, "Do you remember what I said about last competition's final part— where you must follow the judge and play their song alongside them? This is what we're going to be doing today. I will play a song and you'll play alongside me." Yuan nodded, and he asked afterward, "Are we going to play a new song?" "Of course. The judges will create a new song just for the competition so nobody besides themselves would know the song beforehand, as that would give the participants an unfair advantage and we don't want that."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1770 Creating a New Martial Technique After returning to the seclusion chamber, Yuan sat down and closed his eyes, entering a state of deep contemplation about the martial technique he intended to create. Unlike crafting treasures of specific ranks, creating a martial technique was far more unpredictable and perplexing. Even if Yuan aimed to create a Mythic-rank technique, there was no guarantee it would achieve that rank. It could just as easily result in an Ancient-rank technique or even something of lower rank, depending on the execution and refinement of his concept. However, there was a method to increase the likelihood of creating martial techniques of a specific rank— by combining two or more techniques of that rank. By merging their principles and mechanics, one could craft a new, often more powerful, technique that retained the essence of its predecessors while pushing beyond its original limitations.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1771 God of War’s Final Execution "W-what a terrifying technique…" Lord Zi muttered, his voice trembling as he stared at the avatar. He could feel an overwhelming sense of dread emanating from it, his entire being shuddering in a mixture of fear and awe. Although Yuan had initially intended to combine only Nine Supreme Swords and Asura's Blade of Execution, he found himself incorporating elements of God of War's Astral Arts into the mix. "I call this technique… God of War's Final Execution."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1772 Cultivation Tower After learning the martial technique Shadow Veil, Yuan left the Martial Tower to visit another Breakthrough Tower. However, upon leaving the tower, he noticed an individual standing right outside. This person was Apprentice Huan, who had decided to remain outside the Martial Tower to wait for Yuan. After all, he couldn't return to the Metal Tower without Yuan. The moment Apprentice Huan noticed Yuan coming out, he rushed over to block his path.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1773 Cultivation Tower(2) As Yuan followed the examiner inside the Cultivation Tower, the man said, "Let me introduce myself first. My name is Ming Wu, and I have been working at the Cultivation Tower for over five thousand years." "My name is Yuan." "How long have you been with the Martial Tower?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1774 Cultivation Tower(3) "Y-you're done? It's only been two days, you know? There's no way you finished two Ancient-rank techniques in two days," Ming Wu shook his head, refusing to believe Yuan. "Allow me to prove it." However, Ming Wu raised his hand and said, "Wait! Let me contact someone first!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1775 Successor of the Cultivation Tower "Now that you're my successor and apprentice, I'll have you call me Master," said Meng Xuan with a slight smile on her face. Yuan nodded and said, "Master, before we start training, I would like to check out the other Breakthrough Towers." "Why? Is the Cultivation Tower and Martial Tower not enough for you?" Meng Xuan asked with a slight frown on her face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1776 Level 4 Array Master After arriving in the city home to the Array Tower, Yuan was immediately struck by the sheer number of formations that filled the area. The bustling streets were a showcase of intricate arrays and formations, seamlessly integrated into everyday life. From glowing defensive barriers that protected the buildings to automated market stalls and transportation platforms powered by arrays. Compared to all the other places Yuan had visited in the Nine Heavens, this city had an almost futuristic appearance. Moreover, the formations grew increasingly impressive as Yuan approached the Array Tower. The tower itself was a marvel of formation craftsmanship, its structure covered in profound Tier 7 and above formations that radiated an aura of power and complexity.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1777 Level 5 Array Master "Are you going to take the level 5 assessment immediately, too?" one of the judges asked Yuan after he passed the level 4 assessment. "If I fail it, how long do I have to wait for a second chance?" Yuan asked, just in case. "You will need to wait six months before you can attempt another assessment if you fail."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1778 Array Tower "For the final test, you must activate two level 5 formations—one defense and one offensive—simultaneously and keep them activated for an hour without any external assistance, such as spirit stones. You have five minutes to prepare," said Hao Chen. Any Array Master could easily activate a single formation and sustain it using spirit stones. However, activating and maintaining two formations simultaneously was far more challenging. It required significantly more spiritual energy and placed a substantial burden on one's soul strength. Yuan spent a few minutes mentally preparing himself. Once he was ready, he recreated the offensive formation and defensive formation he showcased during the last two tests.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 1779 Array Tower(2) When Yuan's Level 2 attack formations struck the woman's defensive formation, the impact was powerful enough to cause the entire thing to shake and large cracks to appear on its surface. The woman gritted her teeth as she poured her spiritual energy into the formation, quickly restoring it. However, the damage to her formation had also depleted some of her soul strength, something not easily recoverable. 'Not good! At this rate, his level 3 attack formations will be enough to destroy my defensive formation!'
