Yet, despite this, he did not rely on his family even in the slightest and left home at a young age to travel the Nine Heavens.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2016: Holy Sword Clan(4) “Um… before I strike at the wall, do you mind calling Elder Li here?” Yuan asked after catching the Spirit-grade sword. “Why? Are you worried that I might do something to you?” The Holy Sword Maiden spoke with a frown. “No, that’s not it. I just don’t want to do this again later.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2017: Holy Sword Clan(5) “Hey.” The Holy Sword Maiden suddenly called out, snapping Li Bowen out of his daze. When he turned to look at her, she held a sword-shaped badge in front of her, seemingly offering it to him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2018: Entering the Starry Sky After spending a few days in the library, Yuan went back to his room, where he tried to learn Supreme Sword Aura. Despite having the understanding, memories, and experience of using Supreme Sword Aura as Tian Xin, Yuan couldn’t use it for some reason, almost as if his attempt was being blocked by an unseen force. After failing several times, Yuan stopped trying and began focusing on his soul strength instead. Since there was no limit to how strong his soul strength could get, it was his current priority.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2019: White Serpent in the Starry Sky Yuan could scarcely believe his eyes as he watched the white serpent drift through the starry sky, devouring stars in its wake. “Xingrui…” Yuan muttered this name. It was likely that this entity was the Eater of Stars—one of the Nine Divine Supreme—who had vanished since the Immortal Monarch’s Era. The evidence wasn’t conclusive, but in Yuan’s eyes, there was no doubt.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After returning to the Royal Blossom Hotel, Elder Shan sighed while looking at Yuan, "I knew you'd attract Sect Master Song's attention at the competition with your talents, but I didn't think we'd encounter her before the competition, and she'd even gone as far as trying to poach you. This is going to be problematic…" "Why would it be problematic? I have already refused her invitation to join the Heavenly Melody Academy," Yuan said. "Just because you'd refused her invitation doesn't mean she'll give up on you, Disciple Yuan. And knowing Senior Song's character, she'll most likely continue trying to poach you until she gets tired of it, which might take a couple of years if not decades..." "Hopefully the Sect Master can convince Senior Song to give up." Elder Xuan sighed loudly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2020: Holy Sword Temple “Whenever you’re ready to begin the trial, activate your Sword Aura and use it to protect your body,” said the Sixth Elder after Yuan stepped onto the platform. “The Blade of Tribulation won’t attack unless it senses your Sword Aura.” Yuan silently nodded in acknowledgement and took a moment to prepare himself. Then, without hesitation, he unleashed as much Enhanced Sword Aura as he could muster. The Sixth Elder’s eyes widened with awe when she sensed Yuan’s Enhanced Sword Aura.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2021: Holy Sword Temple(2) “The door is opening…?” The Sixth Elder mumbled. However, she didn’t think it had anything to do with Yuan and figured it was just a coincidence—that the person inside was finished with their training. In the very next moment, the Sixth Elder watched as someone emerged from the Holy Sword Temple—no, they were launched out, as if forcefully ejected.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2022: Holy Sword Temple(3) “What the hell was that?!” The Sect Leader exclaimed with a confused face after stabilizing himself. “W-What just happened?” The Sixth Elder asked even though she already had an idea of what he was going to say. “I don’t know. After I entered the temple, I felt a powerful force pulling me back before I even made it to the other side. The next thing I knew, I was outside again,” said the Sect Leader, disbelief etched across his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2023: Holy Sword Temple(4) “So, what should we do about the Holy Sword Temple? We don’t know what’s causing it to reject people.” The Sixth Elder looked at the Sword Empress for her thoughts. The Sword Empress shrugged, “How the hell am I supposed to know? Unless the creator of the temple is here, there’s no way we will know for sure.” “The God of Creation…? He died several eras ago, so that’s impossible.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2024: True Enhanced Sword Aura “Are you satisfied now?” Yuan asked the Sword Empress once it was clear whose Enhanced Sword Aura was stronger. The Sword Empress withdrew her sword aura, but she remained silent, seemingly trying to comprehend the situation. How can a mere mortal have a deeper understanding of sword aura than a Sword Emperor, someone who has hundreds of thousands of years of experience? It just didn’t make sense no matter how she thought about it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2025: True Sword Body After attaining True Enhanced Sword Aura, Yuan’s combat prowess surged to a new level. Tian Xin’s perfected Enhanced Sword Aura was no longer a threat, and each clash ended the same, with Yuan’s aura shattering Tian Xin’s like a rock smashing through glass. Just a few hours after acquiring True Enhanced Sword Aura, Yuan defeated Tian Xin, putting an end to their year-long battle. Tian Xin sat on the ground with half of his body severed, but since he was just an illusion, there was no blood, and he could still talk.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2026: Supreme Sword Aura “Supreme Sword Aura… I’ve missed this feeling,” Yuan muttered to himself, savoring the overwhelming power coursing through him. But he wasn’t content. If he intended to compete in the Sword Emperor Qualifications, his current mastery wouldn’t be enough. At the very least, he needed to gain true control over it. “Hey, I know you’re far more capable than what you’ve shown me so far.” Yuan suddenly said to him. “Fight me with all you’ve got.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2027: Leaving the Holy Sword Temple Yuan followed the Sixth Elder to the same golden carriage that had brought him to the Holy Sword Temple years ago. Once inside, the flying treasure immediately began to move, but it moved at a much quicker pace than before. “We will arrive directly at the Gates of Heaven in one month, so we have plenty of time to talk.” Yuan had hoped to visit the Super Perfect Physique Tempering Sect first, but time was short. Besides, he was fairly certain they would already be at the Gates of Heaven since he had mentioned his intention to enter the Sword Emperor Qualifications, after all.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2028: You Better Remember My Name! When they arrived at their destination, Yuan noticed a few familiar faces, all standing before a fist-sized red crystal that floated on a circular platform. The first familiar face was Li Bowen from the Holy Sword Clan, and then there was the potty-mouthed Sword Empress. The other familiar faces were obviously the Holy Sword Maiden and the Holy Sword King. Right as their arrival, Yuan could see a handsome man standing before the red crystal with a sword in his grasp and his body gushing with Supreme Sword Aura.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2029: A Month Delay “You’ll defeat me? I’ll look forward to it,” Yuan calmly responded to the Holy Sword King’s aggression. The Sword Empress merely shook her head in silence. Although she wanted to smack some sense into the Holy Sword King’s head, there was also no guarantee that Yuan would win the Sword Emperor Qualifications just because his Supreme Sword Aura was stronger. The qualifications tested more than just the strength of one’s Supreme Sword Aura. It also evaluated the swordmaster’s skill, versatility, and overall mastery of their swordsmanship. After all, becoming a Sword Emperor demanded more than raw power, and only the most refined and knowledgeable swordmasters could earn such a prestigious title.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After Senior Zou mumbled about the competition and some of its history, he turned to look at Song Ling'er and spoke, "Senior Song, are we ready to start the competition?" "..." However, almost as though she didn't hear him, Song Ling'er did not respond to his question, making Senior Zou repeat his words for a second time. "Senior Song, are we ready to start the competition?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2030: Sword Emperor Qualifications “I’ll let Overlord Bai know that you’re here,” Kelan said as he sent a message to Senior Bai through his communication jade slip. Meanwhile, Yuan began recalling his experience at the Holy Sword Clan and the Holy Sword Temple. The others didn’t have much to talk about since they spent all of their time training. “Although we’re spending all of our time training now, we’ll be leaving the sect to train outside and gain real experience soon,” said Wang Ming.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2031: Nine Heavens’ Ranking “I apologize if my words offended you, but I can assure you that I don’t think of the Sword Emperor Qualification as a game,” said Yuan. “Hmph.” The Sword Empress snorted. “Whatever, I’ve lost my desire to spar now.” Without saying another word, she turned around and flew away.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2032: Heavenly Son “Heavens… she managed to reach the top 2 just by showcasing her prowess? I cannot imagine how powerful she must’ve been,” Wang Ming commented. “What about Cultivation Gods and entities like the Great One?” Yuan then asked. Kelan chuckled and said, “Cultivation Gods? You can count the number of them with one hand. They’re too powerful to be in the ranking. The same goes for the Great One. The ranking is mostly for those within the God Ascension realm, after all.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2033: Sword Emperor Qualifications Begins! “If you say so,” Yuan calmly responded to Tian Yuexing’s words. “Then I’ll see you during the Sword Emperor Qualifications,” said Tian Yuexing before flying away and disappearing in the blink of an eye. “My god, I can believe you actually picked a fight with the Heavenly Son…” Kelan said with a dumbfounded look on his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2034: Mystic Sword Tablet When the spectators looked closely at Yuan’s appearance, many raised their eyebrows. “Hey, isn’t that the Faceless Sword Emperor’s appearance?” “Who is this guy, and why is he dressing up as one of the greatest Sword Emperors to ever exist?”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2035: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ First Trial As the man rose to his feet, Yuan came to a halt, his focus sharpening as he watched the stranger’s every move. Without warning, the man drew the sword at his waist and unleashed a swift slash from afar, sending a powerful wave of ordinary Sword Aura hurtling toward Yuan. Yet, Yuan didn’t move a muscle and allowed the Sword Aura to hit him, and when it did, the Sword Aura shattered into countless fragments like glass.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2036: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ First Trial(2) While Yuan stood surrounded by thousands of masked men, the other participants were still making their way toward the end of the path. Although many had figured out the trial’s pattern just as quickly as Yuan, they struggled to overcome their opponents. Their Sword Auras lacked the overwhelming force Yuan possessed, requiring multiple strikes to break through the masked men’s defenses. Of course, Tian Yuexing was an exception. As expected of the number one young genius in the Nine Heavens, he had reached the end of the path nearly at the same time as Yuan. The spectators watching this were simply left dumbfounded by Yuan’s unexpected prowess and talents.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2037: Immediately Starting the Second Trial Shortly after destroying all of the swords, a portal appeared before Yuan, prompting him to enter it. “I guess this is it for the first trial…” Yuan mumbled as he walked straight into the portal, leaving the trial and returning to the platform. “Heavens… he’s already finished the first trial? And it hasn’t even been a full day!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2038: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Second Trial After stepping through the second door, Yuan found himself in a familiar setup—a solitary path stretching ahead, offering only one direction: forward. But unlike before, it wasn’t a dirt path flanked by trees. This time, he stood on a narrow platform, sandwiched between two vast, seemingly endless seas on either side, their shimmering surfaces stretching out to the horizon. Though the surface of the sea was calm and without any ripples, like that of a glass of water resting on a table, Yuan could sense countless sea beasts stirring beneath the tranquil waters, their presence concealed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2039: Tian Yuexing’s First Trial It took almost an entire day, but Tian Yuexing finally defeated all of the masked men. “This is just the first trial, but I am already sweating. Why’d they make this year’s qualification so difficult? Is it because of my reputation?” Tian Yuexing wondered out loud as he waited for the portal to appear so he could leave, unaware that the trial had yet to end. However, he would soon learn the truth when nothing happened for several hours.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After her explosive announcement, Song Ling'er returned to her seat in a casual manner, almost like it was just another day for her. Meanwhile, the crowd exploded into another commotion. "Senior Fairy Song will be accepting another disciple?! But if I remember correctly, she'd mentioned that she won't be accepting any more disciples after accepting her current two disciples six years ago!" However, not everybody was excited about Song Ling'er's announcement.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2040: Reaching the End of the Second Trial After spending two days in the second trial, Yuan progressed to the point where he had to face hundreds of sea creatures at once with each encounter. Fortunately, their attacks were still predictable and straightforward as long as he paid attention to the ripples appearing in the water. Yuan had also realized that the sea creatures only appeared when he advanced, each encounter seemingly triggered by crossing an invisible threshold. This meant he could have paused between battles, taken breaks, and prepared for each wave. But he chose not to, and for the past two days, he had moved without rest, facing each encounter head-on with unwavering resolve, as if testing the limits of both the trial and himself. Yuan’s performance was nothing short of astonishing, leaving the spectators speechless, many with their mouths agape, unable to believe what they were witnessing.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2041: True Emperor of the Seas With a black body, pearlescent texture, and colorful circles all around its body, the squid-like sea creature that appeared before Yuan resembled the giant sea creature that killed Huang Xiao Li’s parents during their trip to the Desolate Continent. Although it wasn’t as massive, and its aura was incomparably weaker than what he remembered, Yuan would never mistake its appearance. ‘Just what is this sea creature…?’ he wondered inwardly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2042: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Third Trial Hearing that Yuan wanted to proceed to the next trial immediately after completing his second left the other participants feeling weak and inadequate, as they themselves still needed time to recover. The Holy Sword King could only grit his teeth in frustration as he glared at Yuan, still reeling from the shock of learning that Yuan was ranked first, above even the Heavenly Son, a figure he could only dream of surpassing. ‘There’s no way he’s completed two trials while I’d just finished my first! He must be cheating somehow!’ The Holy Sword King scowled inwardly, racking his brain for an explanation, but no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t think of a single way Yuan might have cheated.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2043: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Third Trial(2) Shortly after Yuan defeated his second opponent, a third figure emerged—once known as the Mad Sword Emperor, one of the most infamous Sword Emperors in history for the atrocities he committed. However, with his cultivation only at the Silver Immortal level, he posed little challenge to Yuan and was swiftly defeated as well. The fourth and fifth Sword Emperors arrived soon after, and, as expected, Yuan defeated them both with ease. The spectators were left utterly speechless—and some, especially those who had suspected Yuan of cheating, were visibly enraged.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2044: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Fourth Trial Every spectator watched with immense attention as the cultivation-measuring device assessed Yuan’s true cultivation. Moments later, the device completed its assessment, and the words “Ninth Level Immortal Ascension” appeared in glowing script for all to see. “He’s really a mortal!”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2045: A Freak “That mortal managed to pass this trial in just ten days?! That’s ridiculous!” When the other participants experienced the brutality of the second trial for themselves, none of them could believe that a mortal had managed to pass it in such a short time. Though everyone progressed swiftly at first, they eventually slowed down after the number of enemies they had to deal with increased with each counter.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2046: A True Freak After defeating the final opponent and clearing the second trial, the Heavenly Son, Tian Yuexing, returned to the platform outside with a weary expression. Though he had experienced battles that stretched for years without pause, none of them compared to the sheer strain and intensity of the past few months within the trial. When Tian Yuexing returned to the platform, the first thing he did was glance around, searching for Yuan. After confirming he was alone, he lifted his gaze to the rankings above, hoping—perhaps even expecting—that he had finally surpassed him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2047: I Caught Up! “The Seventh Heaven? Is it for that mortal?” another elder asked, raising an eyebrow. “If you’re thinking of recruiting him, we’ve already sent someone,” another replied. “The Young Lady is there as well—there’s no need for you to go personally.” Tian Yuexing’s father shook his head and sighed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2048: Esteemed Guests After staring at the rankings for a moment, Tian Yuexing suddenly snapped out of his daze. His head whipped around— “You!” he exclaimed, eyes locking onto Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2049: Celestial Family “It’s been a while, Sect Leader Bai,” said one of the two figures—a stunning woman clad in pure white robes, her silver accessories shimmering with grace. Her beauty was ethereal, almost otherworldly, resembling that of a celestial fairy descended from the heavens. “It has indeed been a while, Madam Jun,” Senior Bai responded with a respectful nod. “Had I known of your arrival in advance, I would have prepared a more fitting welcome.” “Don’t sweat about it,” Madam Jun replied with a gentle smile. “My daughter and I were simply passing through when I remembered the Sword Emperor Qualifications were underway, so we thought we’d stop by for a quick look. Don’t mind us and act like we’re not even here.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Wei Kang and Ai Wan? Is this even legal? How can they allow Senior Song's own disciples to join this competition? They'll obviously dominate the entire competition!" Xuan Wuhan complained in a sighing voice, and she continued, "I just hope that they're not better than Yuan." "I have never heard them play before, but I don't think Disciple Yuan would fall behind them." Elder Shan said, continuing with a smile on her beautiful face, "After all, he defeated their master, Senior Song, in a one-on-one battle." While the audience talked about Wei Kang and Ai Wan, Song Ling'er spoke first for the first time, "You may begin." The place instantly turned silent, and everybody there stared at Wei Kang who was the first to go with intensive gazes.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2050: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Final Trial Upon stepping through the final door, Yuan found himself standing just a few meters away from a towering pagoda, its vast structure rising endlessly into the heavens, disappearing beyond the clouds as if it pierced the very fabric of the sky. However, Yuan wasn’t alone. Standing beside him was Tian Yuexing, who had entered just moments earlier. Tian Yuexing cast a brief glance in Yuan’s direction, then turned away without a word and began making his way toward the pagoda.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2051: Sword Emperor Qualifications’ Final Trial(2) A week had passed since Yuan entered the Endless Pagoda, and he had already ascended to the 90th floor. From the 60th floor onward, his opponents were Golden Immortals, and it wasn’t until the 90th floor that he finally faced a True Immortal. The spectators expected him to struggle against a True Immortal. Yet, to their utter shock and disbelief, Yuan defeated his opponent with ease.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2052: Acquiring the Title of Sword Emperor “That freak has actually done it… He’s passed the Sword Emperor Qualifications with a perfect score, and as a mortal, no less!” The audience wasn’t just left in awe of Yuan’s feat. They felt a tinge of fear as well. After all, there was nothing more terrifying than the unknown, and Yuan was the embodiment of that right now. From his identity to his true potential, nobody there knew anything about him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2053: Sword Emperor Yuan Sometime later, Senior Bai said to Yuan out loud, “Normally, we’d have a ceremony for the new Sword Emperors, but as you can see, the other participants are still nowhere near done, so we’ll have to postpone it until every participant is finished.” “Do I have to participate in this ceremony?” Yuan asked with raised eyebrows, as it sounded like a hassle. “While we can’t force you, it should be noted that every Sword Emperor before you has participated in the ceremony,” said Senior Bai.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2054: God of War, Tian Xian(End of Leaving Earth Arc) “Brother, is it strange that even though it’s been years since we last saw each other, it didn’t feel nearly as long as the last time?” Yu Rou asked aloud. Yuan smiled gently and responded, “That’s because as your cultivation deepens, your sense of time changes. The more accustomed you become to it, the less you notice time passing.” “I see… I don’t know if that’s a good or bad thing.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2055: Location of the Remaining Two Ancient Seals “Stand up. There’s no need to be so formal. Just tell me what I need to know, and I’ll quickly be on my way,” Yuan said to the man kowtowing on the floor. The man nodded and stood up before asking, “What do you wish to know, God of War? All of our intel is at your disposal.” “I’d like to know where the Ancient Seals to unlock the Primordial Realm are right now,” Yuan said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2056: Returning to the Stairway to Heaven “The trial for the Seventh Heaven and the Eighth Heaven, correct? We can do that.” Tian’er nodded. “Would you like to start now?” “Let’s.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2057: Fighting the Great One Shortly after his appearance, the Great One unleashed his cultivation, which was at the first level of God Ascension realm. “I’m at a point where the trials won’t be much of a challenge, huh?” Yuan repeated what Tian’er had said in a low voice and a stiff smile. Although the Great One was only at the first level of God Ascension, he might be the toughest opponent Yuan has encountered up until now.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2058: Entering the Immortal Realm When the Heavenly Son realized he was fighting the Faceless Sword Emperor, an excited smile appeared on his face, as this meant that he had finally reached the end of the trial. However, he didn’t dare to underestimate his opponent, who was several times stronger than his previous opponent on the 199th floor. That said, he was very confident that he would be able to defeat the Faceless Sword Emperor.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2059: Arriving at the Eighth Heaven “He finished the trial in just two weeks? There’s no way that’s possible…” Tian Yuexing mumbled with a bewildered expression on his face. “Y-You’re lying! There’s no way anyone could’ve finished that trial in just two weeks! Unless he took a different trial than I!” he exclaimed a moment later, refusing to believe such an outrageous result. Senior Bai merely shook his head and responded calmly, “What would I gain from lying to you? If you don’t want to believe me, you can watch the recordings later.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: *Clap* *Clap* *Clap* A few moments after Fei Yuyan played her three music notes, Senior Zou suddenly began clapping his hands, and he spoke in a praising voice, "I don't even know where to begin, Disciple Fei. I have witnessed your performance in the previous competition, and if I had listened to your performance just now while blindfolded, I would have never guessed that it was you playing the zither." After taking a deep breath, he continued to speak, "If you were to participate in the previous competition in your current condition, I have no doubt that you would be able to achieve first place easily! Ten points from me!" "Thank you for your praises, Senior Zou." Fei Yuyan stood up and bowed to him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2060: Primordial Phoenix’s Blood Essence “Of course. Like I said, what’s mine is yours,” Feng Yuxiang said with a calm nod. She continued, “To be honest with you, Young Master, I’ve always been a little envious that you possess so much dragon power but almost no phoenix power. It makes my bloodline feel a little inferior. Hopefully, this will help balance things out.” “It’s not like I am purposefully picking dragon powers over phoenix powers. It’s just that I’ve had more encounters with dragons than phoenixes,” Yuan said. “In any case, I’ll accept it. Thank you.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2061: Hell Molten Eel The cultivators trembled at Feng Yuxiang’s threatening pressure, but before any of them could respond, Yuan spoke in a calm voice, "Relax, Feng Feng. There’s no need to spill blood over something like this." Feng Yuxiang immediately retrieved her aura and fell silent, but she continued staring at them, especially the Golden Immortal who spoke first. Yuan continued, "I’m sure you all want to resolve this without unnecessary deaths, right?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2062: Hell Molten Eel(2) "This Hell Molten Serpent must be really valuable for so many people to show up for it," Yuan remarked after being attacked for the fifth time in just two weeks. "It’s not just the Hell Molten Serpent," Feng Yuxiang replied. "That’s simply how things are in the higher Heavens. It’s common for cultivators to clash over every resource they can get their hands on." "Why? It’s not like there’s a shortage of resources."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2063: Hell Molten Eel(3) Upon hearing Yuan’s words, it was as if a switch had been flipped inside their minds, snapping them back to their senses. "He’s right... We’d just be throwing away our lives at this point..." Moreover, it was clear that Yuan had no intention of helping them.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2064: Consuming the Primordial Phoenix’s Blood Essence Yuan looked at the Hell Molten Eel and shrugged, "No clue, but I’ll think of something." He then tossed the entire thing inside his spatial ring. "Alright, now that things are peaceful and quiet, let’s head to my Immortal Cave," Feng Yuxiang said a moment later.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2065: Refining the Primordial Phoenix’s Blood Essence After absorbing the Primordial Phoenix’s Blood Essence, time seemed to slow to a standstill for Yuan as he was consumed by endless, indescribable pain. Minutes turned into hours, and hours into days, yet the invisible flames continued to burn Yuan relentlessly, showing no sign of fading anytime soon. Even worse, the pain from the invisible flames only grew more intense with each passing moment.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2066: Arriving at the Rising Phoenix Clan "So, how should we approach the Rising Phoenix Clan?" Yuan asked Feng Yuxiang as they traveled on the flying treasure. "..." When Feng Yuxiang didn’t respond, Yuan opened his eyes and turned to her, only to find her staring at him with a dazed expression, completely mesmerized by his new appearance.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2067: Rising Phoenix Clan Shortly after their arrival, one of the phoenixes from the Rising Phoenix Clan approached them in the air. "It’s been a while, Junior Sister Yuxiang." The phoenix, a middle-aged woman, greeted her. "It’s only been a few thousand years, Senior Sister Zhenyan," said Feng Yuixang.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2068: True Primordial Fire "Welcome to the Rising Phoenix Clan, esteemed guest. My name is Feng Lingtian, the Grand Elder of this clan." The short old man introduced himself to Yuan shortly after their arrival. But before Yuan could do the same, he continued, "I heard that you have the Primordial Phoenix’s Bloodline, but before we can even begin our conversation, I must verify something first. We haven’t seen this bloodline for millions of years—since the Immortal Monarch’s Era, so I apologize for being skeptical, nor am I trying to offend you."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2069: Immortal Monarch’s Blessing "Please! I beg of you! Burn me with the True Primordial Fire!" The Grand Elder continued to beg when Yuan didn’t respond the first time. "..." "If I do that, you could die—your physical body, that is," Yuan shook his head.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Heavens… Who on earth is that participant?" Elder Jing mumbled in a dazed voice as he stared at the figure wearing a black jade mask with wide eyes. 'This Yuan… He wasn't using all of his abilities during our one-on-one? Was he… looking down on me?' Song Ling'er stared at Yuan with clear disbelief in her eyes. It was simply unthinkable that someone would look down on her— the Sect Master of the Heavenly Melody Academy, feeling an indescribable sensation in her heart after learning this. Of course, Yuan wasn't purposefully looking down on Song Ling'er during their one-on-one; it was just that he didn't feel being so serious in a friendly competition between two zither players, and he saw it more of a friendly spar.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2070: Heavenly White Valley Shortly after Yuan used the Immortal Monarch’s Blessing on Feng Haoyu, the Grand Elder retrieved a crimson needle shaped like a feather and used it to test his blood. With a quick prick, he collected a single drop of Feng Haoyu’s blood. Moments later, the Grand Elder excitedly exclaimed, "It worked! Your bloodline has improved by nearly five percent—not just in strength, but in purity as well!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2071: Bai Sulan As Yuan drew closer, he realized there were actually two figures—one a small, human-like silhouette and the other resembling a massive bull. Once he was close enough to see clearly, Yuan spotted a little girl with short black-and-white hair wielding a metal rod, locked in a fierce battle with a red bull radiating the aura of a peak Immortal Ascension beast. Yet, on closer inspection, it was clear the girl was merely toying with the bull, despite her cultivation being only at the fifth level of Immortal Ascension. Her metal rod was also cloaked in weapon aura, and each swing sent visible ripples coursing through the air.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2072: Bai Sulan(2) When Bai Sulan sped off, Yuan and Feng Yuxiang immediately chased after her. "Hey, how old are you?" Yuan asked her as they traveled the misty mountain valley. "I’m almost eight hundred this year," she calmly responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2073: Familiar Inscriptions After saving Bai Sulan, Yuan placed her on the ground and quickly fed her some medicine. Then he realized that he didn’t have any on him since he mainly relied on his regenerative abilities and didn’t need them. Fortunately, Feng Yuxiang was there, and she had plenty on her. "What happened to me...? Am I dead?" Bai Sulan mumbled as she slowly opened her eyes.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2074: Sealed Outer God After a brief silence, Yuan spoke again, his voice calm yet tinged with amusement. "Well, Outer God or not, there’s nothing I can do about this situation. And if you really are an Outer God, you wouldn’t be trapped behind this door by a few formations. Aren’t you lot supposed to be all-powerful?" BANG! In response, the Outer God slammed against the gate, and in the very next instant, every formation protecting it shattered like fragile glass.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2075: Heavenly White Tiger Clan After nearly an entire day, Yuan returned to Bai Sulan and Feng Yuxiang’s side. "Where did you go?" Bai Sulan asked, her eyes filled with curiosity. "To the serpent’s lair."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2076: Heavenly White Tiger Clan(2) Once Yuan and Feng Yuxiang entered the guest house, Bai Sulan retrieved a silver medallion and placed it on the doorstep before leaving to find the servants. Shortly after Bai Sulan left, the presences that had been shadowing them from a distance finally revealed themselves and began approaching the guest house. However, when they saw Bai Sulan’s medallion resting on the doorstep like a ward for ghosts, these Heavenly White Tigers hesitated to approach the door. Just as they were preparing to leave, the door swung open and Yuan stepped out to meet the tigers head-on.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2077: Heavenly White Tiger Clan(3) "L-Lady Ning! I am sorry! I swear I will never disturb you during your training again! Please, spare my humble life!" The servant immediately went on her knees and began begging for her life, thinking that Bai Ning was going to kill her, judging by her angry expression. However, Bai Ning stopped in front of the jade slip and picked it up. Once she confirmed the contents inside, she looked at the servant and spoke, "Why would I kill you? Stand up." "Yes!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2078: Meeting Bai Xutao Again "L-Lady Ning! What are you doing?!" The guard exclaimed with a shocked expression on his face after she kicked down the door to Bai Xutao’s training area. "You didn’t disobey Xutao’s order since I will be forcing my way to him," she said to him. "That’s not the issue here..." the guard wore a look of disbelief.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2079: Meeting Bai Xutao Again(2) When Bai Xutao saw Yuan, his eyebrows immediately raised in a puzzled manner. Bai Ning made it sound like they knew each other, but he was certain that he’d never seen Yuan before in his life. His gaze slowly shifted to Feng Yuxiang, whose beauty caught his attention. However, he didn’t immediately recognize her, as Feng Yuxiang’s aura and scent had changed drastically since she awakened her bloodline and got rid of the curse. Noticing Bai Xutao’s lustful gaze on her body, Feng Yuxiang had the urge to strangle him to death, but controlled herself.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After the first team was disqualified, they continued onto the second team, who was shaking a little, obviously quite nervous after seeing what happened. "Begin." Senior Zou said to them. Fifty-five seconds later, the team began playing their music. Luckily for this team, they'd managed to calm down enough within those fifty-five seconds to play more than half of the song without making any mistakes.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2080: Chaos Within the Heavenly White Tiger Clan After beating Bai Xutao until he was almost unconscious, Feng Yuxiang released him and said, "Go ahead and heal yourself. I don’t want to end this too quickly." Hearing this, Bai Xutao immediately distanced himself from her and consumed a recovery pill. However, he was only a Golden Immortal while Feng Yuxiang was a True Immortal. The difference between their cultivation was simply too great for him to do anything to her. Meanwhile, their commotion attracted the attention of those around them, but nobody dared to approach them after realizing Bai Xutao and Bai Ning were there and only watched from afar.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2081: Chaos Within the Heavenly White Tiger Clan(2) "Bai Xutao!" Bai Ning exclaimed in a terrified voice after seeing his body fall from the sky. "Do you even have time to worry about others?" Yuan blocked her from attempting to approach Bai Xutao again. "You! Do you have any idea what you have done?!" She shouted at him. "To attack us in the middle of the Heavenly White Tiger Clan’s territory, you’re extremely foolish! Once our elders arrive, you’ll regret attacking us!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2082: Chaos Within the Heavenly White Tiger Clan(3) Following her transformation, Feng Yuxiang unleashed a vast sea of flames that surged outward, engulfing those nearby. Though the fire scorched their skin and singed their hair, it carried no killing intent, as she had no desire to take their lives. As for Yuan, he stowed his sword away and began beating the Heavenly White Tigers with his bare fists. "A human dares challenge us in physique? Laughable!" a Golden Immortal scoffed as he stepped forward to confront Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2083: The Clan Leader’s Appearance "Good heavens, he’s fighting five of our elders all by himself! What a freaking monster!" The Heavenly White Tiger Clan’s members were bewildered by what they were witnessing. A few even believed they were currently dreaming. "What should we do?" One of the elders on standby asked the others. "Maybe we should just attack them at once and get this over with," one of them suggested.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2084: Immortal Monarch’s Supremacy The Heavenly White Tiger Clan’s Leader swept the scene with a cold, calculating gaze, his eyes briefly lingering on Bai Ning before moving to Bai Xutao, who lay buried beneath a mountain of rubble and dust. Although Bai Xutao appeared to be a burned corpse, he was still alive. Eventually, the Clan Leader returned to Yuan and spoke in an emotionless tone, "What are you trying to achieve here?" Yuan braced for the Clan Leader to erupt in fury, certain he would attack in a blind rage over the devastation to his clan. But to his surprise, the Clan Leader remained unnervingly calm.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2085: Heavenly White Tiger’s Ancestral Altar It took several hours and an unfathomable amount of treasure—enough to send even the wealthiest merchant into a panic—but the elders managed to restore Bai Xutao’s burned appearance and heal all but one of his injuries. When Bai Xutao woke up, the first thing he did was reach for the area between his legs. "I-It’s not there! Where’s my thing?!" he exclaimed in a terrified voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2086: Gone Berserk "Heavens! He’s actually managed to consume the ancestor’s Blood Essence without dying!" The elders were shocked by the results. However, the Eleventh Elder’s expression shifted with concern. "No, something feels wrong." Though Bai Xutao was still alive, his energy was a turbulent storm, chaotic and wild, as if he had lost all control over his own body.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2087: I am the Immortal Monarch "Good lord, what happened to that pervert?" Feng Yuxiang commented after seeing Bai Xutao’s new appearance. Not only was Bai Xutao much bigger than before, but the patterns on his body had also changed. "The Clan Leader mentioned Blood Essence, so that was most likely what he consumed," said Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2088: Forbidden Blood Extraction "You... are the Immortal Monarch?" The Clan Leader muttered after snapping out of his daze. "Do you really expect me to believe such nonsense?" Yuan smiled and said, "You don’t have to believe me immediately, as I’ll show you evidence in just a moment."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2089: Leaving the Heavenly White Valley After many minutes of using Forbidden Blood Extraction on Bai Xutao, Yuan was finally able to extract his blood essence—or more specifically, the blood essence he’d consumed and hadn’t fully refined yet. Once his blood essence was fully extracted, Bai Xutao, wracked with indescribable pain throughout the ordeal, reverted to his human form and plummeted from the sky, disappearing into the gaping crater below. Yuan stowed the blood essence away before turning to face the Clan Leader, who was still staring at him with a perplexed face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After Senior Zou's verdict, Elder Jing spoke, "Above and beyond— that's all I can say. Ten points from me as well." Everybody then turned to look at Song Ling'er, who nodded her head and said, "I see that you've finally understood the situation you're in, Wei Kang." "Yes, Master!" Wei Kang said with a serious look on his face. "Although there were many mistakes in your performance, I do not expect anyone to play the God Descends from Heaven song perfectly, especially not in a duet. You get nine points from me."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2090: Refining the Heavenly White Tiger’s Blood Essence "Is it really okay for you to leave them just like that?" Feng Yuxiang questioned after they left. "You should’ve punished the Clan Leader and the elders, even if it’s just a little, since they enabled Bai Xutao’s behavior." Yuan smiled and said, "Who said I’m leaving?" "What?" Feng Yuxiang muttered, confusion evident in her voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2091: Returning to the Heavenly White Tiger Clan "Hey, handsome. Where did you come from? I haven’t seen you around here before," one of the female tigers said, her movements teasing and suggestive as she approached Yuan. Yuan calmly faced her and replied, "That’s probably because I haven’t returned to this place in a few hundred years. What happened here? It’s completely different from before." "That’s... We decided to renovate the place," answered the female.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2092: Returning to the Heavenly White Tiger Clan(2) Still in his Heavenly White Tiger form, Yuan offered the guard a calm smile. "I am who you think I am. Do me a favor and keep it quiet, will you? I don’t want to cause a panic." The guard gave a silent nod, his face pale with disbelief. "Thanks," Yuan said before turning to approach the massive residence before him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2093: The Clan Leader’s Secret "You’ve never reached a limit? So you basically have an unlimited supply of blood?" Bai Sulan muttered, a strange flicker in her eyes. Unbeknownst to her, she was licking her lips, looking like a child staring longingly at a jar of candy. Yuan smiled at her reaction and said calmly, "No, it just means I rarely give out my blood. Even if it were unlimited, giving away too much wouldn’t be wise, considering the powerful effects it carries." The Immortal Monarch’s blood was precious for a reason. If Yuan were to give it freely to anyone who asked, it could lead to unimaginable consequences, disrupting the balance of power across the Nine Heavens.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2094: Bai Xutao’s Persistence "That’s... Bai Xutao?" At first glance, Yuan didn’t recognize Bai Xutao due to the drastic change in his appearance, but even in its weakened state, his aura was unmistakable. It was undeniably Bai Xutao. "No way... he actually survived? Maybe he’s not a Heavenly White Tiger after all, and his true bloodline might just be that of a cockroach," Feng Yuxiang remarked, sounding utterly dumbfounded by his persistence that rivaled cockroaches.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2095: A Detour After departing from the Heavenly White Tiger Clan, Yuan began his journey back to the Rising Phoenix Clan, despite still having several months left before the one-year promise. However, along the way, he was forced to halt when he spotted two groups of cultivators clashing in the middle of nowhere. Typically, Yuan wouldn’t have paid such a scene any mind, as it had nothing to do with him. But this time, something caught his attention, as the attire of these cultivators looked familiar, compelling him to stay and observe.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2096: Visiting the Demon Sealing Grotto When the guard questioned about Yuan, Yan Hara calmly responded, "He’s an Elite Demon Sealer of the Demon Sealing Clan and my disciple. Is there any problem with him being present?" "Well, the higher-ups will be there, so it might not be a good idea to bring him with you," said the guard. "The pressure might be too much for him to handle." "You don’t have to worry about me. If I get overwhelmed, I won’t blame anyone," Yuan said with a calm smile on his face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2097: Visiting the Demon Sealing Grotto(2) "The Demon Sealing Grotto will support me?" Yan Hara raised an eyebrow, genuine surprise flickering in her eyes. "That’s quite the unexpected offer. However, I must ask—what if I am not trying to challenge Qian Chu for his position? What if I am just trying to increase my position for my own benefits?" Zhou Yanfei paused briefly before speaking, his gaze steady. "That’s difficult to believe. I may not know everything about you, but I know enough to say you’re not the type to act so selfishly. And those you’ve been rallying—they’re all individuals who are not under Qian Chu’s influence." "If you’re not aiming to challenge Qian Chu, then whatever you’re planning must be something that will shake the very foundation of the Demon Sealing Clan."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2098: Visiting the Demon Sealing Grotto(3) "What...?" Zhou Yanfei’s eyes widened in shock at Yuan’s response. The other Demon Sealers in the room exchanged uneasy glances, clearly taken aback. "Do you even know what you’re saying?! Why should we bear any responsibility when it was Qian Chu who clearly plotted against us?!" someone in the room exclaimed out loud, his voice full of anger.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2099: Demon Worshippers’ Invasion "What in heaven’s name?! We’re being attacked by Demon Worshippers?!" Zhou Yanfei was in disbelief after hearing this information from his communication jade slip. He couldn’t fathom what the Demon Worshippers were thinking since they typically avoided Demon Sealers like the plague and would never willingly approach them. Yet, they were attacking the Demon Sealing Grotto’s headquarters out of the blue. "If they’re attacking the Demon Sealing Grotto, what about the Demon Sealing Clan?!" Yan Hara asked out loud amidst the confusion.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After walking around for half an hour and speaking to many people about the auction houses in this city, only one name came up repeatedly. "This Azure Phoenix Auction House seems very popular. Let's give it a look," said Yuan. Xiao Hua nodded and followed Yuan to the location of this Azure Phoenix Auction House. According to the people Yuan spoke with, the Azure Phoenix Auction House is one of the wealthiest and most influential auction houses within the Eastern Continent. What's more, they are backed by the Azure Phoenix Sect, one of the most powerful backgrounds in this world.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After Yuan and Fei Yuyan's performance, the judges pondered before giving their verdict. Elder Jing turned to look at Senior Zou and Song Ling'er. Since he was the least experienced out of the three, he wanted to let the experts go first so that his judgment isn't too far off, causing him to lose face. However, neither Senior Zou nor Song Ling'er spoke even many moments later, causing Elder Jing to raise his eyebrows. Then he turned to look at Yuan and Fei Yuyan. After clearing his throat, Elder Jing gave his verdict first for the first time.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2100: Divine Paragon’s Demon Sealing Arts "How dare a mere Immortal..." the black-masked figure muttered coldly, his voice laced with disdain. Yet, despite Yuan’s provocation, he remained composed. Unlike the expendable pawns that littered the battlefield, he was no mindless fanatic and wouldn’t risk himself so easily. Though he could theoretically overpower Yuan with sheer cultivation alone, he dared not act recklessly. The threat of Yuan’s Demon Sealing Aura loomed like a blade at his throat. Having accepted a demon’s power, he was now inherently vulnerable to its natural counter—Demon Sealing Aura. In such confrontations, cultivation alone meant little.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2101: An Unknown Demon Emperor Sensing the demonic presence, Zhou Yanfei turned to Yan Hara and said grimly, "We’ll continue this conversation later." Without another word, his gaze shifted toward the middle of the battlefield, where a shadowy figure had emerged out of thin air. Once its form came into focus, the figure revealed itself to be a grey-skinned demon—its body devoid of any visible crystal, a clear indication that it was at least a Demon General.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2102: Traitors Although the majority of the Demon Sealers had departed to confront the demon invasion outside, the vault was not left unguarded. Seven guards remained stationed before it, each one a True Immortal, their auras sharp and unwavering, ready to act at a moment’s notice. Yuan silently observed the young man, waiting to see his next move. Yet, the figure remained completely still, as though he had no intention of acting. However, just moments later, Yuan sensed multiple presences rapidly converging on their location. In the blink of an eye, twenty experts clad in the robes of the Demon Sealing Grotto emerged. Without a word or moment’s hesitation, they launched a coordinated assault on the seven guards, swiftly overwhelming them with ruthless precision.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2103: Demon Sealing Grotto’s Vault Although one of the traitors confessed to working for Qian Chu, Yuan didn’t believe it so easily. The admission came too quickly, and the man’s tone felt more like an attempt to shift the blame onto Qian Chu rather than a genuine confession. "Oh? Is that so? Then why don’t you tell me a little more about your plans?" Yuan said as he calmly stepped forward, stopping directly before the half-sealed traitor. "T-That’s..." The man faltered, his eyes darting in panic.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2104: Qian Chu After hearing Yuan utter the name ’Qian Chu’, the young man stopped moving, even standing up straight to face Yuan. "Qian Chu, you say? What makes you think I am him?" the young man questioned. "I was just trying my luck. If you’re not Qian Chu, who are you? I’ll give you one of the demon sealing treasures if you tell me."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2105: Stolen Treasures Once Qian Chu left the vault, Feng Yuxiang questioned Yuan’s decision to let him go so easily. "Young Master, are you really going to let him go that easily?" she asked, her voice laced with worry. "You even handed over two of your treasures. What if he goes on a rampage? Even if he doesn’t, he’ll surely stir chaos with the demons under his command." "I don’t have the strength to kill Qian Chu right now," Yuan replied calmly. "And even if I did, it wouldn’t stop the demons. In fact, they are likely to go on a rampage without someone to command them."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2106: Stolen Treasures(2) Seeing Zhou Yanfei and the other Demon Sealers kneeling on the floor, their faces twisted in grief as if they had just witnessed the slaughter of their entire families, Yuan spoke, "By the time I defeated the traitors and reached the vault... the treasures were already gone. I’m sorry." "..." None of the Demon Sealers responded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2107: Stolen Treasures(3) "It won’t take a few months. I will contact you within a week or two," said Zhou Yanfei. He turned to look at a certain Demon Sealer and said to her, "Bring them to our best guest quarters." Thus, Yuan and Yan Hara were brought out of the vault and to their guest houses.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2108: Selfish Armed with the knowledge that the traitors were cursed, the Demon Sealing Grotto wasted no time in forcefully extracting their memories to uncover the truth—even if it meant crippling or killing them in the process. However, even after forcefully extracting their memories, the Demon Sealing Grotto found themselves empty-handed. The traitors had been afflicted with two powerful curses, one that prevented them from speaking the truth and another that blocked any attempt to delve into their memories. The moment the Demon Sealing Grotto tried to extract their memories, their Dantian were forcefully destroyed, turning them into powerful bombs. Unable to make further progress, the Demon Sealing Grotto decided to suspend the traitors’ interrogation until a method to bypass the curses could be found. Ordinarily, this would require the assistance of a curse expert.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2109: Divine Paragon’s Will "Selfish?" Yan Hara narrowed her eyes at Zhou Yanfei, looking annoyed. Then, she spoke loudly, "Zhou Yanfei, you old fart! When the hell are you ever going to let people finish speaking before you jump to conclusions?! I cannot even count how many times you’ve done this already!" "The Divine Paragon taught everyone how to use Demon Sealing Aura and shared some of his demon sealing techniques so humanity could stand against the demons. But there were a few he deliberately chose not to share."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "You… want to play a song by yourself?" Song Ling'er raised her eyebrows. Under normal circumstances, that would not be allowed, as this is a competition— a partnered competition. However, she really wanted to listen to Yuan play the zither seriously by himself even if it would invalidate the integrity of the competition. After all, in her eyes, he was going to win this competition regardless. "Okay, go ahead." Song Ling'er nodded her head a moment later, surprising the audience. "Senior Song, are you sure? This isn't part of the competition…" Elder Jing said in a nervous voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2110: Training Yan Hara "Now that we no longer have to worry about the Demon Sealing Grotto becoming our enemy, it’s time to clean up the traitors," said Yan Hara as she turned to look at Yuan. He calmly nodded and said, "Bring me to the traitors. I’ll remove their curses." "Of course."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2111: Demon Emperor Nightmare "Then I will begin your training now," said Yuan a moment later. "G-Give me a moment to prepare myself!" Yan Hara hastily said. Then, she closed her eyes and took several deep breaths.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2112: Leaving the Demon Sealing Grotto Zhou Yanfei muttered, his face filled with disbelief. "The demon was indistinguishable from the real thing! How did you manage to create such a thing?!" "That’s a family secret," Yuan responded with a mysterious smile on his face. Then, he turned to look at Yan Hara, who was standing before him with a dazed look on her face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2113: Returning to the Rising Phoenix Clan After a month of traveling nonstop, Yuan arrived at his destination, the Rising Phoenix Clan. Even before he reached their residence, Yuan sensed a change in the atmosphere compared to his last visit. It was much stiffer and heavier, almost as if something grim had occurred recently. "I wonder what happened." Feng Yuxiang muttered as she appeared beside Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2114: A Familiar Curse "There’s no way the leader’s bloodline is weakening! Someone get the Golden Phoenix Needle!" One of the elders shouted, his voice full of nervous skepticism. Another person there rushed out of the room the next instant, and he returned a few minutes later with a golden needle in his grasp. Then, using the Golden Phoenix Needle, often used by phoenixes to check the strength of their bloodline, carefully tested the leader’s bloodline through a drop of her blood.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2115: Celestial Doctor "Are you out of your mind?! How could you let someone touch her before I arrived?!" the Celestial Doctor thundered at the Grand Elder. "What if they made a mistake? It could have cost her life!" "Please, let me explain, Celestial Doctor..." the Grand Elder said quickly. "This man is no ordinary healer. He’s an expert in curses and poison—and our leader has been cursed, which caused her bloodline purity to drop! In just three weeks, it’s fallen by four percent! If we had waited for you, her bloodline might have weakened far more than necessary!" "Four percent?!" The Celestial Doctor’s eyes widened at this information.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2116: Celestial Doctor(2) "Internal struggle... that’s putting it lightly," the Celestial Doctor said, shaking her head. "The Celestial Overlords quickly went to shit after you disappeared. It’d gotten so bad that I decided to leave." "Now that you’ve returned, are you going to take control again? Otherwise, I don’t see myself ever returning." "We’ll see how things go. The Celestial Overlords is a thing of the past, so I don’t really have much attachment to it, especially since I don’t have most of Tian Yingzhe’s memories. However, that might change when I recover his memories."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2117: Fate Maniac "Leader! You’re awake! Thank the heavens!" The elders immediately rushed to her side after noticing her open eyes. The leader, a beautiful woman with flowing red hair and sharp facial features, slowly sat up on the bed and turned to look at the group with a puzzled face. "Where... where am I?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2118: The Celestial Emperor’s Offer "The Ten Royal Phoenix Clans have allied themselves with the Celestial Emperor?" Feng Yuxiang asked, her voice tinged with disbelief. "That’s hard to believe. Why would they—who have always prided themselves on their independence—choose to work with the Celestial Emperor, of all people?" The leader looked at Yuan and calmly responded, "Because the Celestial Emperor has a phoenix on his side—a Primordial Phoenix, that is." "What?" Feng Yuxiang muttered with wide eyes.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2119: The Royal Phoenix Clans’ Response After a moment of silence, the leader slowly nodded her head and said, "I’ll bring it up with the other leaders. It’ll probably take a few days to receive an answer." "We can wait." The leader retrieved a communication jade slip from her spatial ring and began sending messages, notifying each and every leader of the Ten Royal Phoenix Clans about the situation.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: The place fell into silence once again after Song Ling'er's domineering words, and the participants trembled at the thought of challenging Song Ling'er. The participants then turned to look at Yuan who suddenly looked much bigger than previously, almost like he'd grown a few sizes. However, that was just their admiration for Yuan making it seem like he was bigger than normal. After witnessing his god-like performance that'd seemingly summoned a goddess instead of a god, they did not feel like competing against such a monster. Suddenly, someone within the participants stood up and approached Yuan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2120: Abyssal Underground Under the weight of many gazes, Feng Haoyu let out a heavy sigh before speaking. "Honestly, I don’t know what to say or even feel. Betrayed? Not necessarily. I swore my loyalty to him not because of his bloodline, but because of his ability and something else. So even if he isn’t truly a Primordial Phoenix, as long as his abilities are real, I have no reason to complain. And... there’s just something about him—something that makes me attracted to him. I can’t explain it." He then turned to his mother and continued, "I’m sorry, Mother, for making such a decision without consulting you. I acted on my instincts."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2121: Abyssal Underground(2) "Please, follow me." The middle-aged man led Yuan to a beautiful woman with emerald- colored hair and brown eyes at the other side of the entrance. Unlike the middle-aged man, who was only a Silver Immortal, this woman had the cultivation of a True Immortal. “Senior Zeng, I have brought you a potential customer. This is his first time here."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2122: Abyssal Underground(3) "Since you're so eager to die, allow me to grant your wish!" one of the True Immortals snarled before suddenly lunging at Yuan. "Supreme Spear Arts, Grand Thrust!" The cultivator drew his arm back before hurling the spear in his grasp toward Yuan. His aim, however, deliberately avoided any vital organs, as though he wished not to end Yuan's life too quickly, but to let him suffer a slow, agonizing death.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2123: Rod of Destruction "Die, you bastard!" Zeng Guoquan roared, flooding the treasure with her spiritual energy the instant she drew it, and the treasure began to glow ominously. “Did you really think I'd let you use it?" Yuan sneered, using the Heaven Sealing Technique on her. In a heartbeat, Zeng Guoquan's cultivation was sealed, cutting off the flow of spiritual energy and with it, any hope of activating the treasure. Yuan then plucked the treasure from her grasp and examined it with mild interest. It resembled a wand, yet was forged entirely from some unknown crystal, its core brimming with an immense, destructive energy.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2124: Mark of the Baneful With the Baneful Abyss in hand, Yuan calmly approached the nearest Abyssal Crystal Ant. The moment it sensed his presence—and the ominous aura radiating from the dagger— the creature let out an inaudible cry before turning to flee. “You can run, but you can't hide."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2125: A Deadly Mistake "I never imagined I'd lay eyes on such an ancient formation..." The level 8 Array Master was left in awe of the formations crafted by Yu Ning, an Array Master from the Primordial Era. With the passage of countless years, most formations from that era had been lost to time. "So, can you deactivate it or not?" one of the cultivators there asked the Array Master. The Array Master coldly scoffed, "Of course, I can. However, it's going to take a little longer than usual since formations from the Primordial Era are much more complex.” Although formations from the Primordial Era were far more intricate in design, they were not necessarily stronger than modern ones. Over time, advancements in array symbols and formations had reduced unnecessary complexity while retaining their power, and in some cases, even enhancing it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2126: Ten Royal Phoenix Clans’ Gathering After the incident with the cultivators deactivating his formation, Yuan continued to spend every moment spreading the poison mist until it was almost time for the gathering at the Undying Fiery Summit. In just over a month, Yuan had already slaughtered more than seventy million beings within the Abyssal Underworld, leaving him with fewer than thirty million to complete his quest. Of course, he still needed to break through to the True Immortal realm. Once it was almost time, Yuan retrieved all of the poison mist with the Baneful Abyss before leaving the Abyssal Underground.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2127: Ten Royal Phoenix Clans’ Gathering(2) Shortly after the Rising Phoenix Clan's leader informed the Ten Royal Phoenix Clans of the gathering, the others promptly contacted the Celestial Emperor to report the situation, since failing to do so might have been seen as acting behind his back. Naturally, the Rising Phoenix Clan had done the same. That said, the Royal Phoenix Clans had contacted the Celestial Emperor largely as a formality, and few of them truly regarded the matter as treacherous. When the Celestial Emperor learned of the existence of a second Primordial Phoenix, he was just as surprised and intrigued as the Royal Phoenix Clans. Thus, he suggested that everyone take part in the gathering. Since seven of the ten had already agreed to participate, he was mostly speaking to the three who initially declined. "Before we even begin, I would like to confirm something." Another phoenix suddenly spoke out loud. "To not waste anyone's time, I want to see for myself the evi

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2128: Ten Royal Phoenix Clans’ Gathering(3) After the introduction ended, Yuan spoke, "I know your time is very precious, so I will get straight to the point." “You've allied yourselves with the Celestial Emperor because he promised to help you improve your bloodline by three percent. However, the Celestial Emperor and I are... let's just say we're not very friendly with each other, and I want you to serve me instead of the Celestial Emperor." The phoenixes in the chamber stared at Yuan with wide eyes, as though unable to believe what they had just heard.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2129: Ten Royal Phoenix Clans’ Gathering(4) "What? You want me to test his bloodline already? It hasn't even been a full minute since whatever you did to him! Do you think our bloodline can be improved so easily?" The phoenix with the Celestial Phoenix Needle remarked with a frown on his face. “You'll know once you test his bloodline," Yuan replied with confidence. "...Whatever. If you say so."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: 'They're talking about Brother Tian?' Yu Rou listened to the conversation between her classmates without turning to look at them, as she didn't want to make it seem like she was interested. However, Meixiu was a different case, and she listened to the conversation while looking at them with a pondering look on her face. 'Player Yuan… first place? If I remember correctly, the Young Master is also participating in a music competition inside the game…' Meixiu thought to herself. As someone who has been with the sibling for her entire life, she knew very well the extent of Yu Tian's talents, and she found it hard to believe that someone other than Yu Tian would achieve first place in a music competition. In fact, Yu Tian has never received anything lower than first place, so it was always expected that he would achieve first place no matter what kind of competition he participated in.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2130: Ten Royal Phoenix Clans' Gathering(5) "So, you want me to prove my identity as the Immortal Monarch by forcing you to kneel, is that it?" Yuan asked. “That's right. Do you have any issues with my request?" The Primordial Phoenix said. "Honestly, that's far too boring, as it would take no effort at all. Besides, I've no desire to humiliate the Celestial Emperor's lapdog and give him yet another reason to hate me." The Primordial Phoenix trembled after hearing Yuan's words, and he muttered, "What did you just call me? A lapdog? I am nobody's lapdog, you bastard!" “Oh? If you're not the Celestial Emperor's lapdog, what are you? His slave?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2131: End of the Meeting "W-Wait a second! I must've misheard you... Did you just say you're enemies with the Celestial Emperor?" the leader of the Imperial Vermilion Phoenix Clan asked aloud, snapping out of her daze. Yuan calmly nodded, "That's exactly what I just said." “You're essentially asking us to fight the Celestial Emperor with you! This is much more than just being your follower! Do you have any idea what you're asking of us?" Another leader exclaimed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2132: Consuming the Dragon Ancestor's Blood Essence "You're leaving already? You don't care about who will choose to side with the Immortal Monarch or not?" The leader of the Etheral Phoenix Clan asked, halting the Primordial Phoenix's movement. (More chapters in Buyers club for TMT) "Honestly? I couldn't care less. If you're foolish enough to side with the Immortal Monarch and go against the Celestial Emperor, then you deserve whatever fate awaits you," he sneered. Then, without waiting for their response, the Primordial Phoenix continued walking toward the exit, leaving the chamber shortly later.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2133: A Month Before the Deadline "It's already been half a year, and not a single clan has sided with the Young Master..." Feng Yuxiang sighed, her voice echoing softly through the empty chamber. The words of the Primordial Phoenix still lingered in her mind, gnawing at her optimism day after day. She couldn't help but wonder what would happen if none of the Royal Phoenix Clans chose to side with Yuan and instead continued their allegiance to the Celestial Emperor.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2134: The Ten Royal Phoenix Clans' Decision "My reasoning, huh? It's actually quite simple. I know you're worried about the other Royal Phoenix Clans, but once we side with the Immortal Monarch, their stance won't matter anymore. In fact, even the title of 'Royal Clan' will lose its weight," said the Grand Elder. "What...?" Feng Lingyang's eyes widened. His reasoning wasn't what she expected, yet the more she considered it, the more sense it made. The Grand Elder continued, "Even if we're the only clan to follow the Immortal Monarch, the others won't dare touch us with him behind us. But if we side with the Celestial Emperor, we'll inevitably end up clashing with the Immortal Monarch-and if you ask me, I believe his strength surpasses the Celestial Emperor's."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2135: The Ten Royal Phoenix Clans' Decision(2) "Before we begin, I would like to ask you something." Feng Lingyang suddenly stepped forward. "Go ahead." Yuan calmly nodded.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2136: Immortal Monarch's Grand Blessing After a brief silence, the Primordial Phoenix finally spoke, "Though I cannot punish you for luring the Rising Phoenix Clan to your side, I can certainly punish you for slandering the Celestial Emperor's name." "Just because you refuse to believe it doesn't make it slander," Yuan replied calmly. "Still, if you wish to fight, I'll be more than willing to oblige." The Primordial Phoenix silently swept his gaze over Yuan and the others in the chamber. Alongside Yuan and Feng Yuxiang stood Feng Lingyang, Feng Haoyu, and the Grand Elder. Though his cultivation surpassed them all, he ultimately chose not to act.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2137: Acquiring the Final Ancient Seal "M-My blood! I must test my bloodline!" the Grand Elder stammered, quickly seizing the Golden Phoenix Needle after snapping out of his daze. Moments later, his eyes widened, and he exclaimed with unrestrained joy, "90.9 percent! My bloodline purity has surpassed ninety percent! This is a miracle!" Stirred by his words, the other elders hastily tested themselves as well. Sure enough, nearly all of them discovered that their bloodline purity had risen by four to five percent.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2138: A Hundred Million After leaving the Rising Phoenix Clan, Yuan traveled straight to his next destination to prepare for the Primordial Realm. "The Abyssal Underground? You wanted to come back here?" Feng Yuxiang quickly realized where he was trying to go. He nodded and explained, "I still need a few more million kills to complete my quest, so I might as well finish it up before I head to the Primordial Realm."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2139: White Hell White Hell-a place so perilous it earned the name Gateway to Hell. There were four such forbidden lands within the Nine Heavens, and Yuan had already explored one of them, the Vanishing Valley. Being one of the coldest places in the Nine Heavens, White Hell is a vast expanse of endless snow and towering mountains, shrouded in extreme cold. The chill is so severe that even those with strong cold resistance struggle to survive in its outer regions, let alone venture into its depths. And yet, in spite of its peril and the countless lives it claims, White Hell draws thousands of cultivators every year-some to hone their strength, others to pursue the treasures buried within its icy depths.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Y-You don't have to give yourself a deadline, Disciple Yuan. You can give it to me whenever you are finished with it. There's no need to rush it. I highly doubt anybody can learn a Divine-rank technique in just a few days. Zither Arts may not be as complicated as some cultivation techniques, but it's still a Divine-rank technique nevertheless." Fei Yuyan said to Yuan after hearing his words that sounded like bragging. "Okay." Yuan didn't argue with Fei Yuyan and nodded his head before tossing the Divine-grade Zither and the Divine-rank Zither Arts into his spatial ring. [Congratulations! You have obtained a Divine-grade treasure!] [Congratulations! You have obtained a Divine-rank technique!]

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2140: White Hell(2) "What a fool. What can he do without the Sun Stone? Even if he has Cold Resistance, he won't be able to withstand the cold enough to train properly." The disciples of the Sun God's Temple shook their heads at the handsome man who refused to heed their warning. "Forget it. There will always be arrogant people like that." "I doubt we'll ever see him again."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2141: White Hell(3) When the group of ladies noticed Yuan stopping right above them, they hastily retrieved their weapons and prepared to fight him. "What do you want from us, you stalker?" one of them shouted at him. Yuan raised an eyebrow.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2142: White Hell(4) One year... two years... three years slipped by since Yuan began his cultivation in White Hell's sixth region. For all that time, he remained a frozen statue within an unremarkable cave, one among countless others scattered through the land. While he had spent most of that time alone, sometime during his second year, he received an unexpected visitor. It happened one seemingly ordinary night, when a lone figure suddenly flew into his cave and crashed to the ground.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2143: The Demon Sealing Faction's Return Once the colossal mammoth and the silhouette disappeared, Yuan entered the seventh region before looking for a random cave. The seventh region was so frigid that even with Cold Harmony, Yuan needed to cloak himself in True Primordial Fire just to move. Without it, he would be frozen instantly, reduced to an ice statue. Some time later, Yuan sat cross-legged within a cave and withdrew the True Primordial Fire, allowing the cold to engulf him—thus beginning his training anew.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2144: The Demon Sealing Faction's Return(2) "What about us?" Xi Meili suddenly asked, referring to herself and Liya, as they were both dragons. Kelan gave her a stiff smile. “To be honest, I'm not sure. I do have a few non-human friends I could reach out to, but I can't promise anything. Do you know of any place where you could train?" Xi Meili fell silent to ponder, and after a minute of silence, she said, "I do have a place in mind... but I'm not sure they'll be okay with it."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2145: Yu Family's Return After spending half a day with Yu Rou and Bai Lianhua, Meixiu returned home. "You're back." When Meixiu walked through the entrance, she was greeted by a familiar face sweeping the ground.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2146: Arrangements Several days after the Demon Sealing Sect made their return, Wang Ming and the members who had come from the Jaded Garden opted to descend from the mountain to reunite with their families. “We'll be back in a few months,” Wang Ming assured. “Enjoy your time,” Meifeng replied warmly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2147: Heaven's Sect Hearing Senior Bai's question, Li Jinxi responded calmly, without a trace of hesitation. “It's quite simple.
