I just don't believe there's anything these sects can teach me." After all, she was a reincarnator who carried the memories of her past life. Unlike the others, she was already far ahead in terms of experience. Cultivation sects were typically stepping stones for the inexperienced or havens for those wishing to settle in one place. But Li Jinxi was neither, and she would gain far more by wandering the world on her own. In fact, most cultivators who graduate from their sects more often than not set out on their own adventures, hoping to encounter good fortune along the way.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2148: Keling On the fourth day of the Demon Sealing Faction's return to Cultivation Online, Kelan summoned Wang Ming when his recruiter arrived at the sect. "This junior greets Senior." Wang Ming bowed to the handsome middle-aged man standing beside Kelan. The man nodded and introduced himself, "My name is Liu An, and I am the Sect Master of the Origin Sword Sect. We're a top-five sword sect within the Nine Heavens and number two in the Eighth Heaven."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2149: Keling (2) "That's not right." Kelan shook his head and elaborated, "I despise our parents. I harbor no hard feelings toward any of my siblings. After all, it was our parents' decision to feed me giant's blood." "Even though you gained immense strength from it? All of our siblings envy you, you know?" Keling said. ᴛʜs ᴄʜᴀᴘᴛʀ s ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛ ʙʏ novel✶fire.net "That strength didn't come for free," Kelan replied, his fists clenched tightly. "I endured decades of indescribable pain just to absorb it. Even now, my body still aches at times, as if remembering what I went through back then."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After the zither competition ended, Yuan and the others returned to the Royal Blossom Hotel for a moment before checking out of the hotel and making their way back to the Dragon Essence Temple on the sect elders' flying treasures. Meanwhile, in the real world, many powerful and influential individuals from over a dozen different families from across the world gathered online in a group call. "We have to do something about this Player Yuan! He's tearing the Legacy Families' reputation to shreds! Every single time his name appears on the announcement, it's a slap to our faces! Even worse, we still don't know his identity!" One of the voices said in a serious voice. "What do you suggest we do then? We don't know this player's identity, nor does it seem like he wants our money," said another voice.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2150: Returning to the Holy Dragon Clan "Since it's decided, I will take you to the Ninth Heaven so you can train in the Gates of Heaven. However, it'll take some time to get approval, so you can continue staying here until then," Senior Bai said. Chu Liuxiang nodded, "Take your time." "It shouldn't take too long--three months at most."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2151: White Hell Frost Lotus "Whoa!" Yuan wasn't expecting to be attacked so suddenly, but he still managed to dodge her attack. "Calm down! I am not your enemy!" Hearing his familiar voice, the woman halted her movements and turned to look at his face. "You're... the

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2152: Gu Ruyan "So you know that I am a Player, huh? Is it really that surprising for me to be here?" Yuan responded with a calm smile as he blocked Gu Ruyan's next strike with ease. "We have been keeping track of their progress, and most of them are still in the Fifth Heaven! So how in Heaven's name are you in the Eighth Heaven? In the seventh region of White Hell, no less!" Although those in the upper heavens were forbidden from approaching Players until they reached the Seventh Heaven, many influential clans and powerful sects still kept close watch on their progress. This way, they could not only recruit them once they qualified, but also prepare themselves to deal with them if necessary. "And how the hell are you still alive? I thought the others had already taken care of you, hence why we stopped looking for you!" Gu Ruyan couldn't believe that Yuan had been alive this entire time. The events in the lower heavens sent shockwaves throughout not only that realm but even the

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2153: Gu Ruyan (2) "What are you going to do next, Young Master?" Yu Ning asked Yuan shortly later. Yuan initially planned to return to Gu Ruyan, but he changed his mind when he sensed that one of Gu Ruyan's friends had returned. "He definitely thinks I died to the Rod of Destruction, so I'll deal with Gu Ruyan later. Right now, I should save that woman before his friends catch up to her and kill her." Yuan had activated Shadow Veil the moment he restored his body, so Gu Ruyan was unaware that he had survived the attack. Thus, Yuan chased after the other two while Gu Ruyan reunited with his friend who had just returned. "Gu Ruyan! What the fuck do you think you are doing, using the Rod of Destruction in this place?! Don't tell me you used it just to take care of that Golden Immortal!" The friend immediately began lecturing Gu Ruyan the moment they reunited. "I-I had no choice! He also had a Rod of Destruction with him! If I hadn't used it, he would've used it on me!" Gu Ruyan e

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2154: Familiar-Looking Sword "Hah!" The other woman suddenly sneered out loud. "I don't know how you managed to escape Gu Ruyan and Lin Canye, but you're in no position to help others." Yuan turned to face the woman and asked, "And who are you? Are you also surnamed Gu? Or do you belong to one of the other Legacy Families?" "You know who we are?" The woman expressed surprise at Yuan's words.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2155: Creator's Mark "So, what are you going to do with that Violet Dream? Put me into an eternal slumber?" Yuan asked the woman, snapping her out of her daze. "You recognize this sword?" she muttered in a surprised tone, before quickly adding, "No, I shouldn't be surprised. This is a very famous sword, created by the legendary blacksmith, the Exalted Blacksmith, after all!" "Where'd you get it?" Yuan then asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2156: Barbarians "That's impossible! You can't possibly be the Exalted Blacksmith!" Lady Chen shouted, her voice sharp enough to cut through the air. "I know! This sword must be a fake—it can't be the real Violet Dream!" Desperately, she created an excuse, however absurd it may be. To her, it was still more reasonable than accepting the notion that Yuan could be the Exalted Blacksmith. "You can believe whatever you want, but it won't change the fact that you're holding onto something that belongs to me," Yuan said as he beckoned for the weapon. "Hand me the sword, and I will grant you a painless death. Refuse, and I will take it myself—along with your fingers, perhaps even your limbs," Yuan said as his aura surged violently.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2157: Barbarians (2) After several days of travel, the barbarians halted at the border of the Eighth Region, where a small settlement unexpectedly stood. Lady Chen and the others were stunned-none of them had believed it was possible for anyone to survive White Hell's extreme environment long enough to build a home there. Shortly after arriving, the barbarians gathered them together and stood around them in silence. After several long minutes of silence, Gu Ruyan finally gathered the courage to ask, "What are you going to do to us?" The barbarians turned their gazes on him, and the sheer weight of their eyes made him tremble with fear. "What do you think we're going to do?" a calm voice suddenly replied. Gu Ruyan and the others turned toward the sound, where a tall figure stepped out from one of the nearby buildings. She was a tall, muscular woman, her frame radiating dominance. From her surged an overwhelming aura-the unmistakable might of an expert at the Seventh Level of God

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2158: Absolute Dragon Awakening After a long, tense silence, the barbarian suddenly burst into laughter, her voice so powerful it rattled the air itself. "You'll slaughter us all? With what-your pitiful cultivation base?" she mocked. "I wouldn't recommend it, but you're more than welcome to find out," Yuan responded with a calm smile on his handsome face. The barbarian's grin vanished, replaced by a chilling frown. "I dislike you. Arrogant, weak, and oblivious- you don't even know when to hold your tongue." Without giving Yuan a chance to respond, she lifted her arm high and struck. In the blink of an eye, his head was reduced to nothing.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2159: Ten Strikes From Chief Mu Chief Mu's second strike carried even greater force than her first. When it collided with Yuan's, the clash of their weapon auras unleashed a ripple that cleaved every mountain within a thousand miles cleanly in half. After using her second strike and seeing Yuan emerge completely unscathed, Chief Mu understood that ordinary attacks would not be able to defeat a monster like him. On her third strike, Chief Mu gathered her spiritual energy and prepared to launch a martial technique. "Glacial Roar!" Chief Mu smashed her axes together, sending millions of tiny ice shards in Yuan's direction. Despite their small size, each of these shards was powerful enough to kill Immortals. Yet, Yuan didn't even bother blocking them, merely using his physique to endure them. <Your Cold Resistance has improved greatly> "Heavens! He used nothing but his body to block Chief Mu's Glacial Roar! I've never seen anything like that before!" The barbarians stared in astoni

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Once Yuan and the other disciples left the place, Long Yijun turned to look at Elder Shan and Elder Xuan with a serious expression on his face. "Tell me everything that has happened," he said to them with a listening look on his face. Elder Xuan nodded and said, "Allow me to explain first." He then proceeded to explain everything that had happened during their time outside the sect, leaving almost no detail out, such as Elder Shan's scandalous behavior.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2160: Granny Mu Hearing such words, the fur-robed barbarian asked what was on everyone's mind, "Grandmother... you know him?" "Hard to say," she calmly responded. "He looks exactly like someone once knew, but his cultivation is much lower, and there's something different about him. That said, the one I knew disappeared millions of years ago, but with his cultivation, I wouldn't be surprised if he is still alive." "Is this person the same one you would constantly reminisce about to Mother and me?" the fur-robed barbarian asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2161: White Hell Barbarian Tribe "It's time for me to die?" Yuan spoke with a smile on his face. "Who are you to decide when I die?" "Chief of the White Hell Barbarian Tribe, a seventh-level God Ascension cultivator, that's who I am," Chief Mu calmly responded, her aura continuously increasing with every passing moment. "Then allow me to apologize in advance, since I will be disappointing you."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2162: Let Them Go "Does it really matter what it was? I survived your ninth strike, so I win our little game," Yuan responded with a calm smile on his face. "I'm gonna kill you, you damn freak!" Chief Mu angrily shouted, but she was not emitting any killing intent. "That's enough." Granny Mu suddenly said. "Put him down."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2163: Mu Hanyan While Yuan dealt with Gu Ruyan and the others, Chief Mu consumed a recovery pill that restored her severed arms and exhausted energy. Unfortunately, there was no pill that could erase the humiliation she felt from losing to Yuan, nor was there anything she could do about it since she had already given him her word that she wouldn't touch him if he won, not to mention her mother seemed to know him. Chief Mu may be the leader of the White Hell Barbarian Tribe, but her mother, Granny Mu, the leader before her, held more power and authority. "Mother, who is that man?" Chief Mu asked. A bittersweet smile appeared on her face as she responded, "Your father..."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2164: Shiva's Hell "You know, I've only just achieved True Cold Harmony after cultivating for tens of millions of years..." Mu Hanyan sighed. "Unfortunately, I might not be able to achieve the next realm so quickly." Hearing his words, Mu Hanyan fell silent for a moment before speaking, "If you want fast progress, I may know a place where you can further improve your Cold Harmony." "Really?" Yuan's eyes lit up with excitement. "Where is it?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2165: Shiva (1) After leaving the White Hell Barbarian Tribe's settlement, Mu Hanyan brought Yuan and Mu Xuelian into the eighth region. Of course, Chief Mu followed behind. "How are you feeling? Can you handle the cold here?" Mu Hanyan asked, her head turned toward Yuan. "It's a bit chilly, but it feels good," he calmly nodded. After achieving True Cold Harmony, the seventh region's chill no longer fazed him. To Yuan, the once-lethal cold now felt like nothing more than a refreshing breeze against his skin. As for the eighth region, it felt no more than a morning chill at the end of summer.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2166: The Heart of Shiva "Say that again!" Chief Mu demanded, not daring to believe her ears just now. Mu Hanyan turned to look at her and calmly repeated, "I brought him here because Shiva instructed me to." "N-No way..." Chief Mu's jaw dropped. "When did that happen? When did Shiva contact you?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2167: Shiva (3) Watching Mu Xuelian enter the pond so calmly, Yuan thought it looked comfortable-an odd sight for him. "This place is supposed to temper my Cold Harmony... How could training possibly feel comfortable?" he wondered. After all, the path that had brought Yuan to where he stood today had been paved with hardship. Unless he was consuming a treasure, every method of training he had known was grueling and agonizing, offering not a single breath of peace or comfort. 'I should start my training, too.' Yuan snapped out of his thoughts and also began to undress, placing his neatly folded robes on the ice bed. He approached the pond and silently stared at it. Though Mu Xuelian had saved him some space, there was barely enough room for him, and it seemed impossible to train in it together without touching her. "There's not enough space for both of us, so my back will be touching yours, if you don't mind," he said. Of course, they could take turns cultivating inside the pond

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2168: Outer Gods' True Identity "If Outer God isn't your title, then what is your true one? How should I address your kind from now on?" Yuan asked. "Your kind...?" Shiva's eyes narrowed dangerously. "Bold words for a mere human. Were I not powerless in this moment, I would kill you for such disrespect." Yuan's lips curled into a smile. "Oh, I'm terrified," he mocked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2169: Eternal Constitution "Eternal Constitution, you say...?" Yuan swallowed nervously. A cold smile tugged at Shiva's lips as she spoke, "You don't even know about the Eternal Constitution, and you dare claim that I don't know anything about your physique? I don't know how you came to possess the Heaven Refining Physique, but it is basically an inferior version of the Eternal Constitution—a physique that only belongs to Eternals. It is also because of your physique that you're able to use Heaven's Supremacy. Otherwise, your body wouldn't have been able to handle it." "..." Yuan fell silent. He'd acquired the Heaven Refining Physique due to a fateful encounter with a treasure in the Primordial Era. However, he didn't know anything about its origin until now. 'So it turned out to be related to the Outer Gods, huh?' he sighed inwardly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Welcome back to the Dragon Pavilion, senior disciples," Chu Bo greeted Yuan and the others the moment he'd arrived before looking at Yuan with admiration in his gaze. After all, this is his first time seeing someone with so many top beauties at once, and they were even prominent beauties within the sect. One can only imagine how many people would be envious of Yuan's situation right now, as he had a beauty sitting close to him in almost every direction. "Have you decided on what you'd like to eat?" Chu Bo asked them after his greeting. Yuan nodded and spoke without even a shred of hesitation within his voice, "I want everything on the menu like last time."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2170: True Immortal "Hey, are you okay?" Yuan hurried out of the pond and rushed to Mu Xuelian's side, finding her drenched in sweat and gasping for breath. After catching her breath, Mu Xuelian lifted her head to glare at him. "Who... who are you...?" she muttered. "I'm Yuan," he instantly replied.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2171: Refining Essence "What are you hesitating for? I thought humans loved the act of dual cultivation, especially men," Mu Xuelian said, relaying Shiva's words. More chapters in t.me/+9n1w1vacSaZhYzAy "This isn't ordinary dual cultivation-and I already have partners," Yuan said with a slight frown. "I won't cultivate with someone I just met, let alone against her will." "I don't understand."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2172: Refining Shiva's Essence "For Shura to have given you his Eternal Constitution... It's unimaginable for an Eternal to do such a thing," Shiva murmured, disbelief still lacing her voice. "Your connection with him must be unfathomable..." She continued, "But merely possessing a true Eternal Constitution wouldn't let you refine nature's essence—not with a human soul. Since you mentioned reincarnation, your soul must have already surpassed human limits. In other words, you are no longer truly human, but something between that of a human and an Eternal." More chapters in t.me/+9n1w1vacSaZhYzAy "So I'm a half-god?" Yuan remarked with a smile. "Don't flatter yourself. You may have surpassed human limits, but you are nowhere near a god-not even one percent," Shiva sneered.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2173: Releasing Shiva From Her Seal ’A realm beyond Cold Harmony, huh?’ Yuan wasn’t surprised by this new discovery. In fact, he anticipated something like this existed because of the existence of Eternals. If Cold Harmony was the limit of humans, then there must be a realm only achievable by gods. ’This human... he’s actually refining my essence!’ Shiva could only stare in shock and disbelief as Yuan refined the liquid from the sealed ice above. Despite its name, Shiva’s Essence was not truly her existence, but something born from it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2174: The Method to Completing the Eternal Constitution "Are you going to directly evolve my physique with your god-like power or something?" Yuan asked. Shiva looked at him with an odd gaze. "I may be a god, but I am not omnipotent. Furthermore, I do not have my body, and my powers are sealed within the Nine Heavens."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2175: Leaving White Hell “C-Congratulations on regaining your freedom, Lord Shiva!” After a brief moment of silence, Mu Hanyan snapped out of her daze and spoke loudly. Shiva nodded and said, “The White Hell Barbarian Tribe has fulfilled their duties well. I shall bestow upon your tribe a fitting reward before my departure.”

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2176: The Final Moments of the Immortal Monarch’s Life "There are more sealed Eternals in the Nine Heavens...?" Yuan muttered in a daze. "Of course. Since we cannot kill each other, the Nine Heavens is the perfect place to seal each other," said Mu Xuelian, relaying Shiva’s words. "Eternals cannot kill each other? That’s the first I’ve heard of it," Yuan remarked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2177: Dusk Intelligence "My name is Feng Yuxiang. As you can probably guess from my aura, I am a phoenix, and I am the Young Master’s most loyal and number one servant," Feng Yuxiang introduced herself first. Lan Yingying went next. "I’m Lan Yingying. I am also a beast—a Divine Serpent."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2178: Primordial Realm’s Location "Dong Ye. It’s been a while," Yuan returned the greeting with a warm smile. "Indeed, it has." Dong Ye nodded. "I heard that you’ve anticipated my arrival."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2179: Primordial Chaos(End of Immortal Monarch’s Return Arc) The Primordial Chaos was among the most perilous places in the Nine Heavens, its unique environment cutting cultivators off from spiritual energy. Once their reserves were spent within its depths, they could not recover their strength until they escaped its boundaries. Though the Primordial Chaos was technically part of the Nine Heavens, only its outermost edges lay within those boundaries. To venture any deeper was to step beyond the Nine Heavens’ protection and into the unknown. Moreover, the creatures that roamed within its depths were all at least of the God Ascension realm. "Although the Primordial Chaos is a dangerous place, it’s not the location that’s the most worrying, but the Celestial Emperor’s dogs that are protecting that place," Dong Ye sighed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After leaving the Dragon Pavilion, Xuan Wuhan and Fei Yuyan said their farewells to Yuan and Min Li. "I have to get back to training, so I'll find another time to chat with you, Yuan. It has been a wonderful experience these past few days," Xuan Wuhan said to him. "Now that the zither competition is over, I also have to return to my regular training schedule. Once again, thank you for everything, Disciple Yuan. I'll see you later," Fei Yuyan bowed to him before leaving. "What are you going to do now that the competition is over?" Min Li asked him as they walked back to their houses together.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2180: Entering the Primordial Realm "It is the Celestial Family’s flag," Dong Ye confirmed with a calm smile on his face. "This way, we’ll be able to approach the Primordial Realm without being stopped." "Impersonating the Celestial Family, huh? Most people wouldn’t even dream of doing something like this," Yuan chuckled.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2181 Inside the Primordial Realm Upon hearing Dong Ye's command, the Shadow Army began its fight with the guards of the Primordial Realm. "We cannot let that crazy bastard open the Primordial Realm and let the criminals inside loose!" The guards fought with desperate ferocity, as though not only their own lives, but the lives of their families, hung in the balance. The Primordial Realm housed countless dangerous and heinous criminals, and none of them dared even to imagine what would happen if these criminals were set free in the Nine Heavens.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2182 Inside the Primordial Realm(2) "You're here to ask for directions…?" The skinny man wore a dumbfounded look on his face after hearing Yuan's words. He focused on Yuan's appearance again. In the Primordial Realm, due to its chaotic environment, having a healthy appearance was a privilege accessible only to the most powerful individuals and families. But what truly set Yuan apart from the ordinary dwellers of the Primordial Realm was the vast reservoir of spiritual energy within him. Though he tried to conceal it, those who had long been starved of such energy could instinctively sense its presence.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2183 Inside the Primordial Realm(3) As the second-level God Ascension cultivator pondered, his gaze fell upon Yuan and Mu Xuelian. Although Yuan was only a True Immortal, his appearance and abundant spiritual energy implied that he came from a powerful family. However, what truly surprised him was Mu Xuelian's existence. There were many God Ascension realm cultivators within the Primordial Realm, but those who had as much spiritual energy as Mu Xuelian were incredibly rare, including those with a much higher cultivation than hers. 'Besides that white-haired woman, I can defeat the others, but it'll exhaust too much energy. Since there are only a few of us, there's no need to risk it.'

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2184 Asura Clan's Location The man's expression darkened after hearing the name Asura Clan. "What did you just say?! The Asura Clan?! Are you insane? How dare you utter their name before me! You must be trying to get me killed!" Yuan narrowed his eyes slightly and responded, "What are you so afraid of? You're not the first person I've asked about the Asura Clan, but you all have the same terrified reaction, almost as if you'll die just for talking about them."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2185 Primordial Realm's Three Region "I have never met a cultivator as kind as you, Senior Brother," said the young man as he led Yuan to a nearby restaurant. "Are you sure you want to eat at this place?" Yuan asked with a raised eyebrow after seeing the rundown building the young man had brought him to. "Don't let its crummy appearance fool you, Senior Brother. This shop has some of the best noodles in this city—and the cities nearby."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2186 A Single Gold Coin "I-Is that real?" the young man stammered after hearing it was a gold coin. Most of the earliest people cast into the Primordial Realm had arrived empty-handed, but in the chaos, a few managed to smuggle in their treasures and valuables. As a result, items like gold coins, spirit stones, and other treasures did exist in the Primordial Realm—but they were exceedingly rare and priceless. This was especially true given that many eras had passed since the Primordial Era, and most of such valuables had long since been claimed by the powerful or lost to the ravages of time. "Of course, it's real." Yuan nodded. "Anyway, can I pay with this?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2187 A Single Gold Coin(2) Although there were 20 bowls of noodles, the group finished them in less than half an hour. "Wow, I have never been this full before," said the young man as he patted his stomach, which was noticeably rounder. "Will you be heading to the First City immediately?" he then asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2188 Chaos' Auction House After arriving at the Fourth City, Yuan continued flying in the same direction without stopping for another full day. That night, Wu Qi slept while still in the air, as he was a mortal who needed sleep. Though they were flying at great speed, the world felt strangely still when he closed his eyes, granting him a surprisingly peaceful rest. When Wu Qi opened his eyes again, it was already morning, and he could see another city in the distance.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2189 Chaos' Auction House(2) "You also have one?!" Chen Cheng exclaimed as he stared at the gold coin in Wu Qi's grasp. "Uh… yes?" Wu Qi quickly placed the gold coin onto the table. "Alright, give me a few minutes to verify them."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "So this is the Exchange Hall, huh?" Yuan stared at the entrance with a pondering gaze. The Exchange Hall is where disciples go to spend their hard-earned contributions points, and unlike the Profound Pavilion that only has cultivation techniques, the Exchange Hall has everything else from treasures to cultivation resources. "Hey! Why are you standing there and blocking the entrance? If you're not going to enter, scram!" A tall and bulky disciple suddenly walked up from behind and forcefully bumped into Yuan's shoulder, snapping him out of his admiration for the building.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2190 Auction for a Single Gold Coin "See you in two days." However, just as Yuan and his group approached the exit, Yuan came to a sudden halt. "Did you forget something?" Chen Cheng asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2191 Auction for a Single Gold Coin(2) It took a couple of hours, but Yuan's group eventually made it to the entrance of the auction house. "I'm sorry, but the seats are already fully occupied. If you're here to bid for the gold coin, you'll have to do so out here," said the worker at the entrance. Yuan didn't say anything and retrieved the token he got from Chen Cheng, showing it to him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2192 Auction for a Single Gold Coin(3) "Five hundred thousand? For a single coin?" Yuan raised an eyebrow at the absurd starting price. Now he understood why Chen Cheng gave him so much money without hesitation. "550,000!" Someone immediately increased the bid.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2193 Wu Qi's Gift The atmosphere in the room instantly became heavy with the woman's words. However, Yuan remained unaffected and calmly responded, "Is the Chaotic Sect so great that waiting five days is considered offensive?" The woman's face flushed red as she spoke, "Are you mocking our Chaotic Sect?!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2194 Auction for the Spirit Stone "Thanks, Wu Qi, for this gift," Yuan said to him after stowing away the crystal. "Do you think we can meet again in the future?" Wu Qi asked. "Honestly, I don't know, since I won't be staying in the Primordial Realm for long."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2195 Auction for the Spirit Stone(2) Yuan smiled at Chen Cheng's words and said, "I appreciate your concern, but the Chaotic Sect is nothing in my eyes." "Nothing… in your eyes?" Chen Cheng swallowed nervously. In his mind, only someone from the Asura Clan would dare speak with such arrogance. 'Is he actually from the Asura Clan? But then why would he need information on the Spirit Tree? No, let's stop thinking about this. It's beyond me.' After a moment of hesitation, Chen Cheng said, "The Chaos Elders intend to take care of you after the auction. Please be careful."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2196 Auction for the Spirit Stone(3) "A second spirit stone! He actually has a second spirit stone!" "Do you intend on selling that spirit stone as well?!" Yuan responded to the inquiry, "Yes, I do intend on selling the spirit stone, but I don't want money for it."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2197 Location of the Spirit Tree Hearing the man's offer, Yuan couldn't help but smile. "I see. So you're going to attack the Asura Clan. How many people do you already have with you?" he asked. The man then said, "We have the majority of the top factions on our side. The Asura Clan might be powerful—undoubtedly the most powerful in the Primordial Realm—but if we all work together, not even they will be able to stop us."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2198 Second Chaotic Heart After storing the money, Yuan turned around and began walking toward the exit. "Esteemed guest… It's not too late…" Chen Cheng suddenly spoke, halting his movements. Yuan turned to face him and asked, "What are you talking about?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2199 Confronting the Chaos Elders "So you knew we were tracking you, yet you still decided to leave the city alone? I can't even imagine what's going through that mind of yours," remarked the female Chaos Elder, her tone full of mockery. "It's nothing complicated. There's just no reason for me to worry. After all, you're not a threat to me," Yuan calmly responded. "Still trying to act tough? Not only are you just an Immortal, but we outnumber you."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Senior Chang, this is what had happened…" Na Ying began explaining to her the events that took place right before she'd arrived. "You… you foolish thing!" Senior Chang was speechless. To think that Lian Rong, someone usually with keen eyes and great intelligence to misjudge a hidden expert due to her arrogance. "There is nobody you can blame but yourself for being so arrogant and failing to recognize Mt. Tai!" she shook her head.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Standing casually by the wall, Yuan pondered what he could use his contribution points on. 'I already have two Soul Weapons and a couple of treasures, so I don't need any more of these. I also have enough techniques. What about cultivation resources? But how do I know what I need?' 'I am one level away from being a Spirit Master, but I am not in a rush. Though, if they have something that can help me reach Spirit Master, I might as well get it…' After pondering for a few minutes, Yuan decided to ask for some Spirit Warrior monster cores so that he can consume them and hopefully reach the Spirit Master realm.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2200 Confronting the Chaos Elders(2) "Damn it! What kind of mess did you drag me into, Elder Pan?! Elder Zi! You offended a monster!" The third cultivator shouted at the Chaos Elders. "It… it wasn't supposed to be like this…" Elder Zi murmured, her dazed eyes clouded with disbelief, struggling to accept the reality before her. "L-Let's talk about this!" Elder Pan suddenly said. "If you agree to stop here, we'll overlook the fact that you killed two of our members and act like we don't even know each other!" "And if I refuse?" Yuan asked just for the entertainment.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2201 Inferno Alchemists Three days had passed since they entered the Land of Inferno. Yuan suddenly noticed the cultivator's pace quickening, as though impatience—or something else—was driving him forward. "Is there something wrong?" Yuan asked him. "W-What?" The cultivator muttered as he turned to face Yuan, looking startled by the question.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2202 The Chaotic Sect's Response "What Alchemist Shen said is logical. If those two are truly connected to the Asura Clan in some way and we kill them, it'd spell the end of our faction," one of the elders said, breaking the silence. "Then what should we do with them? The chances of them being 'friends' with the Asura Clan are slim to none, and if we bother the Asura Clan, it might affect our relationship with them," said another elder. "Why don't we hold off on contacting the Asura Clan and examine them for a little while before we make any decision?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2203 The Chaotic Sect's Revenge "I am aware of how ridiculous it sounds, but it is the truth," said Sect Leader Zu. "Hmm…" After a moment of silence, Leader Yang responded, "I understand your situation. Unfortunately, I cannot just hand him over to you."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2204 Unfathomable Killing Intent "Keep me here…?" A smile appeared on Yuan's face as he stopped his killing spree. "I believe there is a misunderstanding. I have no intention of going anywhere, much less running away." "Do you really believe you can defeat the Chaotic Sect by yourself?! Our leader is at the 7th level of God Ascension powerhouse! He's not someone you can even touch, let alone defeat!" "Seventh level, huh? It might be a little difficult, but it's definitely doable." The disciples stared at him with stunned disbelief. After a moment of silence, they all burst out laughing.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2205 Fighting Sect Leader Zu "This killing intent… it feels familiar…" the middle-aged man murmured as he rose to his feet, stepping onto the surface of a small, tranquil pond where he had been seated in meditation. After a moment of silence, he spoke in a slightly loud and clear voice, "Xiao Meilin." In the next moment, a tall and beautiful woman with facial features similar to Xiao Hua but much more mature appeared before him like a ghost.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2206 The Crimson Empress' Appearance "Do you recognize that man?" Leader Yang asked Xiao Meilin after hearing her mumbling. However, she didn't respond. "Senior Crimson Emper—?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2207 The Crimson Empress' Appearance(2) "You have no idea how long I have waited for this moment, Master Tian!" Xiao Meilin laughed chaotically as she swung her sword mercilessly, despite the difference in their cultivation. "You're really enjoying yourself, aren't you?" Yuan remarked with a stiff smile on his face. For some reason, he didn't feel the need to tell her to stop attacking him, almost as if he knew that it would be pointless and that the only way for her to stop was to satisfy her.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2208 Meeting the Asura Clan "This is a friend of mine, Mu Xuelian," Yuan casually introduced her. "Hmm…" Xiao Meilin suddenly vanished into thin air before appearing before Mu Xuelian like a ghost. "Can I help you?" Mu Xuelian calmly asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2209 Meeting the Asura Clan(2) While Yuan waited for the Patriarch of the Asura Clan to finish with his business, he recalled Tian Xian's past with them. After avenging Xiu Mei's death, Tian Xian did not stop his rampage. Since the Celestial Emperor was the true reason behind Xiu Mei's assassination, he swore that he would not stop until he killed the Celestial Emperor. Aware of Tian Xian's desire for his life, the Celestial Emperor had no choice but to dispatch the Asura Clan—his strongest allies at the time—to confront him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: After Yuan left the Exchange Hall because he learned that one cannot access the second floor unless they are Inner Court disciples, he suddenly recalled the silver medallion that Elder Xuan had given him. 'If I remember correctly, the silver medallion will allow me to obtain cultivation resources at the Treasury Hall. Maybe they'll have some Spirit Warrior monster cores there.' Yuan thought to himself. 'Where's the Treasury Hall, again?' Yuan began pondering. A few moments later, once Yuan realized that the Treasury Hall was in the Inner Court, he sighed out loud, "In the end, I still have to become an Inner Court disciple…"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2210 Meeting the Asura Clan(3) "I told you to grow the Spirit Tree? Then…" Seeing Yuan's reaction, Xiao Cangming could guess why he was worried and said, "Indeed, I grew the Spirit Tree under your instruction. However, my illness did not originate from the Spirit Tree. That being said, it is related to my illness." "What?" Yuan raised his eyebrows in a puzzled manner.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2211 The Solution to Xiao Hua's Issue "I understand the situation," Xiao Cangming muttered after a moment of silence. "The balance between the two souls within her is broken, and they're currently clashing with each other—trying to consume each other." "What?!" Yuan exclaimed in shock after hearing the last few words in Xiao Cangming's sentence. "Their souls are trying to consume each other?! This is the first time I'm hearing this! I was told they were only fighting for control of the body!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2212 The Solution to Xiao Hua's Issue(2) 'Is that true? We have enough resources to craft Xiao Hua a new vessel?' Yuan asked for confirmation just in case he misheard. 'Honestly, it depends on how complicated you want the vessel to be, but for a temporary vessel, we should have enough,' said Feng Yuxiang. Like treasures, a vessel can be stronger or weaker depending on the resources used to create it.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2213 Li Zhenwu "Well, what do you think?" Feng Yuxiang asked as she showcased her treasures with a prideful air around her. Xiao Cangmang took a moment to look over the treasures before responding with a surprised expression, "I'll be honest with you. I can't identify even half of the treasures here, but judging from their intense aura, I'm sure they're all priceless treasures—beyond anything I anticipated. If we have this quality of treasure, we can definitely make a top-grade vessel." "In that case, allow me to introduce them to you," Feng Yuxiang said as she began identifying the treasures and explaining their uses.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2214 Li Zhenwu(2) Once Li Zhenwu returned to the room with more tea leaves, Yuan began telling her stories of his adventures with Xiao Cangming. Mu Xuelian stayed in the room to listen since she had nothing else better to do. Xiao Meilin also decided to stay for the nostalgia. Meanwhile, Xiao Cangming began preparing to forge Xiao Hua's new vessel, running countless simulations within his mind. Just as Tian Qiyuan could refine his crafting skills through mental training alone, true masters possessed the ability to temper their skills entirely within the realm of thought.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2215 Saaruk Sometime later, Xiao Meilin brought Yuan to the Spirit Tree, which was located only a few miles away from the Asura Clan's residence. Shortly after they left the residence, Mu Xuelian, who followed them, spoke, "Yuan, Lord Shiva has something to tell you." "Hm? What is it?" Yuan turned to look at her.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2216 Saaruk's Threat When Yuan heard this voice, he immediately delved into his mind, as this voice seemed more than just his imagination. Within his consciousness, he sensed that a fragment of the Saaruk's power had transformed into a kind of link, forging a connection between them. It functioned much like a communication jade slip, allowing their minds to intertwine and exchange words directly. "Hm? Wait a second… this presence… you're not an Eternal!" Saaruk's voice returned before Yuan could respond to it. "A mortal! How dare a mere mortal attempt to covet the power of the mighty Saaruk!" the voice roared, its fury intensifying as it realized its own strength was being refined by a human.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2217 Xiao Hua's New Vessel "Her memories will regress? How far will it regress?" Yuan asked after hearing this. Xiao Cangming shook his head and said, "It differs every time, so we won't know until it happens." "I see. Then we can only deal with it when the time comes," Yuan said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2218 Evil God’s True Bloodline "So Xiao Hua becoming an exile wasn't part of our plans…?" Yuan mumbled after learning of this surprising information. "Why do you ask? Is there something wrong with that girl?" Xiao Cangming asked. Yuan looked at the slumbering girl and sighed, "She has the Evil God's True Bloodline."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2219 Spirit Tree "By the way, you said the Spirit Tree hasn't fully matured yet?" Yuan suddenly recalled Xiao Cangming mentioning this earlier. He nodded and confirmed, "The Spirit Tree is still growing…" After a brief pause, he continued, "...No, that's not quite right. To be honest, the Spirit Tree hasn't grown in tens of millions of years. No matter how much cultivation I pour into it, it remains unchanged. In the beginning, it responded, showing clear signs of growth each time I fed it my energy, but that ceased not long after it reached this form."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: As Yuan approached Elder Shan and the other two figures, he noticed these four-legged objects sitting on the ground in front of them, and they were pretty large as well. 'What are those things? They look like pots… And there is even smoke coming from them…' Yuan thought to himself as he got closer and closer to them. "Senior Shan!" Yuan called out to her once he was close enough. "Hmm?" Elder Shan turned around with raised eyebrows, wondering who would dare to enter her territory without making an appointment, as she wasn't expecting any visitors today.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2220 Spirit Tree(2) Even before Yuan arrived at the Asura Clan, scouts had been stationed near the Burning Tree, watching closely for any opportunity to strike. Then, when Yuan awakened the Spirit Tree, it cracked open the Asura Clan's world, opening its sanctuary to the outside world. "The Asura Clan's world is open, but I don't see anyone going in or coming out."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2221 Spirit Tree(3) With Xiao Cangming's approval, Xiao Meilin drew her sword as she stepped forward, approaching the sea of experts before them. "Do you really think you can defeat all of us with your pitiful numbers?" Zhao Juechen sneered. "Only two of you are at the ninth level of God Ascension. The rest of you are between the first level and the seventh level. Even if you doubled your number, you won't be able to defeat us!" Zhao Juechen was unaware that Xiao Cangming had fed his cultivation to the Spirit Tree and regressed back to the first level of God Ascension, so in reality, only Xiao Meilin was at the peak of God Ascension.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2222 Spirit Tree(4) After a moment of silence, Zhao Juechen muttered in a low voice, "So what…?" "SO WHAT IF THE EVIL GOD IS ALIVE?!" he suddenly roared. "It doesn't change anything! As long as we're stuck in this world, the Spirit Tree is necessary to us, and we'll do anything to acquire it!" Xiao Cangming sneered, "Even if you somehow manage to acquire the Spirit Tree, it's not something you can manage. Do you truly think the Spirit Tree is a treasure with limitless power? How naive. Once the Spirit Tree runs out of power, you will return to being deprived of spiritual energy."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2223 Xiao Hua's Awakening As Xiao Hua's cultivation rose, her strikes became heavier and more powerful, and she even started using martial techniques. "Young Master, it looks like she really wants to kill you," Feng Yuxiang remarked as she watched from inside his Dantian, feeling a bit dazed, as she could've never imagined Xiao Hua attacking Yuan so fiercely. "Her memories regressed back to the Primordial Era—to a time when we didn't have the best relationship. Back then, she would always try to kill me when she had the chance," Yuan sighed with a bitter smile. "I don't blame her, though. I did kill her mother, after all."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2224 Fighting Xiao Hua After Xiao Hua's cultivation reached the second level of God Ascension, Feng Yuxiang was no longer a match and was forced to go on the defensive. "What's wrong, you annoying bird?! Why have you gone quiet when you were talking so much just moments ago?!" Xiao Hua spoke with a mocking smile on her face. Feng Yuxiang gritted her teeth in frustration. She could never have anticipated that Xiao Hua would enter the God Ascension realm this quickly. After all, it would normally take decades for someone to regain their full cultivation after obtaining a new vessel, but it hadn't been a full day since Xiao Hua entered her new vessel.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2225 Fighting Xiao Hua(2) "Stop fighting against it. You'll only hurt yourself doing so," Yuan said after seeing Xiao Hua attempting to resist his authority, almost subconsciously withdrawing it. "Shut up! I don't know what you did to me, but I would never willingly be your servant!" she shouted back. "You must've forced me into becoming your servant without me noticing somehow!" "You'll kill yourself at this rate!" Feng Yuxiang said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2226 Lingyue "Me? Naming you?" Yuan's eyes widened slightly at the young girl's request. The young girl nodded in confirmation. "..."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2227 As a Friend "Did I hear that right? The Crimson Empress just called that man her 'Master'!" the cultivators gasped in shock, their eyes wide with disbelief. "One!" Yuan suddenly started counting down. "Fuck! Are we really going to leave? What about those who had perished before us?!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2228 A Broken Treasure "W-What about me?" Xiao Meilin suddenly asked. Yuan looked at her and replied with a question, "What about you? I never even accepted you as my servant in the first place." "No way! How can you say that to me now?! That's too cruel, Master Tian! Are you really going to throw me away after using me for so long?!" Xiao Meilin exclaimed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2229 Forbidden Void Treasures "The Eternals are the creators of natural treasures? You've got to be kidding me…" Yuan mumbled in a bewildered voice after learning this information from Shiva. "Most people believe treasures are creations of the Heavens," Shiva continued, her tone laced with mockery. "But that's merely a delusion born from their ignorance of the unknown. Honestly, it's quite hilarious." Xiao Cangming then said, "But I have witnessed treasures materializing out of thin air with my very eyes. It usually happens in places where spiritual energy is abundant."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Goodbye, fellow disciples," Yuan said to Elder Shan's disciples before leaving the premises. The two disciples watched as Yuan's figure disappeared into the distance, and they mumbled— "Just who is that Outer Court disciple? What relationship does he have with our Master?" Qian Qi asked out loud. "I have never seen him before so I don't know. But if he can come to this place as an Outer Court disciple then there must be something special about him. Maybe he's from a powerful family," said Bei Bei the Core Disciple.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2230 Leaving the Primordial Realm Yuan smiled and responded to Xiao Hua's question, "That will depend on you. If you want to continue following me, I have no reason to refuse. Of course, if you wish to stay with your family, I will also respect that decision." "I wish to continue following you!" She immediately gave her answer. He nodded with a warm smile.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2231 Outside the Primordial Realm "What is going on out here? Why are we suddenly in the middle of a battlefield?" Xiao Chen questioned with a dumbfounded look on his face after coming out of the Primordial Realm, the excitement on his face quickly replaced by confusion. "Their armor… They're the Celestial Emperor's lapdogs, the Heaven's Mandate!" Xiao Meilin's eyes flickered with killing intent after seeing their familiar-looking armor. Despite being in the Primordial Realm for tens of millions of years, she'd never forget the Heaven's Mandate.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2232 An Otherworldly Presence After defeating the four soldiers, Yuan immediately went to assist the others. "Fuck! Who the hell are these bastards?!" The commander of the soldiers trembled in anger after witnessing how badly they were losing to the Asura Clan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2233 The Appearance of an Eternal "Dong Ye, listen to me carefully. Close the portal immediately. An Eternal is coming," Yuan said. "What?! What about you, my liege?!" "I cannot move my body right now, let alone leave. It's clear that this Eternal has business with me, and that it won't let me leave."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2234 Fighting an Eternal "What the hell is going on?! What did you do to us?!" The commander shouted at Yuan for answers, thinking he was responsible for the situation. Yuan calmly replied, "I didn't do anything. Hell, I was even nice enough to give you a warning. Unfortunately, you didn't heed it, and as a result, you'll die." In mere seconds, all of the soldiers perished under the pressure.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2235 Mighty Saaruk! Despite Saaruk's provocation, Yuan remained calm. "Since you insist, I'll continue doing just that," he said as he continued trying different things. From martial techniques to spiritual techniques such as True Primordial Fire, Heaven's Final Judgement, and even Heaven's Bane. Yet, they were all useless against Saaruk and his Eternal Essence. It was akin to trying to destroy a brick wall with nothing but raw eggs.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2236 Essence of the Void When Yuan started attempting to refine the essence of the void, Saaruk didn't intervene. In fact, he even watched with intrigue, almost as if he wanted to see the results. 'A mortal ant wants to absorb the essence of the void? How laughable! Even Eternals with a true Eternal Constitution struggle to do so!' Saaruk sneered inwardly. Unlike spiritual energy or any other known force, the void was something entirely different. Though it enveloped most of the universe, even experts with millions of years of cultivation failed to comprehend it, let alone wield it. For that reason, the Power of the Void was regarded as the most difficult and enigmatic path in all of cultivation.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2237 Enraged Saaruk Realizing he could no longer overpower Yuan, Saaruk abruptly withdrew, putting distance between them, as if he'd lost all intention of continuing the fight. "Where the hell do you think you're going?!" Yuan shouted as Saaruk pulled farther away. "Don't tell me you're running! A god fleeing from a mere mortal?! That's hilarious!" Yuan didn't bother giving chase. He knew that if Saaruk truly intended to flee, there was no way he could catch him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2238 Unknown Eternal After reading all of Saaruk's memories, the unknown Eternal withdrew its glowing string from his body and fell silent. "It's been so long since I last experienced excitement. I must speak with this mortal who stirred such an emotion within me," said the unknown Eternal. "!!!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2239 Reinforcements It took several days, but Yuan finally recovered enough to move his body. "It's a pity the Robes of Destruction got destroyed, but it served its purpose perfectly." Yuan gathered its scattered pieces and tossed them inside his spatial ring.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "W-What's going on?! Why did the sect elder suddenly attack that Outer Court disciple?!" The Inner Court disciples there were greatly shocked by this sudden incident, as they have never seen such a forceful and aggressive reaction in the Treasury Hall before. "Whatever that disciple did, he's done for. Nobody offends a sect elder from the Treasury Hall and gets away with it!" "It's been a long time since someone has caused trouble in the Treasury Hall! I cannot wait to see how that Outer Court disciple gets punished!"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2240 The Power of Void Manipulation "Let's not make this any more difficult than it has to be," said Squad Leader Guang as he reached Yuan. "Extend your arms and offer your limbs to me. If you struggle, I might accidentally cut more than I was ordered to." Yuan calmly looked at the Squad Leader and said, "Aren't you even the slightest bit curious why I am the only one alive when everyone else is dead?" "What?" Squad Leader Guang frowned at his words. Now that Yuan mentioned it, he definitely found it odd that a mere True Immortal survived, while everyone else had supposedly perished.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2241 The Power of Void Manipulation(2) With his Void Manipulation, Yuan traversed the battlefield like a ghost, appearing and disappearing at will. Every time he appeared, one or more soldiers of Heaven's Manadate would die. The soldiers fought desperately, but with not a single one of them having even the most basic Void Understanding, it was impossible for them to fight back properly, and the only thing they could do was hope to react fast enough or attack randomly.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2242 Sword-Shaped Token Minutes after Heaven's Mandate's retreat, another portal appeared, and a familiar figure emerged from it. "My liege! We're here to assist you!" Dong Ye's voice could be heard even before his body fully emerged from the portal. However, when he came out and saw the empty scene, Dong Ye turned to look at Yuan with a puzzled face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2243 The Second Squad's Punishment Somewhere in the Celestial Palace, Commander Du approached the throne, where a tall, handsome man sat. Standing on both sides of Commander Du in the room were ten other individuals, each of them a Squad Commanders for Heaven's Mandate. Since there were thirteen squads in total, two commanders were missing. The commander for the Elite Squad, which was a regular occurrence, and the commander of the Sixth Squad, who was killed in action recently and hadn't been replaced yet.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2244 A Heinous Crime After leaving through Dong Ye's portal, Yuan found himself back in the Eighth Heaven. "You could've at least said goodbye to your family," Yuan said to Xiao Hua, who emerged from his Dantian afterward. "Why?" she asked with a genuinely puzzled look on her face. "Well… forget it." Yuan sighed.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2245 Karma Yuan wore a dumbfounded look on his face after hearing about the Celestial Overlords' situation from Senior Bai. He was, without a shadow of doubt, confident that he was responsible for their karma's decline. After all, he'd recently killed thousands of soldiers from Heaven's Mandate, servants of the Celestial Emperor, and such an act was definitely considered defying the heavens, a crime worse than killing innocent people. Naturally, he never had such intentions. In fact, he didn't even consider how his actions could have such tremendous effects on the faction. Unfortunately, it was too late, and there was nothing he could really do about their karma. Unless he killed every individual within the Primordial Realm, since exiles granted a lot of karma, it would likely take millions of years of hard work for them to return to fix their karma.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2246 An Outrageous Rumor "I see… so Lulu is in the Ninth Heaven…" Yuan murmured after hearing about her situation from Senior Bai. Though it pained him to know she was struggling, it wasn't unexpected, as she had been sent to a place far beyond her current abilities. Yet, if she could overcome those challenges and push past her limits, he knew she would emerge far stronger than before. "Falling behind the others isn't her only hardship," Senior Bai continued. "She also has to endure the mockery and disdain of her fellow disciples. Even though I warned her beforehand, she still chose to face the challenge. I can't constantly shield her since there's only so much favoritism I can show a single disciple, but I make sure nothing goes too far." "That's a given," Yuan nodded in agreement. "As much as I care for Lulu, I can understand the other disciples' frustration. They worked hard to earn their place in the sect, while she entered through connections despite lacking the same abil

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2247 Portrait of the Culprit The idea of someone from the Celestial Overlords clashing with Heaven's Mandate was hard to believe. Yet, when they considered the current circumstances and the timing of events, it somewhat made sense. Even so—despite how neatly the pieces fit together—it was still an absurd conclusion, one so far-fetched it bordered on impossible to believe. After all, unless the entire Celestial Overlords fought together, it was simply impossible for them to overpower the Second Squad of Heaven's Mandate. "There's no point in overthinking it," Xu Jiaqi suddenly said. "Whether our drop in karma is connected to Heaven's Mandate or not, we'll find out soon enough."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2248 Portrait of the Culprit(2) "An Outsider, you say?" Commander Wong nearly burst out laughing at Xu Jiaqi's response, but managed to hold it in. "While the Outsiders were given assistance by the Celestial Emperor to help with their growth, there's no way any of them could defeat a single soldier of Heaven's Mandate at this time, much less slaughter thousands using Void Manipulation at the advanced level!" "Void Manipulation? And even at the advanced level?" The others expressed shock after learning this information for the first time.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2249 Towards the Ninth Heaven! "To make this fair, we'll verify every single member, regardless of their status or when they joined," Qiang Qing Yun continued. "After all, there's a chance this individual is in disguise or has assumed the identity of an existing member." "Sounds good. We'll start from those at the highest position and work our way down," Old Man Bi said. "Do I need to prove my identity?" Xu Jiaqi suddenly asked.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Any kind, huh?" Elder Bei went behind the desk and took out a small book that listed all of the monster cores they had in the Treasury Hall. While they have plenty of Spirit Apprentice monster cores, they don't have many monster cores at the Spirit Warrior level since it's not often sought after by the disciples. "How many do you need? And what level do you prefer for the Spirit Warrior monster cores?" Yuan scratched his head and said, "Honestly, I don't know how many I need, but I'd like the highest level monster core you have." "The highest level?" Elder Bei looked at him with wide eyes.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2250 The First Trial "When we reach the Ninth Heaven, do you think your Supreme Heaven's Legacy will be fulfilled?" Yuan suddenly asked. "The legacy doesn't just require you to reach the Ninth Heaven. We will also need to reach a certain location, where we can get our exile curse removed. That place is likely crawling with the Celestial Emperor's people," said Xiao Hua. "So we can only get rid of the curse ourselves, huh?" Yuan mumbled as they arrived before the Stairway to Heaven.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2251 Colossal Mammoth City "That giant really wanted me dead, huh? But what's with that attitude?" Yuan found the encounter so puzzling that he couldn't even be angry at the fact that someone tried to take his life twice in a row. However, when Yuan recalled what Tian Yang had experienced upon returning to the Desolate Continent after Kulas gained control, he was no longer confused. After lingering for a few more moments, Yuan used his divine sense to survey the area around him until he found a city.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2252 Unknown Sickness Yuan followed Xie Mey back to the palace, but before he even stepped inside, he felt an ominous pressure hanging over the place, suffocating the air itself. Sensing that strange pressure, Yuan silently confirmed his suspicions about the trial and mentally prepared himself. A short while later, Xie Mey stopped before a room sealed behind a pair of grand doors.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2253 Unknown Sickness(2) "What are you waiting for? Hurry up and kill me," Kulas urged when Yuan remained silent. Yuan closed his eyes and sighed out loud, "I wasn't able to save you in the past because of my lack of experience, but this time, for sure…" "Save me…? Can I even be saved at this point?" Kulas gave a hollow, defeated chuckle.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2254 Curing Kulas "I'm going to begin curing Kulas now. It might get a little dangerous, so you should leave us and wait outside," Yuan said to Xie Mey. However, she frowned and said, "No, I am going to stay here." "You don't trust that I will cure him?" Yuan asked with a raised eyebrow.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2255 The Second Trial "You want me to forge you a new vessel…?" Yuan stared at Kulas' soul with wide eyes. "What? Don't tell me you're going to refuse and force me to reincarnate..." Kulas remarked with a somewhat worried voice. Yuan shook his head with a smile and said, "Why would I do that? If you don't want to reincarnate, then so be it. However, if you want me to craft you a vessel that'll fit your taste… it might be a little difficult."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2256 Storming the Celestial Palace "The Celestial Palace… as in the Celestial Emperor's place?" Lan Yingying asked. Xiao Hua nodded. There was no mistaking it, as she'd visited that place countless times in the past. Shortly after the Celestial Palace appeared, Yuan began making his way toward it. But barely half a minute later, he noticed several tiny black dots emerging from the palace. As they drew closer, the dots expanded into the shapes of human silhouettes, and their powerful aura became clearer.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2257 Fighting the First Celestial Emperor When Yuan heard the Celestial Emperor's words, he fell silent for a moment before responding in a cold voice, "I would've lived a fulfilling life with Xiu Mei if you didn't assassinate them." "I did not assassinate your family. It was General Mo who stained his hands with their blood," the Celestial Emperor said in a calm, steady voice—one that carried the tone of someone who truly believed his own words. "Are you saying that General Mo assassinated my family on his own accord? That you didn't give him the command?" Yuan narrowed his eyes at him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2258 Evil God's True Ending Seeing Yuan giving it the middle finger, the eye in the sky narrowed with contempt, but there was also a hint of intrigue hidden deep within. After all, this was the first time a human had ever mocked it so openly. "Although you're a disrespectful little ant, I will give your boldness some credit," Ahruk spoke a moment later. "I'll give you an opportunity—the opportunity of many lifetimes. Since you killed the Celestial Emperor, I'll give his position to you." Yuan burst out laughing, "You want me to take that bastard's place? What's the catch?"

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2259 The Third Trial As the palm-sized item reached him, Yuan caught it. It was a golden medallion—one side engraved with a dragon, the other bearing the word 'Heaven'. "This is…" Yuan's eyes widened with surprise when he realized what he was holding.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "W-Why do you have to involve Grand Elder Xuan?! This is only a small incident! There's no need to bother a grand elder because of an Outer Court disciple! That's an exaggeration, Elder Bei!" Elder Gu immediately began sweating after hearing that Grand Elder Xuan might be involved in this mess. Elder Bei shook his head before sighing, "You really are clueless, aren't you, Elder Gu? Just an Outer Court disciple? Do you really think an ordinary Outer Court disciple will be given the Silver Fortune Medallion? When was the last time an Outer Court disciple had such a priceless object in their pockets? Think about it before you speak..." Elder Gu immediately turned speechless. After listening to Elder Bei's words, he'd finally came to that realization, but alas, it was too late for him to regret it, as there was no medicine for regret in this world. "Get out of my sight before I lose my patience." Elder Bei said a few seconds later.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2260 The Third Trial(2) Upon absorbing the fallen Eternal's essence, the other four's prowess strengthened drastically, even gaining slightly more than what they'd absorbed. Although the four of them together were slightly stronger than Saaruk at 10 percent of his prowess, individually, they were still relatively weak. "To think a mere mortal would be able to defy us!" The remaining four Eternals were struck with unimaginable shock as they watched one of their own fall to Yuan. None of them had ever considered such a thing possible, so in their eyes, it was like watching a pig learning math. "One down, four more to go!" Yuan laughed wildly as he immediately charged at their next Eternal.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2261 The Third Trial(3) Even though Yuan was essentially fighting the equivalent of two Saaruk at ten percent of his true power, he didn't feel particularly pressured or overwhelmed. It was surprising, especially considering that not long ago, he had struggled just to face one. 'To think I've grown this much just from absorbing the Eternal Essence in this trial…' Yuan himself was astonished by his progress. Unlike spiritual energy or his cultivation realm, gauging his growth with Eternal Essence was far more difficult; after all, the only benchmark he had to measure it against was Saaruk, who was generous enough to reveal his own prowess.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2262 Unique Trial "Great job clearing the trials, Master." Tian'er congratulated him upon his return to the platform. "Was that the last trial?" Yuan asked. He was sure there would be more since it would've been called the 'final' trial if it were the last one.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2263 Stairway to Heaven's Final Trial Feng Yuxiang shuddered just from recalling her unfortunate encounter with Bai Xutao. "You should know that I don't value my companions for their usefulness," Yuan continued. "But if you want to keep walking this dangerous path with me—one still full of unknowns—you'll need the strength to do so. Of course, I won't abandon you for being too weak or having trouble catching up, but if it comes down to your safety… I will leave you behind in a secure place until everything is over." "After all, as your master, your companion, and your friend, it's my responsibility to ensure your safety. There's a reason I'm not traveling with Meixiu and the others right now, no matter how much I want to and how much I miss them. I can't put their lives at risk just to satisfy my own selfish desires."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2264 Stairway to Heaven's Final Trial(2) "If you're afraid, then why did you agree to join the sect? You could have stayed here in the village with the others." Just like Tian Yang's memories, Yuan repeated his words to Meng Lili. "Although I am afraid of the cultivation world, there is something I am even more afraid of— the feeling of being powerless," she responded with a solemn look on her face.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2265 Fated to Suffer Over a hundred years had passed since Tian Yang rescued Kulas from the Immortal Confinement Dungeon. In all that time, he hadn't heard a single word about Kulas's whereabouts, and devoted himself entirely to destroying the Immortal Clans. As Ren Xia had wished, they began with the Immortal Sword Clan.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2266 The Great Mammoth "There's a peculiar rumor going around," Ren Xia started a conversation as she rested beside Tian Yang on the bed. "Is the rumor related to the Immortal Clans?" Tian Yang asked. "No, not exactly."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2267 The Immortal Clans' Downfall Ten years… fifty years… two hundred years… Two hundred more years went by, and the Immortal Clans had been reduced to a state nearly unrecognizable. They were no longer the haughty, untouchable powerhouses they had once been. Now, they were no different from ordinary families—shunned by the rest of the world, largely because people feared the consequences of siding with them. After all, Tian Yang targeted anyone who remained close to the Immortal Clans.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2268 The Real Giant's Continent "Attention, esteemed passengers. We will be arriving at our destination, the Desolate Continent, now known as the Giant's Continent, shortly. Please prepare to deboard!" The captain's voice resounded through the speakers. 'Looks like we didn't get attacked by sea beasts this time…' Tian Yang thought as he calmly gazed toward the horizon, where a vast stretch of land slowly came into view, growing clearer and larger with every passing moment. Half an hour later, the captain's voice returned.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2269 Verifying His Identity As Tian Yang and Ren Xia made their way to the Colossal Mammoth City, they encountered several magical beasts that only existed within Giant's Continent. Not only were they as massive as giants, but they also possessed overwhelming strength that far exceeded their cultivation level. For instance, a magical beast at the first level of Divine Emperor displayed combat prowess comparable to a Divine Ancestor, which was an entire realm higher. Moreover, magical beasts were naturally stronger than cultivators of the same realm, and when compared to humans, the gap became even more immense.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: "Even a million of my lives cannot compare to that Outer Court disciple's…?" Elder Gu stared at Elder Xuan with a dazed look on his face, his gaze filled with disbelief. Edler Xuan shook his head and said, "You're extremely lucky that I was the one who came here since the Sect Master wanted to personally come here after hearing what you'd done. Fortunately for you, he's currently busy with our guests. If you understand what I'm saying, I recommend you leave this sect before the guests leave and the Sect Master comes to find you." Elder Gu immediately began sweating again. The Sect Master wanted to see him? Because he'd offended a mere Outer Court disciple? Heavens! He better get as far away from the Dragon Essence Temple or else the Sect Master might skin him alive! "If you don't have anything else to say, hand over your disciple identification badge." Elder Xuan said as he showed his palms to Elder Gu.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2270 Tian Yang's Reunion With Kulas After she left, the blonde woman entered the palace. Some time later, she stood before a lone colossal silhouette sitting on a grand throne at the end of the room. "I have returned, Father." The woman bowed to him.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2271 Childish Feud "Saving me sooner, huh?" Kulas muttered before shaking his head. "Although it was quite painful and felt like an eternity at first, I quickly got used to it—the physical pain, that is. Due to the Great Mammoth Body Refinement technique you gave me, I was not only able to grow temper by physique to an extreme level, but it stopped being painful after a couple of months." "As for the mental torture… that took far longer to overcome. It took me years to realize that all I had to do was stop believing in what I saw; once I did, it became much easier to endure. That said, I wasn't close to many people—if any at all—so they usually used you to torment me." "If I have to be honest, I am sort of glad that it happened. After all, if not, I wouldn't be in my current position right now. Not only have I surpassed my entire family during their peak, but I also gained a real family who wouldn't betray me over some pressure."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2272 Heavenly Unrestricted Longevity Pill Once they arrived at their destination, Kulas turned to look at Xie Mey and commanded her, "I want you to gather your siblings at the throne room and wait for my return there." "All of them?" she asked for clarification. "All of them." "As you wish, Father."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2273 The Method to Becoming a Giant By the time Tian Yang finished recounting his experience inside Han Zexian's cavern, the tea had arrived. "These tea leaves are exclusive to this continent—I cultivated them myself," Kulas said as he poured each of them a cup. When Tian Yang took a sip, he immediately sensed a change within his body. His physique had been refined, as though he had just undergone an intense body-tempering session.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2274 Giant Emperor Kulas' Family Hearing Kulas' words, Tian Yang finally voiced the question that had lingered in his mind ever since learning about the Giant Race. "I've wondered about this for a long time, but why don't any of you venture beyond the continent? At first, I assumed it was simply a preference, that giants chose to remain here. But from what you're saying… it sounds like you don't have a choice. Is something binding your people to this land?" Kulas shook his head.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2275 Kulas' Personal World Once they were alone again, Kulas said, "Your room is already being prepared as we speak, so let's check out the training area, shall we?" "Let's." Tian Yang nodded. Kulas then led them to the back of the palace, where a flower garden of massive, unknown plants was growing. As they walked through the garden path, Kulas explained, "This is where I grow my tea leaves."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2276 Sparring With Kulas Kulas jumped to the center of the platform and beckoned Tian Yang, "Don't tell me you're afraid of losing?" Tian Yang smiled at his provocation and also flew to the center of the platform. "Don't cry when I beat you," he said.

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2277 Heaven Defying Ascension Pill After their spar, Kulas brought Tian Yang and Ren Xia to their new living quarters. "I assumed the two of you wanted to live in the same room, so I only prepared this room. If you want separate rooms, let me know," said Kulas. "How thoughtful." Ren Xia remarked. "But you're not wrong."

item.title: Cultivation Online
item.description: Chapter 2278 Effects of the Heaven Defying Ascension Pill "Come see me after you consume that pill. Until then." Kulas didn't linger and immediately left. Tian Yang returned to his room shortly after to show Ren Xia the pill.

item.title: Cultivation Online
